sessions/the-red-tally/session-1.html.title: Session 1
sessions/the-red-tally/session-1.html.description:
Prev: Next: Session 2
Denpakant, Suimin
Abt 6 weeks ago The Scarring began 2 weeks ago it mysteriously stopped No one has an excuse to murder. But murder they have inside the megablock A series of occult killings have taken place, each of us have our own knowledge As we’re going abt our apartments, we’ll just go clockwise describing us
Starting with Ithax Right now, he is a beautiful trustworthy looking twink. Machine crafted to be so beautiful. If you heard him hes always muttering shit in a different voice. When he speaks hes so dude bro Rn he’s sort of. Playing sad breakup music emanating within apartment. Does frequently wander about, investigating, taking witness statements. Not always abt murders. Missing vending machine stock has come up multiple times Clothes Never match, always wildly different bright colors. Slightly offputting Breakup music abruptly stops changing radio stations
Haven Across the hall from Ithax Seen him around Ithax or just kinda there and then gone once u hear a door shut 6’7 kasatha Phone in one hand, openly wielding a gun in the other since the scarring Ready and willing Rn just pacing his apartment, glancing at the TV, trash everywhere. Not taking care of his space Not the most friendly when talking to him, but he’ll chat if someone else opens it up. Picked up sign language with Kaspar! In the evenings, if ur in the hallway, u can hear him screaming through the walls His radio turns on and picks up Ithax’s breakup music
Patch 3’ tired rat with big eyebags Usually out of the apartment working too much at his clinic Always seems like he has too much shit on his shoulders, sounds suuuper tired Knocked out, maybe stitching in his apartment. Might bring back mechanical shit from the street Gun, credit card, no idea where it came from All his tools turn on simultaneously, including the bonesaw
Vintovka Before scarring didnt know if her apartment was lived in She spent most of her time at the broken standard barracks This is where her more personal stuff is Little taller than haven, tries not to talk to people. Very heavily scarred Briefcase, gives mean looks Apartment is semi-nice. Messier since scarring. Pad by window to snipe out of Old military effects. Bunch of files she’s collected Unfortunately, her window lights flicker on and off, giving off a signal
Kaspar Stars in Water Shorter than tall ppl but very enthusiastic Real big in terms of physical but enthusiastic Have seen sister and mom, if kaspar sees u they’ll talk even if they dont fully understand what ur saying. Talking very loudly at you
Have seen them at brutaris team, some sort of scarring before. But known as sportsballer. Kinda dumb but ur friend.
Has not been going out much. No one has seen sister or mom at all recently Shes the only one seen, and if seen shes quiet and nervous in a way they werent before Rn cleaning kitchen unnecessarily, 3rd time this week, listening to the radio, mostly housekeeping Sisters room is the one to light up repeatedly and glitch
Sacrament 15’3” tall Jay missed a lot Doesnt fit her apartment Or hallway Polite If shes in apartment, trying to work out (not going well) Vending machine starts charging her card rapidly, dispensing many drinks Processing payments faster than robotic voice can speak
Konbini-chan No one has seen her too often. Stays in her room all the time
Seen at convenience store a lot tho (Save Point Convenience) Hear rage streams in apartment if ur nearby Party knows her as kitsune, but in human form all the time. So unless ur ithax u prob dont know On computer looking at discourse Computer fully glitches and shut down Can take control of characters now Sacrament punches the vending machine
“Charges, damage to aetherion property!” keeps going Haven tries to call ithax, doesnt go thru Sacrament sees tax collection robot, she doesnt owe anything to the irs Kaspar goes to room, door doesnt recognize them. Fingerprints dont match Reluctantly leaves Ka: are u good with the robot?? S: yeah i dont owe anything. In taxes Ka: thats very specific. Ok S: have u had any tech actin funny? Ka: uhhh… maybe? S: ok. Um. my vendin machine wont stop goin Ka: what S: i have a vendin machine…. S: my employer provided me within a vendin machine in my domicile Can smell coffee and burritos blending together Ka: thats gonna get gross, if u need help? S: i tried to get it to stop, it charged me more cause i punched it Ka: oof. I can clean it up? S: i dont. Fit well. It would be appreciated Konbini swears at computer, checks fridge for Hero energy Turns off, but there are some
Ithax gets a Hero Energy Drink, goes to haven’s Sees patch’s bonesaw acting up Patch is so tired Ithax gets distracted by irs robot Ithax: (goes on an adhd rant about talking to konbini) H: is this like the vending machine thing? I: do you want your radio back? H: i can hear ur fuckin music btw, what’s up with that? I: hits vape as a distraction Vintovka leaves apartment Wifebeater, bottle of vodka V: who the fuck is making the righteous nasty noise Sees sacrament V: ah that fuckin one. Is ur shit also fucked Ka: thats rude S: yes… V: light not normal S: tech havin some issues in my apartment V: lights not normal. I paid the rent on time. Should be no issue S: my vending machine is sending me into debt. Further debt Smells awful here, not as bad as scarring I: YOOO KONBINI IS UR SHIT ALSO BROKEN Ko: im sorry can i help u H: is ur shit broken too? Ko: yeah is urs? I: everyone’s is and i think the tax robot is involved. Come help? Ko: leave the apartment? H: is that a problem? Have u showered Ko: do you want to know H: no She comes with Everyone is so awkward Patch thinks the lack of drugs is the issue. Everyone is weird Sacrament lets us go check out her apartment Vending machine is now empty 1 fake plant. Aetherion branded calendar 1 picture of 2 dragonkin Quite simple, she has a botnib infestestation Botnib is a gremlin that infests tech objects Go to the tax robot Konbini hacks it, opens compartment that has a floating gun that shoots sacrament Combat Konbini summons a convenience store with popup ads We beg konbini to shower Konbini is flirting…? With sacrament? Go down to 17th floor to get ithax’s gun that was thrown over the side
The only current stores are Dying Light (gun shop), Circuit Lab (also known as patch and pray), Second Earth Ramen, Save Point Convenience, Ogar Butchery and Produce, Petaslice Repairs
Go down and see that currently investigating the fallen robot is one of the shirren, the owner of the Grocer, Onmagakar “This yours? I: yeah,,, “Careful, dangerous time to lose a gun” I: we ran into an infestation of gubbins and botnibs Kas: hows it been goin? “Oh gubbins and botnibs? Besides the raid? We’ve been better. HBU?” Ka: damn. Well i just got to hit a ton of little things. Which was fun. That guy put us in a convenience store? I got glitched. Not fun “Seems a bit… yeah idk why 17th. U dont have a lot of tech right?” H: As much as any “Servers are on the 16?” H: could be going from other floors “Could be, but servers being down wouldve been noticed.” S: idk if related “Surely, but divining such things is beyond me.”
“Have you talked to Vossk lately? The security guard?” S: i dont think so? “There are murders apparently. Hes locked down the entire building.” Ithax tries to clue in patch abt the brood pod Hard to gain measure, just odd feeling. Not whole lot more. Nice man hands over gun Hands other parts of machine, he works as a parttime butcher S: speakin of oddities, i… i’ll share that there are a couple odd things that ive noticed. 1 we know there’ve been the murders. There’s the one that’s taken organs and replaced them with rocks This was on the 19th floor Right now there are 7 bodies V: i can ascertain abt 5 of the 7. They were all killed in close quarters but not using the front door. A little out of the ordinary H: there were runes draining life maybe since the people S: raiders killed with acid-coated knives ritualistically H: they were mercenaries tho? And killed their own guys Vossk has gone a little Very Protective of ppl after the attack on the 19th She has access to the bodies, but locked them up Thankfully, someone has fired at the building and shes left to protect it, but she’s effectively locked us in like cats in a car Most of the main entrances are blocked by blast doors We plan on going to to check out the bodies, Vossk is going to be gone for 2 days Sacrament partner bonds with kaspar S: i did this bc i cant sign so i figured itd be easier Ka: u have an accent????? S: i do Ka: u sound weird. Thanks? S: its ok itll go away after a day Ka: the accent??? S: the bond. I think im stuck with the accent for life We go back to kaspar’s place Sacrament showers
Put on ONN The main one hasnt replied back to ithax We think kaspar is married to sacrament She explains its just a day to them We talk abt the murders Datapad says that the bot was going to find a high value computer 2 sets of killings: raiders that raided floors 1-10 Sacrament: thinks its cultists, used guns but made a point to kill ppl with acid coated knives Konbini: rapidly decayed Haven: believes it was a mercenary group that executed their own men if wounded Vintovka: only moved in groups of 4, 8, 12, or 24 specifically Ithax: no one knows who disabled security. Took weeks to clean it up. Despite that, very little surviving security footage, hints that someone in our apartment accessed the network to let the raiders in. Kaspar: could lip read what was being said, was different than what ppl said they heard Serial killer replacing organs with rocks Sacrament: was 7 ppl, 5 of which were killed on floor 19. Haven: runes were on the rocks to drain their life Kaspar: needs to be 6ft tall and Big to do so w/o equipment Konbini: weirdly good at cutting up the ppl. Had knife skills, cooking knife skills Vintovka: had to be close quarters, front door not used due to sight lines Sacrament’s next door neighbor hasnt been seen since the scarring Ithax wants to break into kaspar’s sibling’s room They dont want to. 1.5month since they were gone Pick the lock, seems like a normal room Pick up the journal, open it, there are dates entered that dont match kaspar’s remembrance when their sister left I: there’s a discrepancy Also the handwriting seems to look slowly but surely look like their sister. Initially odd and handscratchy Latest entry date talks abt walks to the park The days going thru dont happen here, we live on a tidally locked planet These things can have cloud saves Kaspar and their mom get mentioned a few times recently Ithax leaves and comes back with extra corkboards Looking at the scratchy handwriting This is the handwriting of someone relearning motor functions Normally takes up to 3 months before handwriting comes back, but we only have a page worth Vintovka asking anything abt 4 days ago She saw a vlaka up on another roof, far away She tried to look, but then woke up in her bed after There’s one abt swimming A man has been knocking ppl out with anesthetics No one knows who he works for, may be a shirren Konbini is locked out of her phone Vintovka: what’s the name of guy at convenience store?
Ko: Al. that’s my bestie V: HES WEIRD Ko: nooooo. Just anti-social Ko: he gives me free discounts V: he gives me them too ur not special I: do u know abt the turrets V: he actively tried to flirt with me Ko: did you let him down. He doesnt take those things well Patch says a gang is holding/creating medical supplies Kaspar’s sister’s computer is locked Patch knows Vossk Has his number, gave him a synthetic leg We go down to 19th Would be nice if it wasnt for the dead woman on the floor Most ppl are cremated here, tho there are ritualistic ways to die. Without dying by sun or cold exposure, u have to wait to be cremated Bodies were glued shut Bottom screws of vents are loose, look down and it goes to a 20ft drop down below Vent is industrial sized, 3x3ft Patch texts Vossk abt getting a vent layout, will have to wait for results Woman is human The killing blow wasnt anything immediately noticiable, exact hit to spinal cord. Followed by poison to entire body while organs were replaced Unfortunately cant tell which killed, poison couldve been numbing agent Synthetic based poison, using basic chemistry. Hydrochloric acid base (NOT NATURE) Also dont go to 63rd floor, they have Poison Plants Rocks Cultish in nature, they were implanted in the place of them. The final taken was the heart. All drain creature’s vitality in a different order. Sight, ears, motion, breath, heartbeat Game forum Haven: Theyre doxxing and recruiting ppl to cults Konbini: theres a lich. Dw we doxxed him Lives 3 districts away Sacrament: has to kill a cult leader to get a promotion A killer lives in our megablock, killed 5 times during lockdown. If they were strong enough to get past lockdown they wouldnt worry abt stealth. No biotraces found in the sewers. Either had 7 different plastic outfits, or returned to their apartment. Likely live between floor 15-18, midpoint. The complex shut down water to inhabited apartments. There are only 30 apartments that the killer could live in A guy lives in the sewers with squirrel foxes as an army So many monsters They are not native Seen: bargheist, hydra, griffin
Griffin are extinct from elven homeplanet, Aedryn. They dont exist We spend time going thru our rumors

misc/particle-recycling-nanobots.html.title: Particle Recycling Nanobots
misc/particle-recycling-nanobots.html.description: Orbital space debris is usually handled by PaReN (Particle Recycling Nanobots) which decompose materials rapidly and when exposed to atmosphere the PaReN undergoes a magic based reaction destroying their enzyme capabilities and allowing the broken down element and molecule to fall to the nearest celestial body where they innately crawl into clumps to condense material before dying. Captains taking off from are advised to in orbit disable any remnant PaReN latent in the exosphere that may have clung to the ship during takeoff.

misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.title: System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange
misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.description: Live streaming is on a delay due to data speed limitations, on most planets with modern internet infrastructure this delay isn't noticeable. However, delays between streams on planets can reach the days mark, turning streamers into local celebrities. Large enough streamers are permitted to have their streams uploaded on System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange, most Solar System Network Administrations will allow the transmission of popular streams across spacetime through Remembrance Streams with a cut being taken by the administrations. Some streamers have taken to becoming a form of traveling act going to different systems and planetary orbits in order to provide live streams to fanbases built in other regions (and sometimes to escape controversy and allegations in former solar systems). Streams are also available for transfer across systems usually for a substantial fee.
misc/system-connective-relay-bearer-for-.sourcePath: Misc/System Connective Relay Bearer for Long-distance Exchange.md

places/ship/velkrion.html.title: Velkrion
places/ship/velkrion.html.description: “Its actually related to the serenade, funnily enough. The designs were built using the serenade’s tech. U find the serenade, u find it. But until u fine the serenade, its inside only. We can only assume the faction that built it had an insider that could download the blueprints and tech. As for what it is, its a giant self sustaining space station. As for what its doin, i believe research. Biological and the like. Though, normally, there’s no reason to be so luxurious w the serenade’s design if it was just biological. A rat’s cage would be enough.” Z: more than just research? “For 4k? Absolutely what im tellin you.”

places/systems/auver-system/senaria/omeg.description: The temperature is always a flux between fall and spring depending on the time of year. It's a relatively poor district destroyed in the last large galactic war and never fully repaired due to damages to its space port which were deemed too costly. Though there is a some luxury buildings that remain, you live in the megabuilding Suimin all on the same floor of the same wing in the same hall on the 37th floor. Suimin

places/systems/auver-system/senaria/sigm.title: Vitiae
places/systems/auver-system/senaria/sigm.description: Storm has been moving up in the world getting to be headquartered in the Vitiae district; they've fallen under the command of one Mafilus, a vesk commander. Running the district as a military junta.

places/systems/rona-system.html.title: Rona System
places/systems/rona-system.html.description: Solara Imperium space

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 1
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev Session: Next Session: Session 2
ASPER
The 26 Laws of Power
Ripley
CV01
Almado Alquinst
E-Xep-Ro
Nivaya Camacho
2 college students floating leisurely above Kiliv-VI Nivaya, lashunta, studies in alchemy/science Purple Ripley, tall cat thing, pure white, bright green eyes, nose in a book, glasses Ripley steering the ship, not a whole lot goes wrong until smth does Small air missile hits them, go tumbling down Emergency gear sets off, odd foam begins gently forming to the body to absorb impact, hopefully can break free At the same time, another group is hit Giant brain and partially broken android are also falling Asper’s systems working, 26 laws of power’s shut off Unfortunately, this foam may kill 26, it applies gravity to the massive brain Deploying the foam allows you to stop hearing Already crashed, a man with a blue ship in a blue mask alongside a blue popstar Blue popstar, main cargo, is safe but the ship is almost entirely destroyed Miku hood piece has been impaled M: almado how are we to repay this :( Are you ok? A: miku. We are so fucked. He gets shocked for cursing No bank payment is affected, no wifi rn A: HOW BAD IS YOUR DEBT M: debt????? What do you mean debt???? Almado tries to knock himself out with a rock but fails A: Alright I’ve gotta get into character. excited voice Alright Miku I think we can do this! Android awaking from a frozen coffin/ship Sees all three fall out of the sky 1 standard fare 1 scavenger’s vehicle 1 with giant face on it All going to be unconscious for a few mins at least Android, they are symmetrical in face shape and body, almost offputting, they have bright teal and green accents and a lot of tactical gear, carrying 2 guns and a knife All of the parts from the crashed ships would be a quarter of a ship. If youre lucky, comms unit would be available still Goes to the closest ship, team miku Team miku Odd corporate ship surely has good loot Smoking head next to an idol E: your ship is not salvageable. Almado immediately stepping in front of miku, trying to body block M: HI STRANGER. Where did u come from! E: slightly over there. My ship crashed as well. There will be items on your ship that are perhaps different from the items that survived on mine. And the 2 others. 3 crashed at once. M: what if theyre hurt? Al: what if they have a way out? E: then itll be easy to get their supplies. Or assistance. If theyre indebted. M: which way? We must assist them quickly! E: follow. Walks across the oddly crunchy desert, cold desert, 20 degrees fahrenheit 1 week But this planet has 30 earth day days. It is morning. It is only going to get hotter. 30 day days, 30 day nights. Livable by outsiders temperature Environmental protections in the cold are good, hot no. 10 days until it gets bad Walking to college students Do see them, break their way out of the foam protection seals N: what happened? R: we were literally shot out of the sky N: why??? R: IDK. fuck, my journals!!! Outer layers are crusty from crash foam Otherwise relatively intact N: are you injured? R: no Missile didnt do personnel damage R: our ship is fucked though N: its cold, we should figure out shelter R: yeah. Wait- nivaya is that miku over there? Is that guy cosplaying miku? R: you know that artist ive been getting into recently? N: yeah??? The one you wouldnt stop playing R: that person is cosplaying over there???? M: HI STRANGERS N: oh what an interesting cosplay. Do you think they crashed as well or- N: hm. Maybe they have supplies or something. Should we head over to them? R: oh the company is gonna be so pissed N: itll be alright Miku has an amp, performing from afar R: i gotta hook this guy up with a sound system fr Do approach Cultivators 26 is So Fine ASPER has to help them get out of the foam though The party convenes A: how much food and water does everyone have? M: for rationing right? A: yes… so we can all work together Is sizing everyone up and checking weapons E-Xep-Ro and Almado start examining ships for salvage Oxygen filter is still intact E: your ship. Is on fire. Note the smoke coming out. Note the imminent explosion. Note the parts that still work. Al: we’ll check out what the other ship has Comm system on miku ship is able to be salvaged M: i hope the fans arent worried :(( R: nivaya i think thats MIKU N: what???? M: HI! Im the starlight idol hatsune miku! R: omfg M: whats your name? Al: youre the ones that have been making a portion of my interest payment N: im nivaya comacho, this is my startstruck roommate ripley Al: RIPLEY I NEED YOU TO SURVIVE. ITS IMPORTANT TO MIKU YOU SURVIVE. AND ITS MORE IMPORTANT TO ME. Starts to reach for a gun R: i was not planning on dying??? Al: good. R: you dont need to do that. Cultivators 26: GREETINGS MORTALS. I AM THE 26 LAWS OF POWER. N: hello???? Did you all crash Asper: Yes, did you also crash? I noticed there’s a lot of smoke going around E: did you salvage any useful parts from your ship? As: no, should I have? E: we all have about ⅓ of a ship As: I expected a working ship M: we have speakers! A: and a comm unit M: the people need to hear our voices! As: i don’t think the people need to hear my voice but that’s ok, do you have a beautiful voice? M: starts singing Almado’s collar shocks him and he has to do a backup dance Ripley goes back to the ship to salvage a Miku CD but it’s destroyed Almado is trying to sell a CD to Ripley As: who is miku? 26: i think it’s a singer? As: the one who just sang? 26: that would make sense As to Miku: are you miku? M: I’m hatsune miku, the starlight idol! As: are you popular, hatsune miku the starlight idol? Not really popular M: man i hope we dont miss our performance Al: if we move quickly and you have help from your adoring fans 26 goes back to identify salvageable items Water filtration A retrofit for the cargo if you need plants 26: can someone assist? E: why do you have a water filtration system on a cargo ship? Al: lets not look a gift horse in the mouth E-xep-ro, being signal jammed There are satellites nearby, but this is a signal jam zone Wont get signal until that is shut down Red blinking light about a mile away Emergency vehicle light, used by medical staff E: miku your signal is being jammed Asper 10 mins mystic bonds with everyone in the party by learning their names, connecting 2 them This ship crashed a while ago as well On impact, it crashed through frozen over termite mounds or giant ant mounds with no creatures rn No smoke, no sounds of life Some creatures awake, able to see small desert rat-like prints but heavier than they should be Heavy enough to crack the ice, wings made out of metal whirling Creatures gone over the side of the cliff, around this time that a flare activates on the other side of a valley abt 2ish miles away, on top of a mesa Rat explodes Combat Crashed pod, similar to our own, but better condition Emergency pod, made to survive impacts
The sunshades inside come from Cosmo Town, cheap sunshades worn by tourists Taking the batteries removes the blinking light from the pod Black box and most of the technical parts are stripped, its been about 10 kiliv-iv days, roughly 6ish months Flare is still there on the cliff Leads to sand that has shifted in the 6 months Down into the valley
The Long Mile Rocks glow like jade, able to see groups of bugs moving along the side as we approach Bugs hiss at us, move toward us (some false, some true) highest ?, lowest will Creatures that are odd, part of a study here, every 4th generation is born with sentience. Typically this is an incredibly small force of them. Ppl dont come here bc the mindless ones hunt down other species with sentience. Prevent other creatures to develop sentience Leader recognizes tech creatures Once the leader dies the rest all scatter like regular animals Circuitry in the sand, looks to be bronze, makes a planetwide circuitry network Xep touching it makes them nauseous again They let it knock them out Dreams of the stars heading outward They dont make sense of it, they are floating, hand falls off their body, same with legs and toes, all going to different destinations They are asleep for a minute, felt like a few hours Asper and miku touch it Asper is asleep for an hour, dreaming of being reforged Initially painful, but did subside into pleasantness Miku is asleep for a minute Did not understand what it meant but it was not painful Mesa creates a sharp ascent, 90 degrees, then 100 Somewhat like a tabletop, we can enter caves that may wind their way up Occasionally blinking emergency lights that last for the next few (earth) days Core Coolant and heatant pipes Approach core, a woman walks out. With small scamp and dragon. Approaches xep, speaks in vesk “Do you wish to drink? Gamble? All is available to you here!” Hologram fully, but divots are made in the sand when she walks There are no thoughts E: what brings you to this place? “What brings you here? Hungry? Horny? Lucky?” E: where are we? “Right where we need to be.”
“Would you like a refreshing drink? Would you like to go to Sexico-6? What form of thirsty are you?” E: a beverage please “Please provide id!” “Yes of course! Please escort yourself out of the premises before we attack!” Sphere looks odd multiple self assemblies inside Appears like an egg Multiple exit ports for what hatched inside
Dragonet is said, if it appears at your table on The Serenade, it brings luck “No counterfeit mascots allowed on the premises” Unmarked credits from an unknown source Climb up, see a cargo ship made for long distant voyage, comes complete with bunk beds Has a gravity pool for long distance travel, currently has a breach Egg has signs of internal combustion, burning the circuits within When company secrets Would be exposed, the obvious answer is Burn It As nivaya fixes up the ship, the signals of comms units arrive, all at once “No report hidden, no report required” seems that almado has been sending reports consistently, all in standard writing format in complete text
Siryu to ASPER: “small problem encountered, won’t be picking you up, survive for a day or more” Nivaya cant do an airtight hole, IT ISNT AIRTIGHT Thru the ship comms is a signal: “any of the crash survivors, please report. Please respond.” Almado gives the date, survivors, approx location “You survived?” Al: roger. “The mistress would like to hear from you immediately. Ill send a GPS ping.”
Arrive at Storm's Eye Ship is parked outside bubble, person meets us “Pleasure to meet you. How did you all survive?” M: the power of friendship! Al: and unwavering violence. “Thats what i like to hear. Can you tell me about the violence?” “You’re corporate?”
“Im just a simple biologist, but i do work for Madam Zaera Allhaven.”
“I of course work under her, im sure youre aware of her various things, she serves Veyra and N’Zhereth” “Youre the first recorded survivors outside the dead zone. How did you survive the hundreds of (bugs)” “Their swarms have lessened” E: we shot the leader “How many? There are no less than 10 observed, assuming they were sentient, and the sentient all live under ground.” Al: we didnt encounter many, we found the remains of smth called septico six? “Hmm, i wouldnt know anything about that.” (she is a devout of Veyra and N’Zhereth. Observing nearby species. shes known for unorthodox methods, trying to create sentience in the nearby populations, trying to do a population control. Eugenics on the local species. Every 3 of the population is stillborn then the 4th will be sentient, which creates a fully sentient species w a low birth rate.) (god of death and mutation. She has a bubble here, extort natural resources, people dying over psuedo winters. Allowing her to observe winters at a faster rate. See how things adapt. If she could play an active role, shed love to.)
(she is technically exiled in Concord of Aedryn space, but shes in Hollow Stars space so whatever happens happens. Not technically allied with any major faction. Immense knowledge, she is an elf, will outlive a lot.) (man is dressed in garb that copies those of the ones she is willing to date as of late.) “Can i introduce you to her as the first survivors?” Yes of course!

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 2
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 1
Next: Session 3
Storm's Eye Bubble creates a whistle as it attempts to take the brunt of the approaching storm Mechanisms settle down in our mind Enter a drill-bore like structure in the earth Inside is mechanical, houses built inside
Kalervo Turred Leads us to the center “Please take off your shoes upon entering.” woman whos augments make her roughly 7ft tall, extends a hand
Zaera allhaven “Welcome. I hope the ride here wasnt too bad. The winds can be rough.” N: what a fascinating place, are you responsible for the bugs? “No, they’re natural here. What do you think is happening- im here to oversee their evolution.” N: oh i understand. You wanted to meet us?
“Youre the first survivors. I wanted to know how it was. I have a proposal. Do you want to live on Kiliv-VI for the rest of your lives?” No
“Ill repair your ship if you get bug corpses. More than 2, less than 10.” 26: why put an upper limit? Not that we want to go kill all. “Ill be happy no matter what number.” Al: how many corpses do we have to bring in to get you to repair a specific other ship? “Is it repairable?” Al: yeah it is “Give me the location, ill send out a vehicle to rescue it.” As: what are you wanting the corpses for? “To help evolution. Theres been no successful retrieval up until now. You managed to survive.” (it seems like they lost their leader, lost contact with itself. Tactics are normally used to there being another one they could scurry to. In war, you go to the next leader) As: when would you like this retrieval by? “Midday. I doubt the corpse would survive the heat.” “I have a cargo truck, if you need. I understand the spaceship you got is of great quality, but i could start repairing it while you go out and retrieve the bodies?” Al: if possible- (gets paint chip out of miku-themed blue)
“I have a close fit. If you wish, you could stay here. Aetherion Corporation won’t collect debts on kiliv-vi.”
Al: its important to get miku to her next performance. My manager- that buffoon will- he’ll kill somebody. (signal jammer is controlled by her. Could become a slave for her) (all lines are blocked, but our phone are working. She also doesnt want aetherion observants in case almado’s passive signal has a recorder.) Driving across 10 hour by land vehicle
The Long Mile The bodies are gone Sands reveal no secrets Burying the dead wouldnt make sense, the only reason to do so would be symbolic Maybe eat their dead? But they are herbivores Soft dunes make us go 10ft slower Almado is able to find the hole that leads into the colony, hole in the sands, rises a good 5ft up above the sands rn, done so so that if the sands are higher they dont immediately get buried Begin the repel down Go down into the lower reaches Instantly the branches begin to form (tunnel branches out) 2 lefts, 1 right We go left, see scratches and blood as we go Thoughtsense kicks up, 2 of them Appears theyve added some form of filigree around the side, sides are soft earth Antechamber has no tunnel that leads from it, if the bodies were brought here, they would be beneath our feet Silk spun by the insects to bury their dead in The 2 that buried them are hiding underneath their dead, afraid of It appears they are worshipping a light god, filigree shows a sun and an egg it hatches from. Sun does appear to be on the north facing sun, moon on the top of the ceiling Worshipping the egg in the cave to the north One recognizes divine lance They arent killing each other, if nivaya had to guess, the most likely is that there is a migration going on Creature was about to evolve and change its form, nivaya shot it 2 we didnt kill were burned Our crashed ships: Looking at a chaff based thing, no emergency signals went out, no heat signatures Low energy bomb hit us, caused all of our engines to fail, but does cause us to crash Uncommon, very expensive for militaries to have and only hit important targets If allhaven had enough money, she could get it Attempt to head out Go back 10 more hours Getting back is easier, she gives a signal that lets us know if we’re closer or further from her Various workers and robots begin offloading She meets us outside her house “I heard you got more than enough. Could i offer you a drink?” Xep: alcohol? Soda? “We have various non-named juices.” R: milk? “What kind?”
Almado gets Dr. Vesk (meat flavored soda) E-xep-ro gets ‘normal beverage for human’ “Now obviously, there was 1 issue. I will request another favor, of course.” “It appears the vehicle was not salvageable. We were able to take some of the insignias off of it, if you wish.” Al: were you able to salvage the uh. (motions to the mask) “The thing is. It was skewered through and eaten by the local braueri.” N: was it made of plant material? “No, it appears they spit their digestive juices on it in passing.” N: you mentioned you wanted to ask another favor? “Of course. If i could ask, are you going to Nsuoba soon?” Yes “Could you bring the doctoral student Turid with you?” 26: for what purpose? “He needs to go there. I won’t ask where you’re going or why you have a ship that was registered under an aetherion official’s title, and had to scrub, and you wont ask why he needs to go.” N: do we have to bring him back? “No. He will find his own way back or travel with u. Once he’s there he will do his task.” N: i dont see why there would be an issue. Unless there’s someone else who has an issue? (miku is 3 hours late to her performance.) Nivaya pulls zeraph aside for a moment N: i know this seems like a lot to ask, i was very interested in your research, im a student of biology myself, i did come here to seek out that sort of thing. I was wondering if there was any info from your research youd be iwlling to share, i could share what i have so far. I was able to get some information about the bugs we encountered “The bugs are my research, theyre a pinochle of evolution, theyre able to evolve midlife cycle to fit their group. If those 2 survived they mightve been leaders. N: do you know where theyre migrating? “Theyre migrating???” N: there are signs of migration “Thats unfortunate. We’ll have to move. We picked this location bc it was close.” N; theyre moving. (shows her pictures of the filigree and what was seen with the other 2) “They’ve evolved!” looks outside “this is most unprecedented. I wanted to experiment on the vesk, but they were sentient fully by the time we learned of them. This might become the next vesk.” N: have they always been like this? “They were much more violent. (abt to say something)” N: able to adapt as well “Of course. Why else would you come out here?” N: can we stay in contact? “Of course you can contact me at any time.” N: ill be sure to contact if i have anything to share She writes down something, waves us goodbye Turred waits outside “did you have a nice talk?” N: i did! “How was it!” N: it was fiiiine? “Ill be setting myself up in the cargo. If thats alright with you?” N: if thats what you prefer. “I need a lot of room. And the experiments get implosive.”
Able to go to newly refurbished vehicle, 300ft, The Blue Angel Despite its size, handles like a dream Rumbles upon takeoff, able to leave atmosphere, free to go to amongst the Turred takes off for the first time in his life Almado texts manager Overhears ASPER conversation, punches wall and starts texting manager more Contact dead, asset fine
ASPER texts Siryu Get in contact with text, get a call back “Hello, youve reached the impound. Who is calling? “My designation is ASPER. Is siryu there? “Siryu cannot talk. Are you calling to pay the fine? Do u represent Siryu’s company? A: I do
Siryu is currently in holding for murder of Arroyo Cemsor The man who was going to give Miku her first gig A: IDK what this is about “5000 credit fine. Will go to auction if Siryu is held in contempt of court, if you wish to buy the ship back.” As: this seems out of character for her?? “Murder is out of character for most people.” E-xep-ro checks for messages, none Almado is PISSED, making Asper help hatsune miku
Approach Nsuoba Lower part made of underwater caves, various unique fruits Able to make wine-like Nsuobier
Begin landing in Thorne, have to pass by rusty curiosity that is currently impounded Looks like it underwent surgery, standard practice to prevent invisible creatures/holdouts Warn abt venting the air out, you may show yourself and be arrested normally Siryu is planetside, mildly injured, conscious She may have punched someone when they attempted to arrest her Land the ship on the raining planet, central city itself. Traffic controller boards, looks at nivaya “could you sign here please?” Almado tries to look “not you please, this is a free city” Corp has tried to incorporate the planet, have failed “Could you sign?” N: what? “The ship landing. To say that this is your ship.” N: well it is ours “So could you sign?” (this isnt a contract, but it will be signaled out in case we’re wanted. More a check to see if we are a pirate. Odd legalese of the planet (cant sleep in ship if parked)) Nivaya signs “Welcome to nsuoba. Is there anywhere you wish to go, if you lack signal for some reason?” Al: we dont lack signal “Good my job is done” leaves Miku and co goes to the studio Odd looking building, not quite a studio but it is labeled clearly on the map as such
The Dredge Al: ripley open the door youre the first fan here. I wont charge you! Drying room bc of the rain
Dive bar, dwarven gentleman Korrim Vale “You’re not supposed to be here!” M: SORRY WE’RE LATE Al: we got hung up “Are you here to stock the shelves…?” Al: here for the show “This is a bar. This is a non-live music bar. We had to tear out the karaoke machine with the sailors.” Al: we were supposed to meet arroyo “My boss? He’s dead. Gutless pig got what was coming to him.” Al: there will be a performance. “Theres no one here but me and you.” Almado checking texts with Maikeru “Youre not allowed back there, send me the files.” He disappears for a bit, comes back “I should offload this before the cops come. Would you be interested in buying any cocaine by chance?” “Do try to ignore everything else back here.” guns, ammo, sniper rifle, payphone (the pin is correct, this is supposed to be a venue but the picture is entirely different)) “Hes a fan of the old world.” hands over a dollar bill with coke on it Ripley gets miku’s signature “Would you like any of the hard money? I took the credits out of the safes.” “Take as much as you want. We ran out of toilet paper weeks ago. Ive been using this for less savory business.” Al: so arroyo “The bastard. Worked for aetherion. Youre just working the job. You wouldnt be here if you werent working it.” Al: gotta do what you gotta do “Its a shit company. I should know, family comes from there.” Al: the company’s not bad, pretty good gig “Well, he wanted to open up the planet. Probably why he got murked.” Al: any idea? I heard it was a cultivator “No? Pilot. Pahtra.” Hands over a datapad, shows she was at the scene of the crime with a gun 26: reasonable to be nervous when people are to be murdered Al: i havent been able to contact my manager, means im next “Youre next?” Al: yeah for promotion Al: 26 another bump on me 26: please call me the 26 laws of power Al: we have a murder to solve 26: we supposed we can leverage our understanding of the universe to leverage such matters Al: it would be a karmically good thing to solve a murder, yes? 26: itd aid in our heavenly tribulation, yes! Al: hey where’d you get that coke “IDK. same place he gets his weapons.” Most of the weapons are incendiary “I wouldnt open that one. Theres currently security on the other side. Itll shoot even me. Probably his personal stash.” Electronic and normal lock 6 bots explode, combat
Invisible creature (Ayla) who throws xep around
“Cmon, mommy and daddy want you nivaya. It’s time to go home.” Al: are you just here for the kid? “Yeah ill take him and leave.” N: do you think now is the time for me to be immobilized? “Its fine, ill protect you. I just need to bring you back and if you suffer a bit on the way it’s fine” N: are they here?? “No, they have better things to do than chase after a (smth) son” Woman doesnt move like a typical elf Restrains nivaya Al: nivaya is a contracted employee of the aetherion corporation. This WILL be reported N: im in the middle of a very important research project. Are they trying to get in the way of my research? “IDK” N: i thought they wanted me to pursue this “IDK. they just want you back alive.” N: could we all go? Im sure my parents would love to meet all my friends “Theyre a bad influence.” N: ill go without struggle! “Youre barely struggling” N: if they cant support me, ill just kill myself “Here, i’ll make sure i cant” points gun at hands R: if you move, ill shoot him in the head “Go ahead and try. You dont have it in you. I could threaten to shoot everyone else in the room and you still wouldnt shoot him.” Xep, gun to nivaya’s head: this is a person who would rather die than be in captivity. She drops the leash She walks out and waits, gun still to the back of the head of 26 26: we dont enjoy guns at the back of our brain “No one does jackass.” Combat ends There was so much cocaine and personal weapons and a cracked open safe Stuff is missing, datasticks and the like were stolen from the safe Guy who died was trying to turn the area into a monopoly, only parts he doesnt own are public sector parts Owns his own vineyards, (sailing) ports, has a real concert hall, sports arenas. All on the up and up beyond having to engage in some shady business The white angels emerge victorious once more

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 3
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 2
Next: Session 4
Thorne, The Dredge
Dwarf Korrim Vale shows up with 2 giant bottles of vodka Hes gonna light up
He says that we are gonna be used as witnesses to Siryu doing this “Im gonna go delete security footage.” Al: how much insurance?
“Itll just go to his family, not me.” Al: tell you what, we’ll look around and decide just how much “Im just gonna go destroy the security footage and you think about it”
Ayla “we dont need to do that. Nivaya can just go back to their parents” (Nivaya's Mom, Nivaya's Dad)
“It would kill you too, and youre too much of an asset you could work for me, we could split the pay. Im sure Aetherion Corporation would love to have an in with a royal family. An iconoclast.” What?????? AS: how much are you being paid to retrieve nivaya?
“Credits? 50k. And an in with a meeting with the Camacho Family.” N: isnt there something we could work out? We help you, you help us out by letting me go?
“I work with the Hynarion Circle.”
Iconoclast are religious family that are scholars that go against the norm to create evolution in the empire, whatever the major party is they are trained to oppose it. Perma devils advocate. Argue in political sphere all go to nice colleges Circle = Shrub Mob, druid mafia Their leader has arranged with things that are impossible to arrange with, doing biodiversity before space travel was common. Dirt and plants if you blow them up, they help the ecosystem, incredibly hostile to people who hop on them without proper clearance. Shrub mob has somehow gotten that clearance “So. why not go back to mom and pa?” N: you mentioned you owe the hynarion circle, could we help?
(Theyre looking with an in with the Concord of Aedryn. You could very much help with that) “Listen. Youre not gonna escape me. You can disguise yourself as much as you want and i’ll still find you. Youre going around with 2 neon blue haired… people?” Al: im marked as equipment Xep: oh same “Then you understand this is just a job, i have to make a living out of it. Im just gonna follow you around, and should the guard drop, then i’ll get you. Ive already found the ones who are willing to kill you.” “Do you think the aetherion corp will like the news of the assassination of an embassy leader’s child.” (xep is playing minesweeper and has a gun to nivaya’s head)
Lights flicker, tv turns on, shows a bit of Kiliv-VI with the egg Phones go off with salacious ads and porn It is entirely possible we had a phantom message in that closet we opened. Those bots jammed signals until they were dead
(ads about The Serenade) During the disappearance, many board members went missing and were lost. This was later created by the great uplifting that shows that people can always go up higher than they were. She looks down at her own phone “Ill leave you alone for now. Youre free to go over, the plants will whisper to me, and the fish.” Xep: birds? “I’ve never seen the birds.” (this world is 0.1% too heavy for birds) N: oh ok. Uh. lets go ASPER sees an injured dog Heals it 26: GREETINGS MORTAL WE ARE THE 26 ALWS OF POWER “I know jackass. Your companion is much kinder.” 26: what should we call you? “Ayla.” 26: travelling companions. We have determined that this dog is the bounty hunter. Miku maps lead us to the right place, approach a governmental building Gov building Approach the clerk, veskian, has tusk Asper registers as friend to visit siryu Through a speaker, make contact with her Smiles “ive finally been arrested for something I didn’t do” A: that is not as reassuring as one would hope “Then evidence will come up that i didn’t do it. That’s what ur god believes right? A: what happened? We went to the dredge “I went to find somewhere to get a drink with people like me. Instead i found a stage with a murdered body and the police had been called as soon as i arrived. I attempted to (and i swear) figure out what was wrong and my gun went off on its own A: how does that happen? “Idk, a policeman tackled me right after. They tased me and pepper sprayed me 5 times A: that’s so cruel. Are you alright now? Beyond being contained? “That’s a lot to go beyond but no immediate danger. Trial is slated for 1 revolution or 60 days A: I shall do my best to ensure that nothing comes of this. I believe that there is a bigger conspiracy at hand Cameras and people all around us. No weapons or implements
“If there’s a conspiracy I know one that could tell u about it. One Velu Shineleaf A: velu shineleaf? “A halfling, one of the moon people.” Come from a humanoid moon A: I will do my best to try and find out what this velu shineleaf might know. Is there anything that I can do while ur in there and im out here? “Find evidence to free me, investigate the stage maybe? A: where is this stage? I understand there’s a bar but there’s no stage “Well i tried to go to the bar and wound up at the stage
A: maybe if we go to the bar we’ll wind up at the stage? Well I will do my best to find out the truth. May aeryn-vox guide me. And if i find anything i’ll come back as soon as possibly Time is up and both are pulled away. We can come back tomorrow for 5 more minutes Ayla shows up with a car “Nivaya would you like a ride to not be in the rain?” N: no im good Walking, the car slowly follows Cars behind her the whole time, holding up traffic
Heading to the stage Incredibly drunk and less than reputable people stuck outside, confused Entire area has already been recorded Stage is right there, you arent allowed to use it before the murder has been solved or it was cleared Cops here to stop people from going in, we’re allowed to go past, we’re the people on the venue ticket Al: whos in charge here?
“That would be the Kalo (Kalo Cop).” Weird aquatic man floating staring down “He was murdered yesterday.” 26: greetings we are the 26 laws of power “You are the one that is friend of siryu?” “That person you travel with is friend, murder, stage owner.” Al: yeah idc abt her, it wont affect my impartiality M: HIII!! “You are much more likeable than the other one.” M: ill take it as a compliment! “Not big compliment.” M: what happened here? “Siryu seems to have murdered the owner. Corporate dispute.” M: motive? “It does seem that siryu had voucher from aetherion corp so they could take over certain assets. One death voucher for aetherion.” (way to ensure smaller companies dont become part of the whole, let little wars break out to let the overall higher ups keep control) M: how long ago was she given the voucher? “Does not have date. She may have also killed another. One tech worker known by aetherion. Thrown into ocean. Body never recovered.” 26: what was their name? M: the ocean. Wow!
“Anongies. And one android Y493. M: how did the murder happen? “This one? Gunshot. Many. twice in back of head.” “He was facing towards back. 2 bullets missing from siryu.” “No footage. Siryu master hacker. Incompetence easy to fake.” 26: there seems to be no reason for this to have happened “Why here during murder?” 26: we believe siryu had a similar problem. When attempting to input the address of this location in a mapping software, it brought up the address of a dive bar known as the dredge. To arrive here, we had to input the address of dive bar. M: can we help with the investigation? Pleeease “Investigative rights. But speak of it no one. And accept that siryu may be murderer.” Looking around Office with a contract that just needs 2 signatures Ask xep to forgery Almado signs it, thumb print Could record entire videos here after for 2 whole days Personal computer, dont seem security related Various documents, various transactions most are above the board, some are not This is dual authenticated. Banking system hosted offworld, you can add copies cannot remove. Kinda like the blockchain Somehow, a few transactions are missing. Notes on the local computer are personal notes abt things hes agreed to sell. Removed, requires a master hacker or someone at all locations that was able to delete all of them at once in a coordinated effort
Would have to be within system, most likely Kiliv-vi or Voya Level of skill achievable by humanoid? Lvl 20 tho or a 0 day kind of hack (built into the system) Safe has been opened, police tape on it, uncloseable Taken everything from the safe as evidence (asper knows that siryu’s gun had a targeting system that would limit the kickback. Would still be hard to hack) Need 2 days to clear their gun with the courts Almado breaks into a room, aetherion corp property damage 2 computers, security guard booth Large screen that shows all the cameras in the area Missing footage exactly around the time of the murder Fantastic job At one point, able to see slightly not fully scrubbed. Able to see the outline of a copaxi man (sentient coral reef), walking away during one of the cuts. Enough that if it were being hacked really fast, wouldve been missed We download it rq Ripley grabs the cop He looks “copaxi. They live here, yes. Near ocean. But all is ocean.” Xep: around time of murder “Oh. anything else?” Al: someone tried to remove them Xep: we think. The level of soficistation has the level of hacks would make them galaxy known. Maybe that is not known. “Good hacker not known to galaxy, good hacker known to few.” Xep: this is approaching the limit of capability. It involved hacking into a banking system. And a gun. “Not good. Serious business.” Xep: someone at that level would “Push back the trial then. 2 years? (120 days)” “We’ll do request. Copaxi not enough to go on, plenty here.” 26: is the afact that they are missing from all footage except this one suspicious “Yes, but i cannot arrest ever copaxi that i see.” “Computer underwater do not work so good.” “Many live on shore to use computer, but some have vacuum tube.” Xep: if you had a lot, would it be a noticeable amount of vaccuum tubes. “Yes, but at that point, easier to live on land, no?” Xep: perhaps more comfortable underwater “Maybe,” Al: miku. I need you to tell that cop that it is very important for us to see the world like the victim did so you can get on that goddamn stage. I need you on that stage for 15 seconds. 1 picture. Holoshop can do the rest. M: do you mind if i stand on the stage to feel what the man felt before he died? “Of course” (internet was found not created. Credits are tiny computers. All planets had some form of credits of some density on them. Small cloud computing hardware, innately valuable) Puts a hologram of the dead guy The lividity seems fresh but the wound is old. Blood kept pumping despite him already being dead. Hey whats with this “We considered it a glitch with the system.” Almado phone call
Mr Maikeru Sukkoto is in another system Al: mr sakodol, things are going wrong. I recruited some interns. I got some decent photos, but the concert might not happen. I need insurance, stat. Going to Velu Shineleaf Hes an infomation broker, if you kill one your secrets will be leaked Hes simply here bc he likes the local liquor that is brewed here. He was a big shot in the aedryn but holds no love there Ayla doesnt follow us in N: do you want to come inside? “No.” Approach halfling man, sitting behind desk. Stops playing video game “Might i help you?” R: whatcha playing (first person shooter, but when he disconnects, everyone pauses) “Could i offer you anything? Cigar? Liquor?” M: i dont think i can have that “Of course, you want more cocaine, almado?” Al: yeah. “Im willing to work with you if youre going to work with me. What are you here for? The murder, or the stalkin’, nivaya?” N: not the stalking “Shes a real bitch, but she means well. Or is it about the ship?” N: the ship? “The unregistered one.” “How might i help yall?” As: we came at the advice of siryu “Lovely lady As: i believe so “Shame about the accusation, especially since it’s false As: i’m glad u believe that “At least 20% false, 60% true but I’m a dreamer As: i don’t think those numbers are true “Do you have numbers to back it up? As: no “Then 40 and 60 it’ll be E: Showing him the Copaxi “this might change your outlook “That is someone that is around the time of the murder. Few hours before the murder at the earliest. He appeared at a few meetings following that. Not the murderer, maybe an accomplace. Siryu knows a few. I might be able to find out who that is” A: what do you want in return? “I have some performers that went missing. I could do with finding them, hopefully today. You have a ship? A: we do, do you think we could find them within a day? “If you try ur hardest i think u could find it within urself to find them in a day Miku: we’ll try our best! “I have their last known location and what they look like. Is that sufficient? A: it should be “1 question if found, 2 if getting info should they perish, none if killed for 2nd question.” M: contact info? “Do not call me. Meet me in person. Info online is able to be stolen. Information real life, well, theyd have to beat you up in an alley.” Al: speaking of contact info, (to xep) whats your comm id? Xep: you dont want to be in my phone contacts when they find this. I will give you my number, but if you text me, if they find this phone, they’ll find yours. “Hopefully thisll clear up some of your questions, some of mine, we’ll keep this on the down low.” 26: we would find this agreeable “Even the one that worships that talkative bitch in the stars? As: do you mean me or someone else? “You’re the one that worships the goddess who cares about freedom of information right? As: I am still coming to terms with how I face the world. I do not know if I can agree to this arrangement. “Well, youll come back, see how you feel when you get the paycheck. There is no cash, only credit.” “You could take that ship, say i sent you, if you want to abandon siryu, you can. Ayla wont bother you. Her master wont be pleased if she interrupts something for me.” “Permanent breather from her if you leave nivaya and leave.” Go to spaceship One of workers looks, “im sorry this ship doesnt have a name. Do you know what it is?”
The Blue Angel
Oh Kalervo Turred is still here “I have good news! I dont know how i know it. You have been forgiven for your crime!” “The dreams?” Do you always have these dreams?? “No!” (he does seem to have bumped his hand, it didnt scab, but splintered, and then healed up.) “Its a good thing no?” Its good to be forgiven? “Forgiveness is good. Ill tell it to my dream. Is forgiveness paramount to vengeance?” As: why do you ask such questions? “Im trying to figure it out. Ive lived my entire life in that area.” M: miku believes that everyone deserves a 2nd chance Al: in a non-financial way. Wait i need that 2nd chance. Capitalism always gives 2nd chances
N: you mentioned that you were doing research on the ship for Zaera Allhaven, could you tell me more? “About evolution of course. Its all vague to me now. I remember back then we were doing research on evolution chains on how beings became sentient.” N: any progress? “I have. But of course she took it. It is her right.” N: on this ship? “No, ive been experiencing things, enjoying things. Ive recently discovered that there are ways to find companions in this world.” “Do you have trouble with a companion, nivaya?” N: so. More about your research. Do you have a family? “I was born there, i was adopted when i was quite young by m’lady.” “No one remembers much about their birth.” (26 remembers their birth, birthed from the brain) N: she told you to come here and experience things? “Yes” N: what did she say “To live my life a little, gave me a sum of credits, i did stuff, i learned many things, and i came back here because thats what im supposed to do.” N: are you to be with us? “If you’ll have me.” (drops something under nivayas sheets)
(its a book titled “Playing the Game - How to Drive Women Wild”) Al: did she give you a comm unit? “Of course.” Al: how many credits? “Not that many.” Al: ballpark? “30k? Xep: how many did you start with? “Before i met those nice ladies? 200k.” Al: never spend more than 1k in one sitting. Ok kid? “They charged me 10k per lady.” Al: youre still standing? “Of course, why wouldnt i be?” As: what did you learn there? “They gave me kisses, as adults do.” (we look at our bank Almado: Truth Miku: Missing Xep: Scene ASPER: Voyage 26: Oceans Nivaya: wont say Xep tries to hack in, it should be simpler but is an infinite void as theyre sucked across time and space. Back into reality. Similar to the circuitry Xep: the fuck is wrong with your phone? Ripley: Sacrifice) Flying, rainbow on the oceans below, prism-like effect Unique geometric shapes, starships that didnt survive landing that fell below Continue to myriad of jungles that make the greenery of planet, land Find signal flares where the last group left, even if their comms unit broke Takes a little bit Crash investigators wave and smile at us “why are you here?” Not cops, these are his men “Found the ship.” Al: heres the plan. Miku. (sets up a chair for her) 26: we were passed by velu shineleaf to find your location. “You found us. Can we go home? There is much to report.” 26: we heard there were 3 of you. “One fell into the ocean.” (they believe this to be the ocean, and not just a pond. It appears to have a bottom and salty bc of the land, but isnt the ocean.) Xep: what are you looking for when getting back to the city? “Booze and sex.” Xep: that bar you go to, whats the name?
“Sexico-6.” (theres no sexico 6 on the planet) (we know the guy whos been to the brothel. Nivaya texts him abt the name of it. He went to the starlace)
Al: have you been to The Starlace? “We like booze and women, like you.” (only ASPER can roll: they both seem to have what seems to be blood around the mouth slits of their breathing apparatus. Something crawled into their corpses and posessed their bodies. They want us to bring them back to civilization. One completely wiped it clean, one only partially.) Xep gets a sneaky pic “Why do you need photography?” Xep: waht are you guys “People who want to go home.” Xep: you are possessing corpses. I do need to know why before letting you on the ship “Circle of life. Had to do it.” Xep: are you some sort of creature that lives in others? “Yes.” Xep: did you kill them? “Not relevant. We found them.” Xep: how often do you need new corpses? “Often to propagate.” “Make if need.” Xep: that does have the connotation that it is something you enjoy doing “Do you enjoy killing? Do you enjoy fucking?” N: what did kill them? “Circumstance kill all. Search this area, unlucky, we in area first. Trap, kill. We lay. One fall into deep reach, cannot reach, cannot breathe salt.” Xep: did you make the trap? “Does not matter. They are dead.” Xep: what was the trap? “Trap was simple. Shot through head. Spike.” Xep: through the ship? Or they got out? “They not part of ship. Ship part of them. Too old to eat. Too old to take. Came here, ate trap, be thankful.” “Trap spectacular. Kill without blood. Soul ripped from body. Not from trap.” Xep: what did you do with it? “See soul escape body. They scream. Nothing we can do but take body. Only wish for more. Would it not bring comfort to see loved ones moving around as if alive?” “You would not care, ripley, to have a loved one
“No name is ripley. Necrophiliac ripley. Wish could fuck other. Bad situation. Monster to us.”
R: no i just miss him???? I dont want to see him animated like a weird thing??? (might be reading akashic record, cntrl+f grief)
Aedrynic Al: we’re not taking you back Points their guns at almado Combat:
Threllopex
Kassa-Raell

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 4
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 3
Next: Session 5
Nsuoba Asper swims down to find the 3rd guy Couple things here, cables, alongside someone that wasnt killed by the creatures unless they somehow had lasers. They were killed by electrical burns, laser shot through her stomach that caused her to fall into the then electrified water Water makes it hard to see 1 credits box that is currently in tact, emergency fund for such ships Pull her and the box up Slap her onto the muddy shore, go get the money Woman seems to be very dead but not bloated, they died within a day or so More worms in the trees They were attempting to take the thruster to power the ship, succeeded briefly before one yanked out the power
Take the bodies over to the ship, dipping them in water first
Kalervo Turred seems to be listening to something on the radio Some sort of old timey music, almost entranced Gives short answers We’re outside of signal range for most radio waves Odd static to it We record a 5 minute video Their ship is across the beach Not a spaceship, motorized vessel for sailing the ocean, bobbing up and down in the water 15ft off the shore Fresh paint, entire thing is very unweathered They likely arent actually crash inspectors, actually local gang members who painted ship recently to go to islands off limit to the public Board the ship Sound of the bilgepumps churning away down below Oddly humble, the lot of them did drink on the way in, still fresh Ship has a few small components, took out the area where youd keep multiple people Only 3 would fit on this thing, able to carry their stuff Has 4 cryogenic cells in the back Well loved, but well maintained Ship has power, turns the radio on. Nothing but silence and static Tune it for faint sounds of radio station as the sounds of good morning jingle, nowhere near the old timey tunes from our ship No identifiable info outside of fake ids alongside department number that you should call should you arrest them No notable things, but changes of clothing left on the ship Bring the ship back to our own
Radio, DJ Hoth, seems to be gone Open up the credits box About 700 credits inside Box did have standard internal flare if someone unauthorized tried to open The things didnt speak languages, dug into the brain to figure out the languag If there are 2 of them, they figure out how to speak properly. Takes 8ish before it is able to speak Woman has been dead for about a day, probably less Xep hacks into their phones 1 has a how to connect generator to ship Other has diagram on how to disable ship defense systems Buried deep in phone, hasnt been opened since 4 days ago Back to the clearing The man that was supposed to disable it while the ship was off forgot to nivaya disables the turrets (5 of them) Power up the ship, 1 turret shoots at us Ship begins a little jingle
Advertising ship for The Serenade
Person its registered to is “Greying Twilight" Pseudonym, used by authors or spies Various flight logs, it crashed and then kept burning Water should be fresh water but it is salt Asper swims down again Fish is seen, size of a quarter crack that goes underneath the island Turn their radio on to old timey tunes Not the same model radio we have No belongings, not even candy wrappers Either ideal of a boyscout, or had no need for such thing Possible for ships to be autopiloted Lots of medpacks and propiarty software and schematics of the serenade Software is what velu wanted Red for the Serenade, yellow for others Asper copies down the software and schematics Back to the ship, hes still listening to the radio Turning on the ship turns off the radio Did u enjoy the music? “It was lovely.” N: where did you find it? “On the radio.” N: did you turn it on? “It turned on by itself.” N: what have you been up to? “I fell asleep a bit. I had some dreams” N: what did you dream about? “There were these women, right? Much like the house of hope i went to. But larger than me. And looking down upon me.” N: did they do anything? “They ran from me, in the fields, a rotund circular thing fell on me. With eyestalks.” Describes a poker chip (bug looking at people from the serenade crash?) Rest of the flight is uneventful Hear the cracking of one of the flay worms as it is turned into ice Dwarven man looks at us “Youre back. Sign here?” @ nivaya (see a dog in the yard hiding underneath another ship)
Go to Velu Shineleaf in Thorne He is waiting for us, just woken up, he typically goes to work at night “Now what i might do for you? Did you do what i needed?” N: we took care of it. There were some unexpected issues. “Bodies on the ship?”
“If they find bodies while youre on the ship, nivaya will go to his parents (Nivaya's Mom, Nivaya's Dad), xep will get executed, asper is connected to a murderer, and ripley cant pay for the bail.” “Dont worry, theyll be back there. And if i find anything from the info you got, youll be compensated handsomely.” Text kalervo to leave and join us for lunch Should i let the men on the ship? Theyre already in Yes that is fine “What do you need info on? The murder?” That would be agreeable “Standard rate for this info would be about 1000 credits” “Ill tell you what he was selling the murder victim. Ill give you 1 for free. Ill tell you how to find the base, idk where it is, they move frequently, and i can tell you where anyone might be assuming they are the murderers. Know you might want the evidence before you go in, and they arent the negotiating type.” Who is it?
“The man youre supposed to meet. The murder victim Arroyo Cemsor. Hes into some shady business. Im sure youre aware, but you dont know how deep it goes.” Hes angered someone?
“Last one went to Kiliv-VI, found some info, i oftered to buy it and he was murdered the day after. Idk what, or who, but he did find some juicy info and promised itd make me the richest person. The only request was that i didnt give it to the Concord of Aedryn but did it in accordance to the Aetherion Corporation.” (the murder victim may have been the one who burned the info in the egg)
“The man wanted to be a small info broker, but im not a man of many morals im a man of some morals, i believe that Hollow Stars is the way it should be. The systems decide what is right for the systems.” X: i dont have an opinion “You should come up with one, youve been alive for 3 days, my mama spanked me 3 days into my life and i did.” X: if we had info about what he was doing there is that anything “Based on what he was researching, i believe its part of the serenade/a piece.” X: where it is? “That would be worth it.” X: i will let you know he burned away some of the tracking info “Then hes a true professional” X: so you understand the value of the info youre buying before we transact. X: people who want to keep it under wraps killed him? “I doubt it. I believe the person who killed him wanted exclusive access to the info. If they wanted to keep it under wraps, this place wouldve been bombed” (data sticks taken from the safe) X: how do we find the base?
“Well. im glad you ask. Now there is this one group, the Hynarion Circle that has integrated itself with the base. It’s Elasalor Thara, shes working. She happens to have a dog, the dog wont go off planet. She wants nivaya. The dog wants nivaya. And i just say, let nivaya swallow a little smth smth to let out a signal, the dog wont be smart enough to know about it, follow said signal to where it goes.” X: what makes you think they are responsible?
“They have been dealing with a lot, theres a question how they found out. They worked closely, and then suddenly withdrew from the city entirely. Except Ayla who just got back. Shes a bitch, but shes a loyal.” Connections to her? “She would kill me if i told you about it. This is a deep question.”
X: someone swapped the location of his bar and his venue. What benefit would it have?
“To the murder? None. but itd make sure that Siryu would be in the right place, maybe they didnt change back.” X: frame siryu? “Idk why. Shes a wonderful smuggler. She was here to pick up 1 android floating in space.” X: she did not make the pickup. Do you know who i work for? “That is a deep question. They have an assassination robot. If they have 1, id go to venture they have 4 more that dont ask questions.” “My understanding, they are gone from the city but not from the planet. I assure you, they have the means to my end.” X: do you know how long i have til someone gets on my ass? “That is under siryu. Shes being questioned for the murders.” (xep killed 2 people)
X: what do you know about Zaera Allhaven? “Allhaven is a missnomer. She uh, my understanding is she likes to collect bodies, the people i send out like to retrieve bodies. She sometimes buys them. I believe in capitalism. I believe in the free trade market. They believe in everything they want. No one was doing anything with those bodies.” X: who else might be amenable to an android with 0 public exposure performing at their venue “I dont believe theres any place in this world for a performer who cannot sing.”
(he doesnt like miku’s song on ripleys fucked up phone and the local Infosphere doesnt have info on here)
“I know that persons (copaxi) sibling went missing on the serenade. Im afraid the Otad Gang may have gotten to them.” Otad Gang?
“Organization. Ill use your last one for this, i do believe they were behind the murder. My understanding is, they found one of the war ships from when aetherion and Solara Imperium took over the planet, they took it and turned into a floating roaming base of theirs. The guns do not work outside of the anti-air guns.” X: can we take ur mens boat? “Contractors, and if it survives, ill buy it off you for 300 credits.” As: need an expert “I could arrange this. How would you pay?” “Now happen to say, you infiltrate a very illusive to me gang and get back alive, that would serve as proper payment. If you happen, and no offense, you seem liek the type to get a finger trigger. If you take the boat, id be able to cover up said murder in attempt to cover up siryus maybe murder, i could take the boat and the information, and youd get off scott free.” X: anyone in particular you want off the boat? “Not really. I like ayla, but if she falls into the water, that’s fine.” “The man youre lookin to me, the copaxi, hes not part of the gang. But i believe he has a friend there. He lives in the city if youd like to talk to him first before you turn yourself in.” “Ayla is pretty amicable, despite words ive called her. Loyal, that one.” “Id cry (if she fell in), but id be find.” X: have we met before He wont answer The copaxis friend is a mechanic, in a warehouse “He does, however, have a few guns, tried to learn his siblings art, but he has failed. So now he grows plants works on various guns and automobile. The guns make the money. Should you help him, im sure hed upgrade any sort of gun youd ask him to.” He shakes all of our hands Nivaya talks to him alone N: how do you find someone who cannot be found? “I need a name, a place, a something.”
N: someone from Ksate. Thats all i have for now “Well then. Ill look into it for you. When i have an answer, youll have a price.” X: Nivaya what was the label on your bank transaction Rain on hardlight sounds like a giant breaking through a sheet metal barrier Nivaya avoiding the question X: ill shoot ripley in the knees N: whats the problem? X: do you need me to repeat the question N: my parents taught me not share bank details Xep shoots ripleys knee N: why do you need to know? X: youre ignoring the question to talk to ripley R: you didnt even tell me :( X: we are going on an operation that requires trust X: we wont ask you for what you just paid for, we are asking for that last word that we are missing R: i thought you trusted me, man N: i trust you more than them asper removes nivaya from the bond R, in lashunta: then tell me R: gimme a minute. Im not trying to hold this necessarily Xep starts counting down R: it is…. xep has done this before to someone. Looks up at the roofs, sees the rain falling in an odd pattern, someone is pointing a gun, ready in case we do anything too hasty. The person is invisible. The rain gives away their silhouette. R: maybe im a little too trusting, but i trust them. So like, be mad all you want, if its necessary, im telling them. I trust them. I trust ASPER, especially. N: will it suffice if ripley knows? As: how necessary is it? R: not as scary or necessary as mine. asper readds nivaya to the bond We go get lunch He has so many appetizers its really unnerving “Youre here! Just in time!” “Appetizers are not the meal.” X: have you ordered the meal? “No, ive been eating appetizers, its what you eat before lunch. I consider you friends. Can i make love to you? (goes in for a hug)” (close enough, welcome back phenomaman.) N: lets just have lunch??? X: the phrase make love is typically for reproductive phrases “You dont need to talk.” Menu is various seafoods, fish here are sleek and thin. Sliced open, laid upon grains of rice, then seared. No deep sea impurities He pays for lunch “My lady has procured me infinite funds.” N: did she send more money? “No, but if it goes negative then itll bounce back positive.” (allhaven may be leeching money from the serenade.) His portion comes out to 500 credits Write down some things he might want to see in a city if its your first day on earth. Enriching places to explore Head towards the copaxi's friend Fairly nice warehouse Lights inside are warm/floresence, also floral smell Creates for the first time, actual petrichor, despite constant rain Xep knows the smell of faint rot, 1 day old corpse and petrol 2 robots hovering around, immediately turn hostile Advanced weapons Xep almost cums from seeing such an easy kill (canon via zack bc neuron pathways were rewired) Nivaya gets shot and feels something come to him, but isnt sure what Ayla heals nivaya The copaxi is dead in the cage, shot by the drones Locked themself in here to avoid a grisly scene Cameras in here not looking in here or any movement, creating odd geometrical shape Some are following for all truth, something outside is telling them to ignore it. Will not exit unless given outside command at outside terminal or they are given sentience Cameras are proto humans almost, but ram is too short to allow actual breakthroughs in theology Copaxi given last rites, when they die they are given to the sea Ripley notices that this person, while desperate to find sibling, didnt do overt criminal acts. No power has monopoly, that everyone must relatively trade info freely, no power was stronger than the other. Because of that, they were killed. No allegiance By the same expert hacker, most info on the computer is gone Just the basics remain, enough to satisfy the police. Very impersonal, all of it. Still have wallet, various symbols, thing sibling sent of the serenade. In front of their id
Shalvex Aruun Postcard “Remember: youre my family when i win it big!” Carry the body through the sewers, let them go to the sea. Let them go for the last time ASPER Hears: “This will be my home” from silent voice, body twitching like a snake would Nivaya: “The geometry of my home is shifting, and has gone with my death.” Another being is staring at us, from before the water rapids, ayla stares down at nivaya “Arent you tired from running?” N: does now look like the time. “No, but i’m tired of waiting.” “Could you sleep and then come with me? Ill offer 1 last night of freedom. Meet me at your ship, and i’ll drive you back home.” N: alright, thank you. Sleep, the soft rain is pleasant for everyone but ripley Gentle tickle on the skin. Is nice. Reminds us that we’re here. Against all odds, we exist. Meet with ayla
Hands ripley a number for Camacho Family “They should answer you for this. But understand, i am doing what i need to do.” R: i understand, youre doing your job “Im doing it to ensure i have a place here.” R: i dont like it, but i understand “You two want a last moment. Ill close my eyes for the next 30 seconds, dont attack, my nose and ears are much better than my eyes.” Ripley hugs: dont go where i cant follow N: ill see you as soon as i can She opens up the car door for nivaya, long old fashioned car He gets in, she takes off. Rolls down her window, begins smoking Smoke mixes with the rain “I know what i means to have abusive parents, but yours are much better than mine.” N: should i go back? “Its the best way for all of us.” N: i disagree “I get rich, you get to go as a noble. If you want, you can follow my path.” N: your path? “I killed my parents. After they broke my leg.” N: ill keep that in mind “Of course. Maybe youll awaken one day. Be able to change yourself, as it were. Cigarette? N: yeah, ill take one “Do you think this is where life wouldve brought you?” N: i couldnt have predicted this at any time in my life. What about you? “I was born here. I never got to leave it. I was found on the beach by my parents.” N: anything before that? “I was young. Too young, and then they took me in. its kinda how it goes here.” N: i understand. “Just a beach-washed dog.” N: i think youre very strong. “And he did too. I was put to work.”
N: father? “Yeah, adoptive.
