Idk if you have blood relation, but im sure you consider them your parents” N: in a way “Youll make your way, and return.” N: making your way in the circle? “Ill be able to leave when youre turned in. i dreamed of the stars. I was able to change form, but i wasnt able to change where im from. I had to pay for what i did.” N: what you did with your parents? “I killed them, yes. They did break it, and it never healed. Its from when i first transformed.” N: im sorry it never healed in the way you wouldve hoped. “I had no hope, i had to learn anger. I killed on the first thing.” N: hope now? “I had hope back then, but i didnt know of the world back then” N: it can be cruel “It can be. Its where i learned cruelty.” Darker forest, the others are a few miles behind, guided by asper “I transformed and i learned cruelty.” N: i like you. If we ever cross paths again, just know, id like us to be friends. “We’ll see if we can be friends.” “I think we could, but we dont have enough in common. Youre a noble son, and im someone found on a beach. Im someone i wasnt, ive transformed, and youve only grown older. I dont think you understand what its like to lose what you used to be. Do you understand what it means to learn cruelty?” N: i understand better than you “I dont think you do.” N: we’ll have to see “When i was born, i was found on the beach. One of my forelegs. My father broke. I had to transform to learn cruelty. I grew to look like him. I was covered in his blood. I cant go back to how i was for more than a few minutes at a time.” (there is an easy question here: did she become a dog to kill her own dad?) N: were you a dog to kill your dad? “No, i had to learn cruelty. Dogs dont know it. I had to become like this.” N: i know… youve suffered a lot in your life. I know you struggle with the form youre in right now. I… just… want you to know that i think your ability to change, your ability to become who you want to become, is beautiful. “I dont have that ability. Im stuck like him, only a woman, but i have the advantage than my own ways. Elf ears are so much longer than dog ears.” N: ayla. I imagine im going to be cooped up for a long time after this. Could we exchange contact information? “Yes, but i imagine ill change my phone number soon after. I’ll be free.” N: new number? Its up to you Gives current number She fiddles with the radio, turning to old tunes. Not the same song as before

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 5
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 4
Next: Session 6
Thorne, Nsuoba Asper signs for the car we’re renting Truck, follow nivaya a few miles behind to destination
Ayla drives slowly bc its rainy Drives from sun rise to sun set Nivaya gets there first Hard to go over 30mph before hydroplaning Ayla rolls up windows “Stay” reaches her hand under the wheel, undoes wires for the battery Takes out keys and wires Walks into a baylike contraption, steel wall, no roof, hear sound of ship being slapped with waves Opens up one of the doors, walks on in Hear gun shots, goes silent again Nivaya looking around, then gunshot toward him. Car lurches forward a few feet, then turns off again Wires she disconnected went to the batteries, the car Shouldnt be moving Nivaya trying to get to the building, peeks in Slum city built into a wharf, neon lights still on, smell of food, some fresh some slightly burnt. No sound or movement, except for a ship rocked by waves Xep and co arrive Everyone jumps out of the car Fuck the car gets blown up These are not traditional soldiers, these are military software units to guard the road for military installation. They probably have maybe 3 more bullets let Scurry inside the building
Otad Base (Otad Gang) Ayla is inside writhing on the ground Combat Ayla was shot from the ship itself
Elasalor Thara breaths out and fires Druid using a sniper Navigational spellshape, allows them to use jetpack and increase reach of spell while casting at the same time Lashunta, body heavily frayed with blood replaced with blackened sludge Other one, shirren, has fused slightly with surroundings Things seem autonomous, have Some tactics despite being mindless. Having basic orders given to them Sniper fighting against something in its neck, fires Old timey Music
K'zamko - second sniper Can use Original is trying to resist something The thing in ayla is absorbing healing given to her, but would require a lot of surgery Nature as a shapechanger is helping her resist Xep jumps down in the ship, there are burnt out super computers, something was doing heavy computations so much so that the processors burnt out Main guns on the ship IM SO STRESSED OUT Xep blows up k’zamko and he smiles, holding out his arms. Eviscerates him Asper kills elasalor In the ship: Various people molded with circuitry, some use pistons as lungs. Hopefully unthinking Ayla is still transforming Xep finds a stasis pod for her See large geometric objects under the water Some thought, tho never reported on this planet, hollowed water planet Certain gas giants, signatures of geometric shapes at center = ppl living there, or lost civilizations. Shouldnt be latter bc of gravity + water This looks to be a normal gang prior, incredibly functional until a few days ago. Whatever happened, happened rapidly. Around the same time that they were killed Food still remains, moldy but low sign of decomp All of the computers are completely wiped, perfectly so 1 thing that cant be hacked, written down things
Asper is able to find 1 Cortan Hulack, appears to be almost a quartermaster for the gang, lack of guns except body Able to match pictures of him to one of the ppl shot, large veskian person
Ledger talks of income, including a statement of massive windfall from K'zamko, shirren psychic, was able to make lucrative money (wetwork), he get into contact w person offering job for assassination through psychic networks. Last bit mentions the amt of money was staggering, they were going to disperse it amongst the ppl as is tradition for the network Not quite credits, nanotech that looks like credits Fused to the nerve systems slowly took over their nervous system, started discarding part of the flesh that was irrelevant. Only 20 bodies found, 10 androids in the crew and none are present (never went after us androids) Inside has communications array set up, though, again, most has been removed
Pointed back toward aetherion space, at least through the sector, would also pass through aedryn space first (but edge) 2 options, 1: they have an insider in aetherion tech, 2: they are looking for aetherion research, using this as a way to ping aetherion signal This thing doubles as a signal jammer Able to see odd barrels filled with nanite gel, stasis gel meant for containing nanites or mechanic disassembly and transportation Used by aetherion special ops etc, used to cool down and contain stuff 5 empty ones Degrades when left in the rain, 2 days at this point it would go away The amount on the bodies is missing Ayla has a huge chunk of the gel in her There is none in elasalor Signal jammer turned off, 2 things happen when turned off immediately, almado is shocked Messages from manager, pictures of his cat “what? Call me” pictures of his cat again Al: can talk now, whats up? Miku almado thinking abt the music Not popular at all
Sounded very similar to the song of the original aetherion corp founder, Abrunda Aetherforge, when he brought his ppl to space. From his humble company came the corporation Not quite right, the notes are off and there are parts of it missing, song itself meant to have parts of silence. This is an accompanying piece to fill in the silence of the original song Play both at the same time, sparks come from the computers nearby. Doesnt destroy them, shuts down and restart including phones Only to things that the thing that did this touched. Aylas car wont do it, just keep churning We have miku + ripley recreate it The tech doesnt flicker We play the recordings again The tech still doesn’t flicker Go to the other side, miku sings to the constructs Nothing happens Almado combines the 2 songs and makes it his ringtone

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 6
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 5
Next: Session 7
Nsuoba Oh no we have new words in our bank accounts Duplicates - miku Home - almado Innovations -26 Stagnation - xep Amnesia - asper Missing - ripley Cattle - nivaya Xep tries to hack into nivaya’s bank again Doesnt get it These wouldve came before the signal jammer went down, local file and data file match The original words wouldve been when we found the crashed ship No malware was found On miku’s, only approved numbers can be added, definitely monitored (why are we all able to be added onto miku’s phone?)
Almado basically has ransomware to use his phone via Aetherion Corporation
Taking the boat back to Thorne Slowly but surely make our way back down range, slow goings We all throw up except ripley Met by coast guards, intercept us and board “We’ll be taking this from here. You take one of the smaller vessel” Not actual coast guard, wouldve made their tradeoff/bribe more inconspicuous We take a few things off, “youre keeping a survivor?” X: shes a comrade of ours M: a friend! X: who was infected “Infected?” X: oh yeah be careful Pilot us back onto actual shore, remove holograms to reveal vessel is just a fishing vessel
Left in a warehouse by the sea with ayla’s ‘coffin’ Put her in a con-x
Go to Velu Shineleaf, more than delighted to see us Has various cups in front “drink of choice, anything you want?”
Almado gets a Dr. Vesk + whiskey “Aunt Jermima” /j Carbonated ‘beef’ broth Nivaya gets an ale “No i dont rightfully know what youve been through, but you all have been worse for wear. You wouldnt mind talking about it over drink?” X: we’d like to exchange it for goods and services “Smart learner! Probably the smartest in your group, no offense 26” 26: we are called the 26 laws of power “Of course.” X: a mutual acquaintance was heavily injured in a- we had to put her in a stasis pod bc we dont have the ability to cure her injury “Injured by what” X: thats what we wanted to talk about “Cryogenic pods on a backup battery. Best talk quick.” X: as last time youre amenable to freebies “Of course, bonus but not freebies” “Im no miracle worker, i have no clericism or mysticism in my bones.” “Theres some issues, i cant cure waht i dont know, and my men didnt know what they were looking at.”
X: the Otad Gang completed an assassination and were paid a large sum of credits that they split amongst themselves, these werent legit credits, they were… biologic agents? They take over the hosts body and fill their veins with oil. Cause them to act as some kind of hive mind collective that wishes to attack and propagate itself. They explode. The entire Otad Base was wiped out by the activations. The first thing when ayla and nivaya entered, inserted a large number of credit material into her and left her out to lure us in. any healing we apply goes to the parasite machine and not her. N: it didn’t look like it was placed, more like the creature crawled into her itself As: similar to what happened to nivaya. Creatures tried to attack u “Are u infected Nivaya?. N: No “That is a pickle indeed. Magical in nature or technological in nature? Mix of both? Mix of both AS: it did absorb the magic i tried to put inside of Ayla “Do u know how big it is or how it transfers itself AS: goes from host to host. By injury if not touch “If it’s host to host then u fought babies Al: tried to attack the downed people “Could’ve just been credits, stuff can happen to them Based on Otad log, it’s about 4-5 hours after credits were distributed for things to happen Theres a larger time frame bc it wouldve been the time ppl went to sleep “That is a large time frame, unfortunately these sorts of things are not unheard of. But. i’ll look into it. Anything else?” As: didnt affect androids “I understand if the creature was expanding, they would’ve been put into the ocean. Androids may be made of nanite and steel, they arent heartless, but this thing might be.” X: druid did attempt to resist, but did ask to get mercy killed “Losin’ battle.” X: ayla wasnt immediately taken over “Quite a lot, i imagine i could offer 1500 and that car that went missing under aspers name.” “Are you plannin to seek after this thing or go your own way?” Al: i’ve got some interest in it “If it was the baby, where’s the mother?” “We could try to find- they likely arent planet, and they likely sent a signal. You could track down anything sent through the remembrance gates. Anything valuable wouldve been searched. We’ll just follow and see where it goes, and i’ll follow it along. In return, your ship is missing a remembrance engine, it flew normally. I could retrofit it if you have time to spare.” “The murder is quite simple, in return for this, i wont prove her innocence, but they wont have evidence. I can make sure shes free to go for the next few years, they could do a warrant if they want her.” (basically free for 3 earth years) “I have 2 requests. 1 is that you use me as the primary information broker. I’ll leverage all the local ones when you get there and i get there. Ill be lagging behind a week or so, initially.” As: the 2nd? “Don’t fuck this shit up for me, okay? If you fuck it up, i’ll make sure your ship suffers a nasty explosion during take off at some point” Al: if we continue to succeed, we’ll come back to negotiations “I plan to negotiate every step of the way. Every step of the way, i’ll be there. I’ll make sure that no one learns anything.” Al: familiar with standard aetherion contact protocols? “Ill fill out all the proper paperwork. A few charitable donations to your organization. Youll file those away properly legallike?” X: working in an official capacity? “Youre not working for me, we’re working together. I’m an independent actor. There is… i’ll get back to you with info as time goes on, dont you worry. Ill need a few days to figure out what exactly we’re tracking here.” His plan is to follow the nanite paste thatd have to be marked between transist. Downtime - 4 days Xep is making malware to change ring tones to miku
Miku + almado stage @ The Mirralight Good Apple and Get ‘Em! Miku gets 200 followers
In aetherion white and blue, Kaito (X4170)????
Bodyguard (Rethan Coil) shakes almado’s hand, he gets tazed bc kaito has 100 followers Al: if you keep up the good work, you can maybe open for us one day It appears that kaito, doesnt really register whats going on “congrats!” M: thank you!! This was a classic upstage attempt, trying to make sure that the lower down stay underneath. The goal was, miku failing to get a concert hall, he was gonna go here to take the concert hall from miku M: we should collab sometime! Kaito and miku share contact info Bodyguard “guard the front during the concert?” Al: you take the back “The back is fine.” Xep has a rifle trained on the back Asper is taking a bad video of miku 26 is speeding up the dance floor 26 to kaito: GREETINGS MORTAL, WE ARE THE 26 LAWS OF POWER Kaito does Not understand what is going on, has never met a contemplative before, doesnt respond 26: you may reply by thinking! Terrified “Do you hear all my thoughts?” 26: we can only hear the thoughts you communicate to us! “Hello 26 laws of power???” 26: do you feel upset that miku is a more popular performer than you? “Is this a trial by fate?” 26: we are merely curious “Are you god?” 26: no we are floating several feet to your left “You’re a… handsome… brain?” 26: you have certainly tried to complement us. We also believe that being kind to you will sew good karma to us. We will do our best to assist Kaito is so overstimulated Rethan smoking, “id shoot kaito in the back of the head if i could.” he doesnt get shocked Al: id never allow company property to get damaged He puts out a cigarette on almado’s shock collar Al: so. Hows this workin? “These things are very heat sensitive.” Al: good to remember, but patches come out often! Can i bum one! :D Al: shes not always that bad but god shes annoying Going through an inordinate amount of cigarettes Al: any peculiarities with yours? “This ones been fine. The first one had issues.” Al: im still on my first, but shes strangely proficient at firearms. Not fantastic, but better than she should be. Cool under fire. “My kaito broke one of his first fans arms. Had to put the poor bastard down.” Al: we’re in smth bigger than we think. But if we stick with it, only profit will follow “I look forward to being part of the disposal squad.” Al: im going as high as i can. I’ll remember this convo, and the hand you gave me “Gotta look out for yourself, and if you need help decommissioning, i know where to fire.” Miku sizing up kaito He was released abt 3 years ago, then disappeared recently when he got his first concert halls, just finally got back M: any fun fans? A few fans that got handsy, interested in touching the new toy. He was released roughly the same time as her Kaito, the Winter Star
Asper goes visit siryu “Lets get outta here.” Idk if i can go with you “I shouldnt say planet side, but i can drift around planets` “I was supposed to intercept someone and smuggle him off planet AS: i think I met who u meant. E-Xep-Ro? “Is he still paying? It was supposed to be a smuggling job AS: i can bring u to them but i’m not sure they know what’s going on “Idk, i have a planet coordinate I was supposed to bring them to
AS: 26 and I met them on Kiliv-VI. Unfortunately the escape pod crashed there “We only have 1 escape pod and u seem fine. Are u ok? AS: yes we’re good Seems relieved and then remembers how much the pod cost AS: i can bring u to xep. Based on what I know they would be interested in hearing about this payment and coordinates Siryu will go to meet with Xep “Sorry I normally don’t meet clients here. Do u still need to be smuggled off planet? X: I don’t know. Presumably not “Well u paid for 1 smuggle job. That part was prepaid AS: was it them or a 3rd party Siryu shows bank account and it’s an untraceable payment, no details or signature. Credit amount seems right. About 1k for transport off planet X: if I did do it I don’t remember. I get mission instructions and that’s about it. “Do u want to go back? X: i don’t have strong opinions. This is presumably more fun. “I’m not gonna kidnap u at gunpoint. I just bring people places they may not be welcome X: do u know where we were going? “We were supposed to get them in space. Not uncommon to send the coords mid-travel so they can’t be fully tracked AS: any way to still get the coords? “maybe?? Not the most technically savvy person
Can keep the rusty curiosity going but the computers are outside her expertise X: how do u get in contact with my employer “They contact me. I don’t get in contact back. They know, idk how but they do. They pay me as we go If we occasionally recreate the conditions (on the rusty curiosity in a cryo-chamber) that might be enough If hes not on the ship then yk, they’ll do whatever they do As: we do have someone in stasis rn, its ill advised to remove her from stasis “U know the rusty curiosity isn’t a medical platform AS: i’m aware but it’s not the first time this stuff has happened “I’ll do it. But if any of the plants are alive and they get sick then it’s on ur head As: theoretically it shouldn’t occur as long as she remains in stasis “It works on solar, we can stay in orbit for a while She gets ayla Ripley is able to see a creature wearing a miku hat, sentient purple orb creature Orb bought merch, a few pins and 1 miku themed hat Al: thats a nice hat, want it signed? 30 credits Speaks orbian Al: 26 can you psychically understand it?? It casts translate onto itself and miku Miku now knows orbian and it understands common “Sign travel with you?” “Space home for me. No need ship” M: where you from? “Space.” M: were you at the concert? “Disguised as strobe light.” M: thanks for coming! Why are you wanting to travel? “Follow, many people, learn, leave.” M: learn what? “Ooo eee ooo” M: idk if i can have fans on the space craft. How many credits do u have? “No money. Can.” (astral mist) Almado comes up w a contract M:” im sure its fine if u dont have a family Al: thats standard, if you dont have a family, theyll find the people youre closest to and execute them It just wants to absorb society It cant sign the contract
Miku names it Bubbles Its gonna travel with us Go back to velu Mentions that he installed remembrance drive The one that he gave us is unmarked, but does have a 5 day cool Bad news: not able to track them all Badder news: tehy were marked as biologic
Good: went to Stross Delta, could find the ship there “If you dont mind meeting up with him” “Tall, lanky, a bit dark, acts like its his first day, bc it might be. Inquisitive guy, asks a lot of questions, but does pay attention.” X: wdym it might be his first day? “Part of an experimental plan of suppressing soldier memories, wanted war to feel like a vidgame, it fried his brain a little.” N: name?
“Voz Ricander. He lives on the major side, lives on the grav belt region. Most of the local law should know where he is, he stays far away from the power generating sections.” As: why? “The biomechanical parts in him. He doesnt want them to shut off, but doesnt want them to fire up. Best to be somewhere there. He finds peace between the jumps.” As: why is he a good contact? “Hes a good contact for me, offers plenty and takes very little. Sharper than he needs to be, has a uh. Jame vu lookout to the world.”
“It will be in the sasani system, itll be in the Aedryn space, if you have any outstanding debts you shouldnt go. Your good friend nivaya- i’d advise a little caution there.” Al: the boy wont sign anything “Thats all i ask. Hes only 2 jumps away from his family at that point.” N: unfortunately yes 26: i can do the signings “Anyone looking out for you?” 26: as far as we know, no one is searching for us, or has interest “Im interested in you, i look forward to interacting with you”
26: us or our cultivation? “I dont fancy myself a cultivator, ill just get a heart replacement when it goes out. Youre a smart… fella. Youre good at cooperation. Remember my 2nd rule, 26 laws of power?” 26: of course we remember. We have no intention of making any critical errors Almado sending a message to his boss
Kalervo Turred is on the ship
In Remembrance Streams, you can use sigils to go through ships
First trip takes us to Auver System, has mega cities with great earth-like habitats Aedryn space Its from the larger parts of the war, at the prescipice to the border of 4 different factions Siryu “go ahead, get into your cryochamber”
All receive the next destination is Sasani System System made out of 2s, dual starsystem, dual planet orbit 1 major 1 minor
Stross Delta Major bigger, Stross Delta Minor has half the surface area, not in tidal lock with each other Every 3 hours the gravity meaningfully changes

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 7
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 6
Next: Session 8
Sasani System Approach oddly shaped planets, tidally locked band from space (spot where they go over each other is devoid of greenery), through which, massive train tracks Energized train = perpetual motion machine = battery generators Inside is very guarded, several frigates that would stop ppl from trying to blow it up Platforms meet the train, train doesnt stop
Along the tracks is Voz Ricander
Kaa Disposal Plant Knock on the door and theres no response Sound of machine crunching on something Our ship is the only one here but the signal is here Door is unlocked, no one within Able to notice small drops of blood, not from a gunshot, but maybe a knife that seems to go either towards one of the operator posts or away from it Some very small thoughts happening, low brain waves, and oddly in one of the trash bags, more thoughts Trash bag is full of metal parts Almado tries to lift the trash bag, but slips and gets stuck on the conveyor belt We are all trying to get him off Almado rips it, metal falls to the ground, parts of robotics also fll Computer chip, similar to ds cartridge, meant to be slotted into smth, emitting small thoughts Part of the neural interface that would belong to a high value pilot, this one is part of a soldiering program, this is hyper vigilance Guy is slumped behind wall, impromptu brain surgery Akin to being comatose rn 26: how can we awaken you mortal? “Insert some chips, be selective.” This one is his desensitation chip, to make him calm We need 3-4 to make him active, he lost abt 7 We send 26 to go find the others, goopy ghost rises out of acid Combat Irradiated plant reaches to 26 laws of power Desensitation, hypervigilance, Loyalty, compartmentalization, survivor’s guilt, pragmatism, and discipline/control Survivor’s guilt = mostly try to save others, issue is he does it over himself Pragmatism = will start doing things other cant decisively, will treat other people as assets, makes quick decisions Loyalty = unshakable devotion to us, but also his prev held motivations, will occasionally override ethics or common sense Compartmentalization = functions under extreme stress without breaking down, will not process emotions til afterwards but will be bad Discipline/control = great self regulation, endurance, good aptitude at things, will stick to his dogma he’s been following with, will struggle with peaceful/civilian situations Loyalty, Compartmentalization, Pragmatism, Discipline/Control Elven man w odd mechanical arms and legs turns around, small bow “Thank you” As: u ok? “A dispute with my friend, but he’s free now. There’s no reason to pursue it further.” Al: free? Dead? “No, he has collected the bounty on me.” As: i dont understand the friendship then “It is important amongst friends. Ik why he did it, but it’s for the best.” “Are you the ones im supposed to be meeting about finding an array on the planet?” Yeah “Is it on the planet or the system?” 26: we are unsure, we merely know it is in this system “Before my old employers get here, we should leave.” Al: ship? “I had a ship, but i believe my old companion stole it.” Al: you can ride with us “I can fly if you need.” 26: you may be a better pilot than us
To the blue angel Looks at the cultivators “your garb is a bit odd. What sect do you follow from?”
26: Lián Huā Sect “What” 26: long time ago “What are their beliefs?” 26: well. Have you ever heard of the 26 laws of power? “That is your name is it not?”
26: that is our cultivation technique “Cultivator?”
“I’d probably not follow down that path, lest that result in the death of one of us. I follow the Solara Imperium.” To asper “are you also striving for immortality?” As: im not striving for it but it may happen 26: should our goal end in an extended lifespan “We’re not directly conflicting right now, but I merely warn you that you wander toward sin” “What do you know of the object we’re looking for, i understand it is a form of matrix array?” “You should seek to rectify the infinite lifespan if you succeed.” “Has anyone’s dao been fated to succeed for forever?” 26: we do not know, even our own sect was not fated to survive for eternity. One has to experience life and the tribulations that come with it “Does one actually experience the tribulations of life if they reach immortality? 26: yeah
As: the thing we are looking for was marked as biological for transportation. Attaches to host bodies like a parasite “Forgive my secrecy, but i have seen the footage of what you fought at the wharf. How familiar are you with the things that are not quite of our world? From far far beyond.” Al: not alot
“Are you familiar with the Nullus Verge?”
(during almado’s time in training, he went on the Dark Infosphere. A little bit of treason against corporation. Able to create Remembrance Streams, these things are often not announced. Distress signal sent out, but concord of aedryn announced it as mechanical failure. Thus remembrance stream was never created.)
“I encountered smth while investigating, it took 10 years to investigate it, we discovered smth known as the Reimap. A group of people that come from another universe. As were our orders, we killed them all.” (they are functionally immortal. Die only when smth happens to them.)
“Many were kind to answer our questions, recreated thru visuals what happened. We found smth known as Hekath on it. A bug that eats dna and integrates it into it’s own body. They mostly eat and integrate upon themselves. Their tech is the opposite of what i saw at that wharf. Since they are purely biological, the creature youre fighting is purely mechanical. Furthermore, it seems to have split itself, which isnt common in biologics, but common in programs.” As: it seemed to not want to seek out the androids in the wharf. Maybe it can only eat organics “It may only seek out organics bc it hates them. I as an elf can eat many things, but i cant eat other elves or humans lest i get sick. There is the possibility that if it, like the hekath, try to eat each other, they gain very little. May lose individuality.” (eat an android = may lose part of itself = better off killing them) “I hope we have a good working relationship.”
Writes on the glass a simple message, “avoid your phones if you don’t want Velu to hear.” “I probably know where it is, but you wont like it. The one that that provides what the automaton needs. The train generator. The train is guarded by 4 frigates, one personally hovering atop.” 26: we hope we don’t have to fight through a colony ship of zombies “That would be too noticeable, the creature is small. It was able to fit in a barrel. Turning people into a zombie would stop it from being there indefinitely.” Al: infecting everywhere it stops
“Those batteries are loaded onto frigates and sent deeper into aedryn space.” 26: wherever the batteries end up they can spread from there “Yes, but idk if they can. The zombies were harrowing, but it had its entirety there.” (could stay dormant, could affect ppl subtly.) Al: steering civilization instead of outright controlling it “Ik a way onto the train but u may not like it.” “We simply have to find one of the massive colony batteries, hollow it out, label it for refill. Load you all in, some stay behind to distract for scanning process, load you on to get past security.” 26: where do we get a colony battery? “Idk, but it’s a start.” As: any contacts where we might get such a battery? “Ik a few colonies i helped, but alas they have returned such things as the battery is a downpayment, they collect taxes once its returned.” X: how much are they worth in credits? “In credits? One that couldnt be identified? 20,000 maybe.” X: we dont have that
“I say we land for a bit, go to… Irovox, unless you have a better destination? It is the largest city on the major.” Irovox Notably has an open parking bay we can use. Yayyyy. Do unfortunately have to bolt the ship to the ground tho bc the ship will float away otherwise Do manage to land, one person, halfling “Are you here for the competition?” Huh? “Your brain friend. The contemplative.” 26: which competition?
“A competition for contemplatives in meditation being held by Corvin Rusic (head of Aetherion Corporation R&D)” Al: YOU HAVE TO WIN Halfling is struggling against the gravity, clipboard trying to fly away “Entering?” 26: yes “Name?” 26: the 26 laws of power (writes it as “26LP) 26: are you able to explain any other contemplatives that may be present? “Sure.” 26: which ones? Who? “I’m not reading all of these off. There are over 200.”
26 goes to look at it, halfling is clearly upset but 26 sees ZLD on the list 26: we appreciate your time and assistance “YEAH.” stomps away 26: almado i would not get your hopes up Al: ILL GET YOU AS MUCH COKE AS YOU NEED
Kalervo Turred “you dont need cocaine, you need adderall.” 26: we are not sure if you are aware, but have any of you heard of zebufara’s last doctrine. (prodigy, help with medical science, very far along based on contemplative age) R: theyre your rival??? Do they know this???? 26: we have met R: ok ive met many people. I dont know some of them exist bc ive run into them on the street 26: they are well regarded by society. Rather skilled at everything. 26: it pains us greatly to strive for 2nd place Voz “I’m going to gather information about the battery if you dont mind”
Goes with Siryu, dwarfs ppl in the party at abt 7ft Walk into the city, sapient purple orb follows
Bubbles “is that friend?”
Points at a bar, floating vocaloid head on a contemplative yellow head (male of the twins, CV02-2) Al: not friend, associate. 26 i might need assistance. This one is. Uh. (gestures) 26: we can go with you “Mmm. we are happy to see you.” “Mmm. do not smoke, it is against company policy. We talk telepathically, the shock has yet to go off.”
CV02-1 guard is a shabohad Al: how’s the promotional tour? “Good. we thought the twins was the best place for the Twins to have their first album.” (FUCK MIKU DOESNT HAVE AN ALBUM YET) “We’ve been congratulated, the manager will be down here soon.” Al: he’s here??? “He will be here in 2 days.” Al: if you dont mind me, (pulls out phone, theyre at 3k followers vs mikus 200). Is yours the major? “Neither of us are the major. We work together.” “You are charming. Why arent you doing better for yourself?” Al: we made some long term investments that will turn out “Are they here to replace your job?” “The head provides ample cushion and stopping others from poking at the brain.” 26: we have trained our bodies to strengthen ourself “Ive yet to strengthen my body, it is just our mind.” 26: we’ve done both “We wish to be part of an R&D program that expands entertainment.” 26: this involves wearing a large head and guarding a bar? “We do not think that this is any more embarrassing than any other mortal job.” 26: we’re the 26 laws of power
“We’re The Ohm Between Moments.” 26: a pleasure to make your acquaintance Al: can you secure our communications “Theyre always secure” Al: just you and me buddy Al: the 26 laws of power. You think they have what it takes to be in the business “They are a beautiful brain. But not the most beautiful.” Al: entering the competition? “Of course, ive already paid the company for my time off.” Al: you help the 26 laws of power place well, and miku will open for you’ “That would be dishonorable no?” Al: its just good business (agrees to it)
Shobhad is Thrakkun-Mar (AKA The Spider) that got reassigned do to Atrocities

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 8
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 7
Next: Session 9
Irovox
Hey Kalervo Turred u have so much money do u wanna buy us a hotel room xoxo
Interrupt convo between him and Voz Ricander, but he def will do it for us <3 Voz kindly explaining, “theyre gay, just in a disaster relationship” turred is confused abt homosexuality between 2 men Hes talking abt not seeming to be gay himself to us
Gets us a stay at the Caudian Hotel, luxury hotel
The Dorian is the fanciest, but is fully booked out by the ppl near the head of r&d Almado wants to hire a ghost writer for miku Ppl are willing to write basic beats for 10 credits, full song is 100 creds Buys 5 songs, FLAWLESS songs First song is 7 mins long, nice, has full arc to it 26 researching the competition Basic is levitating resonance bell under brain while under a mason anchor, increase sensitivity as time keeps going At one point a torture device, been repurposed for such competitions If u think, the bell begins to ring Nivaya buying formulas
The Bydar - chemist shop
Mungi, veskan man “how can i help you?” N: we’re looking for some formulas for serene and theatrical mutagen “Can i see some ID? We need both IDs” He holds out a scanner, scans, hears a beeping from the computer “Could you stay right there, i’ll get it.” Hes about to hit a panic button 26: wait a second. We mean you no harm 26: we simply wish to purchase these formulae and will be on our way “We cant sell these to you.” 26: perhaps we take our companion out of the picture “Please dont murder him in our shop” 26: perhaps they leave and you are merely selling to us “Transaction will be flagged, we won’t be selling to anyone who was in the store when it was scanned.” 26: we can leave then, theres no need for a scene. If we make no purchases and cause no harm, there’s no need for the authorities to be called Lets them leave Almado able to find street vendors, do charge 50% more Goes instead to chemist “Um. do you need it from daruvan tradition or thaad tradition?” “What form of alchemy do you practice?” “We can only sell to registered alchemical chemists.” Al: mmm. Its too close to the concert. Leaves Buys from the street vendors, so only commons Xep looking in depth for being bugged + decrypting Next 20 hours Asper looking into info that might help for the train heist
Going w siryu and ripley Buying tickets for the back of the train She’ll pay for it herself, give tourist tickets for the back of the train, many ppl like to ride the loop of the train This isnt a viable way to get onto the train, as security expect smth stupid on this angle Feel for acceleration, see a battery get loaded, once they pass thru electrical belt, middle area is effectively Van Allen belt like earth Part includes a tour of facilities where batteries are processed She grabs hands, she disappears from the tour, stealth after her Batteries are the size of a room, not able to steal “We can look at how the batteries are supposed to look, see if theres a way to sneak out. The way i see it, you get on with a battery, then you return to your battery and sneak off. Security will be higher if any violence occurs on the train.” “Idk if theres a way to avoid violence on the train.” There were abt 20 armed guards where we were “This is a bit cruel, but i imagine that the outsides have cages meant for the guards so that when they pass by the electric belt they don’t get shocked. You could sabotage them. You only need to leave a small hole and they’d die immediately.” “The best situation is that we wouldnt need to sneak onto a high security train or create a battery. It seems based on their suggestion- or their…. It seems that based on the scan, we’ll need to lead line the battery, while also faking the device that scans.” “We’ve seen who youre submitting to the competition, so we’re looking for alternatives” Looking for any exit She finds one, panel on the side Unbolts 2 of the bolts, one is injured “the other side has no cameras, just unscrew or burst through and escape. Not large enough for a batter to go through, so im sure they wont mind unless theyre on alert.” “I think we should stay on the planet for a minute in case youre caught, a week, so that other people take the blame for you. Theyll be the prime suspects.” “The other thing is we’ll need a battery, small one, theoretically we could fake it, but make sure you keep a battery full so that it keeps the indicator on the outside full to indicate youre to be offloaded.” “If youre to make movement, do it after liftoff. Also your gunshots will be muffled by the vacuum of space.” Xep decrypting Some sneakcrets in xeps secrets channel Able to decrypt
Research on Zebufera's Last Doctrine Able to find equivalent of linkedin page Accomplishments start at paragraph 3 and end paragraph 90 There’s 97 paragraphs of condensed accomplishments, way to follow them throughout, graphic design is a bit overdone Asks to not merely copy, but instead find your own way to incorporate it into ur own life, various links to youtube videos 1st link is 3mil views About basics of meditation, achieve zen state, fly like a contemplative regardless of ancestry The last update to their linkedin was 10 mins before asper looked Charitable donations provided for various people including the way to set up astral tethers to people who happen to be near the take off area of the planets Update appears of them at a school for the disabled, specifically those who cant speak outloud, using powers to let orphans talk to each other for the first time Miku and almado get text messages from manager? He arrives early
Its Mr Maikeru Sukkoto, the actual manager of the Vocaloid Project Lashunta man “Hows it going? Have you broken any arms or legs?” M: not yet! Al: SHES JOKING M: everyone says to break a leg when they go on stage was that not literal Al: we also got a roadie and few interns “Who’s the roadie? Whos the intern?”
Al: BUBBLES M: we found bubbles on a loading dock! Al: its more like he found us, just like you and… your dogs (ping from his phone goes off every few seconds) Al: here are our interns, interns say hello 26: (to almado) refer to us as an intern and we’ll place ur soul into eternal torment X: i love my internship “Are you not an intern, brain man?” 26: we suppose we are “Who wants to be my favorite intern?” R: what would this entail? Al: they all have their own strengths and weaknesses sir i can help you pick one “Why is your lashunta not communicating with me?” Al: nivaya dont be rude N: um i didnt really get practice in that Al: its like when you take in a puppy with 3 legs “Im so sorry, are you disabled?” N: yes. Um. i didnt really want to discuss it in front of everyone “No we’re a family, please.” N: ive never really had the ability to do that “I understand. Not being able to speak is a terrible thing, i once sponsored a fellow help the tongueless orphans speak recently.” 26: zebuferas last doctrine? Looks at phone “yes?” Al: excellence choice “Of course, im sponsoring them for the tournament.” Al: im actually sponsoring- one of the interns is taking part “Oh! Does he fall under me?” Al: yes their victory would be yours too “You get this for me, and youre getting a promotion almado.” Al: i accept sir! “Executive bodyguard. Without a pay increase.” Al: oh. Of course sir i wouldnt dream of it “Where’s the spider? He’s my favorite.” Al: very busy, honestly i- “Have you tried helping out orphans almado?” Al: nivaya is practically an orphan “Many go hugless.” Almado hugs turred and nivaya Al: we’re big fans of expressing our appreciation of each other M: where have u been! U travel to such cool places!
“I was in Chovanaski!” (middle of solarian fleet, heavily religious area)
(hate Aetherion Corporation, someone def tried to get him killed but he did come back) M: are you u coming to the concert? Im opening for the kagamines “Of course!” Turred whisper “are you going to adopt me?” Al: if ur lucky Turred “yes?” “Family doesnt ask family for extra pay! =)” Al: why would they? Theyre family! “Almado have you made introductions to the r&d head? He’s going to be at the concert” Al: thats excellent news, we were hoping to introduce ourselves as the winner of competition, but i guess thats not a bad thing either Stage
The Spider does forceful patdown w all 6 hands
Seem to talk, contemplativ The Ohm Between Moments floats to almado “We have decided not to help you in the competition.” Al: thats a shame, i thought we were like family “We are, and family seeks to make family better. To cheat at a competition would deprive you of the chance to improve.” Al: whatever u could to assist- you sneaky son of a bitch u know i already told him we’re opening (maikeru has ability to hear thoughts, but he turns it off around the spider) “You dont need to respect good business, you need to respect good thinking.” Almado convincing us to have us help miku
Miku making friends w Kagamine Rin and Kagamine Len Rin “of course!” presents a small script “we wrote you a duet for the ending!” Miku accidentally putting the blame on almado about there being a list of songs to open Spider stomping toward almado (“i wasnt expecting the spider to be an enemy yet, give me a second” -zack) Almado and the spider fighting, its so stupid Al: ur doing good u must like doing this “Why” Al: its their first concert and let an upstart get the best, theres no way theyd let you stay in the unit “Would they reassign me if i kill you?” Al: no they- might reassign ur handler, not u Begins texting the omm between moments abt reassignment Xep takes aspers silencer pistol, shoots at the omm between moments Omm “mmm. We are seeing what youre trying to do. Well played.” (26 is doing coke in the bathroom) Miku is playing The Universe is Mine Good Apple Starlight Idol Hello World Music gets shut off, lights turn off as well Gets off the stage Rin and len sing, call miku back for the closer song Miku shines Show closes, gains followers Competition Wonderful sound of various minds talking for 26, nauseating for everyone else Omm between moments is disqualified for having a head piece 26 is nervous, tries to think, synapses don’t fire correctly A contemplative goes to a think mic zubeferas last doctrine “our fellow contemplatives. It’s a beautiful day where we get to strive for higher powers and ascension. As many know, i am a cultivator. And do believe in ascending the gate. In only 2 years of study, ive reached the gate of mortal, and yet, looking down at the numerous of u, i am nervous. Truly, each and everyone of us stands a chance at winning the competition.” Speaks of their accomplishments, is gonna send half the money to the orphans Ominous feeling, oddly, zld is picked first for the competition The 2nd raffle goes thru, the balls jump unnaturally, rattling, before 26’s ball falls down “The 26 laws of power. Its our pleasure to meet with you again.” ("I watched four hours of Obama speeches" -zack) 26: its a pleasure to meet you again zebufera’s last doctrine.
“We are pleased! How goes your path of cultivation? Have the 26 laws of power brought any insight?” 26: we are improving quite well, perhaps not at the same pace as yourself “We think we understand.” (new fold on brain, makes them quite handsome) 26: we would wish u good luck, but we doubt u will need it 26: mmm. Shall we begin? “We shall begin when the referee begins, theres no reason we cannot talk” 26: it appears we are somewhat impatient “That is something you must work on the 26 laws of power” 26: indeed, this is a flaw in our personality we wish to address “You’ve gotten stronger since we last met the 26 laws of power, we understand ur diligent, but there is much work to be done” 26: theres always work to be done we believe our path is neverending “Would u like us to send it to ur companions, theyre in the bleachers. This conversation, its no strain to reach our thoughts so far” (200ft) 26: quite a distance, we see no need to concern others with this conversation “Is it not thru the strength of ur companions that u have achieved growth, perhaps u achieve good with others of not contemplative, u always struggled with academic integrity” (meant to be kind) 26: perhaps there is merit to this suggestion, however, we also believe that the trust and faith of our companions has been placed in us, so we will hold to that. We believe they are trusting us to depend on our own abilities, we will attempt to see this thru “Mmm. what was the name of the founder of ur cultivation path?” (gnomish man has drunkenly wandered in thinking it was a sport event)
26: we were instructed by the remaining will of Elder Quintilarus “Did they havea large following” 26: the remnants of the sect seemed substantial, but it had already fallen “Despite being gone, it mustve been a substantial cultivator of will that u followed” 26: we would agree. Truly his insight into matters of cultivation as well as the ability of his divine will to linger so long left a great impression on us Gym whistle A man, the first elf that we’ve seen here emerges, alongside armed security that puts almado to shame
Corvin Rusic Equivalent of the secretary of defense “It’s my pleasure to present to all of you.” telepathically to entire stadium “The competition that may be able to accept it. We’ve provided cultivation to those who cannot afford time to spend on meditation. I myself have attempted cultivation and failed, but i find the prospect beautiful.” he shows a small demonstration “This will be jarring, but please understand.” gas mask and canister “inside is pure cyanide gas, and bc of it i will be rendered immune.” (this is theoretically smth that could be done, certain cultivators dont need to breathe but vocationally) He puts it on, activates it “wow, cool, good.” from the contemplatives. Roaring applause from contemplatives Gnomish man drunk off of 40 ounce beer starts booing, but oddly immediately falls asleep “We do need the best of the best, adn thats why we’ve gathered u all today. In this first round, we have 2 promising candidates. Zebuferas last doctrine and the 26 laws of power. May ur will show in this small competition.” This thing is Clearly a torture device One last thought from last doctrine “mmm. we wish you good luck on your meditation.” 26: we wish u good luck as well. First round begins, humming noise, only noise available within Guards remain, occasionally one will move, bullets in gun rattle, only noise Some oddities, small faces appear, make will save at TRIPLE DISADVANTAGE? New noise as the elven man holds out a drawing tablet, makes a note to himself Hear the roaring applause of contemplatives Fail, new noise will enter, see deeper into the old man’s eyes, his will is trying to break free but then 26 slams against the wall Machine folds itself apart, seeing inside, the walls are now red Contemplatives “Mmm. failed. Stood no chance. No odds. Expected outcome.” Medical units attend to them (first checking machine for damage) 26: upsetting, but not unexpected unfortunately. Zlb “we expected you to do better than this, you trained very hard these past few days” 26: we expected to do better as well “Rematch if it was a glitch in the system” 26: we would be open to a rematch “We would as well. We wish to best you at your full power.” Corvin gives a thumbs up to approve a rematch, writes again on his tablet 26: should we fail again, we will accept it with grace “We understand, we are willing to wait as long as you want.” 26: perhaps there is a slight deviation in our qi “We shall permit this, assuming we go through proper channels. We wish to talk to mr rusic.” “He will allow it.” 26: that is quite kind. We are very thankful for going thru proper channels, we do not wish to cheat, as it were “There is no cheating in competition, only cheating urself. Great time for true meditation and thoughtlessness. We wish u best of luck.” 26: we wish u luck as well (26 introspection. What manner of force interfered w meditation?
“My sect’s killer hunts you” Al: 26 u ok? Confident? 26: we encountered a disruption, the divine will of our master warned us of Almado offers coke, 26 denies it As: wdym 26: the divine will of our master trained us after the sect fell 26: we saw a vision when attempting to meditate, when we looked further inwards he informed us that our sects killer hunts us (one of the guards up near the r&d head takes note of us, recording device recording us from their armor) Al: this is good, theyre interested 26: we may have to return to our home planet to look for info regarding our sect and its fall Doing it again 1st round goes well, see master again, but puts the thoughts later, but 2nd round it happens again Body feels bulky, and then brain slams against the dodecahedron again “You did well but we feel it was not a… fair competition” 26: another time, another place “It would be our honor to meditate in the future, whenever we find free time, the 26 laws of power” “U do me a great honor as a worthy great opponent. We will find the other contemplatives of no challenge compared to u” 26: we appreciate ur kind words Go back to party 26: strange feeling we encountered M: that was so cool sitting there doing nothing 26: we encountered the same feeling within the 2nd round, we felt a burning sensation and then a feeling as if our body was proportional by typical humanoid standards to our brain. Most unpleasant Guard is still focused, but attention has waned away from us. ZLD wins competition We are sent 100 credits each by ZLD “your share of the winnings” ZLD has an independent phone number, mostly for important people (aetherion corp created vocaloids, but other corps have their own form, itd be unbecoming to not attempt. Have different contracts, but maybe not better)

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 8
Next: Session 10
Irovox
Upon leaving, we are met with Voz Ricander “Found one.” “Good news and bad news. Are you rich?” Noooo
“Then the best option is the one in an abandoned factory by Griffindustries. Its listed as missing, we can say we are retrieving it. Theyd accept it, the issue is the factory contains a lot of toxic sludge and is rumored to be haunted.” More haunted than the trash compactor? “Presumably. Those are things that are regularly expected to be there. Apparently ppl moved away after nightmares began.” “It comes from the most trustworthy of sources: small children who broke into it. They mightve exaggerated some things, but a child probably wouldnt exaggerate a battery.” “The building is located underground. As i’m sure you know, the planet… (points up) if youre underground youre less affected. Most heavy machines reside down there.” “It’s about an hours flight, if you wish.” “I understand if you need a few days. (looks at almado)” No hes fine (he is concussed) Take a day Go to Grffindustries abandoned factory, find elevator shaft Autograppler down Web-covered factory Several large spiders have made their way down here Medical vats set up around here Still active on life support, creatures inside have long since died Smart spider has crawled inside and drained juices, shapechanger mid transformation Ripley touches the glass, touches the web and has to do a will save Sees a dead nivaya floating down a river This creature was subjugated to cybernetic enhancements while body was kept alive despite being braindead Grffindustries doesnt send many ships out
Removed from Aetherion Corporation at one point and defunct Sulfuric acid level of dissolving, falling in isnt insta death but sucks. Specialized chemical baths Miku will Feels odd Feels the emotions of an android slave getting soul blasted Web is invisible until made contact with 26 gets vial of sludge, creature notices them and there are several others under the bridge Thesteron Almado will Feels nothing Memory of being shot in the back of the head, surprisingly doesnt phase him Giant gear stopped in place, safety locks enabled Above says “danger: electricity with safety locks enabled” Miku will Circuits moving in a dicelike machine, small invisible hands of fate bend and electrocute person inside Oh! One of the thinking torture devices Whatever’s inside capture tanks is dead, red light Standard aetherion corp protocol is to burn the info on them Odd almost squid-like creature has 7 appendages, eyes are rotted out outside of one that is an implant Does appear to be an astrazoan Dead from neglect, at some point someone stopped filling the feeding area Almado throws the corpse into the goop 2 of the others have rotting corpses, 1 has a cybernetic voice box Make asper perform some rites Almado will Feeling of being thrown away Door asks for a biometric scan Xep tries but is locked out Xep will Fine Being abandoned by someone they love Open door, robots “SUBMIT TO SCAN” Almado gives id number “1 employee recognized.” Al: the rest are interns “Submitting for scan.” “Stop, test subject among you.” @ nivaya Puts down the vial “I will protect you.” Shoots at nivaya Xep flips phone and shows almado + miku + asper whats there X: that seemed like it’d be relevant Asper will Nothing phases Sees someone dying in a field during basic training, see their credits run out and medics leave them be (where almado attended basic training) Wait these have been our memories? Personal vats Chambers still wellmaintained Valuable test subjects that were removed after closing Magical bobblehead that lets him speak necril and one that makes him appear undead We’re the victim of a dread empathnid If one gets in a place of misery, they spread misery to people around them While young dont discriminate against the type of emotions they eat Not smart, no higher reasoning Go back to battery room Magnetic spider combat Miku sees xep in a blank office, staring at the ceiling, another form of him appears and shoot himself in the temple Ripley finds himself on a nice date with nivaya, attending classes together. He’s never been on these dates Ripley gets blasted with more memories Xeps! There was at one point a point where they had to kill a family. 2 parents and 6 children. Asked to be let go, revealed another model of themselves that then executed them Miku kills the spider Al: theres nothing wrong with killing ppl (BZZT) Battery is easily removed Bring back the battery Voz “this’ll take 3 days to hollow it out safely.” Al: i need a nap Ok guys who got shot in the head R: i got a feeling ik who it is! Dont sound so enthused xep. I. received a memory in my mind of you. Um. fulfilling a job against a family. Parents. 6 kids. Give or take. X: as is my job R: and you asked to be let go. And a new you came in and shot you X: p sure there wasnt more than 1 of me??? R: saw 2 of you
Kalervo Turred fucking it up in the kitchen, microwave smoking “Ive been reading about gay people, here’s my chance” mentally “Haven’t you transformed in the most fundamental manner? Physical creatures transform all the time, but to transform soul across boundaries?” Ripley nivaya lock themselves in w turred R: that was a lot 🙁 N: are you alright? R: i think yeah. I really wanna think abt something else rn R: remember our first date. We went to the observatory on campus? N: yes? R: ive been thinking abt it Turred leaves, passes by miku, ‘casually’ goes to the bathroom N: do you still wanna keep going on this trip? R: i mean. It seems interesting enough. N: we’ve been thru a lot. We can always go back. If this is too much R: no. i’m good. Listen man. How often do you get to be a roadie for ur fave musicians? N: i know i just dont wanna lose you R: u wont N: are u sure? R: yeah, i’m sure N: alright. Do u ever think we’d be on a planet like this? R: uh? N: just a different one
R: its possible. I gotta take u to Kitira some time. N: ur home planet? I could meet ur family R: i think theyd like u. U’d get along swimmingly w my cousins. I have a lot N: i’ve heard R: a lot of cousins. What was turred talking abt? N: ?? R: we walk in, he goes ‘ive been learning abt gay people’ or smth N: idk. Maybe hes exploring his sexuality R: good for him. Does suck abt our phones N: yeah. I dont think the others trust me much after today R: i trust you N: thank you R: well ok. Figure out what we’re doing next. N: time to be in a battery i guess R: yeha. This could kill us N: it could. But i think we’ll be fine as long as we stick together R: yeah. Ok. ready? N: let’s go
Bubbles “is that a cat?” @ ripley M: yeah good job! Al: WHO WAS MICROWAVING FISH AND TIN FOIL IN HERE X: oh yeah btw i have no idea who i’ve killed in the past
Voz approaches “i have a plan for what each of us should do. You all are on the infiltration team ofc, i will be a humble ship captain requesting a battery (notably urs) when u get off the ship. This will bring u into the warehouse where u can escape before they discover you. I’d recommend to throw a grenade into it as you leave. Captain siryu will be able to smuggle you out with a van of some kind. And to get you on, i’ve discovered theres no one more distracting than turred. Simply put, does anyone have an id scanner on them?” “Who would you wish for turred to be? Biometrically.” X: anybody? “As long as you have the way to verify it.” Scans hand, shows up as almado Almado sucking up to turred As: how did u discover this ability? “I took an id scan of all of u to see if you have dna that degrades. U all do, thankfully, for now.” “You all are able to age in some sense.”
(he did a Solara Imperium technique to check us, it proved that turred was blank.) He holds smth up in old elven, which says he is able to age, he ages rapidly. 1 year = 10. He will die in about 7 years Almado flinches Turred “what was that for =)” Al: good memory kid Ripley gets to cuddle turred “Youre holding on longer than almado” R: yeah bc i dont wanna hurt ur feelings “Why would they be hurt” R: idk. Ok im tapping out Vox “as u see hes very distracting, and he has the biometric scans to prove hes whoever. Scan in is scanning, scan out is only for battery. This could work.” Bubbles learns about music videos Bubbles can do 6th rank illusory scene Bubbles doesnt need to breathe Bubbles “do roadies die for the crew?” Miku: nooooo i dont think so. I dont want you to die Voz “try not to cause a ruckus, any bodies u find, throw them out the airlock” Downtime for upgrades Get into the battery (cars we need to go to will be 4, 5, or 6 cars worth of resistance) “You should move whenever the train is in the vanallen belt, which is 1.5 hours”

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:

Next: Session 11
Irovox
Almado texts Maikeru Sukkoto abt finding a ripperdoc Onto the train via battery
Kalervo Turred in the network Mental equivalent of hotmicing He does eventually talk to the one examining our battery “Oh i know that flag. Theres nothing wrong with being gay.” Eventually get loaded in via accelerating platform, hear the cue: train getting locked down behind us Exit the battery There are 3 on the train waiting to be charged, mega batteries Car 1 Hardlight projector guards appear “Which company are you with?” (secret which ones are on the train to prevent this situation. Could probably claim any of the 4 in rotation and then get a small jump on them) Al: charlie We’ve picked wrong, its not charlie lol, alpha bravo or delta Car 2 Spare hologram projectors Tethered to the ground, storage for personal gear for the army Most weapons are gone Patrolling guard looks and waves “Which company are you with?” Al: Bravo “Understood, thank you.” Seems to transform, then thing grabs almado, pulls him outside “They were about to gain sentience, almado.” Uhm Xep feels arm going numb bc going thru electric zone between planets Good news: find the projector Bad news: its in the floorboards Credit covered projector, crystalline Credits of this train are weak to fire, immune to electricity We deal w the battery Miku is closest, hears it “free yourself from the chains”, fades away M: guyyyys :( what am i chained by? Car 3 “Who are you? And why are you wearing an idol’s head?” Al: i thought you were gonna be hardlight. Delta company “Ive never seen you. Who are you?” Al: miku fan? “Not particularly. Heard about music and the light you were doing.” Al: awesome. That makes this easier Richrag to almado “this will project poorly on the company” Rat isnt undead but heals from harm Dont like it, but its the best decision. If the bodies are found, they will shut down the entirety of the train until the killers are found. Could fake records of them not being on the train 20 credits of dubious nature Chuck bodies out, skin begin peeling Car 4 Psuedo gaussian cage Basically open air No thoughts No one notices anything Car 5 Conductor train, if we break in, all hell breaks loose Go back to car 4 We find moving wire Nivaya and ripley fight over whichever going down Xep nonlethally cuts up nivaya See something, a man unmaking him, reaching up from under the area, spreads part of his torso out and then another and nother “I can save you, and you can be yourself.” Machine that frees nivayas, grabs into his chest and unfurls, 2 odd tendrils wrap out Casts dream of home on nivaya, remembers childhood home, book shops, university, its all more simple. He begins to unfurl. 2 limbs hanging out from a chest Xep tries to heal nivaya Nivaya 2 eyes lock on them, stare up at the sky, thinking of memories “Why do you resist?” Nivaya ur on the ground, not sure if ur part of a coma or not, or if the memories are forced into him Electricity quickens it Its SO BIG, GOES UP THE ENTIRETY OF THE 30FT TRAIN? Weakness 5 to fire, immune to electricity There are 3 special abilities 1 secret passive one DONT GET SWALLOWED 3 regular Breath weapon Looks at miku almado “is that your slave?” Al: im not her slave!! “Is she your slave?” Al: no, we’re coworkers To miku “synthetic?” M: yes? “This will hurt. But you will be free.” Miku not glitching, but feels Wrong Its unfortunately already in her. Going to take place in the next day? It does a cone but specifically Avoids ASPER Almado pulls out his phone and plays the jingle. All eyes are on him. Its Chains tighten and heart slows Almado gets the kill. “Why?” “At least i freed her…” dies Credits begin to fall, 6inch wide cube of data, solid hardlight without a projector. Feels oddly ok to hold. Power. Run back to the battery, regular guards posted on either side of the batteries
26 telling bubbles to enact the plan “Guards will let you pass, they are my illusions as stated before.” Get into the battery Miku whats wrong Pupils mis-dialated, occasional twitch amongst shoulder, upon medical examination, occasionally ceases for 1 minute at a time before accelerating forward in mikus
similar to Ayla
1 hour in the battery, eventually driven off by siryu Almado gives coords to siryu, “i know a guy”
Along the way, abt 6 hours, Voz Ricander asks “how long has she been like this?”
“I know someone who could heal this sort of thing. She wont like us. And it wont help miku. Only at source, and only before 2 hours of affliction upon being frozen.”
Asks us what we filled the ship w, it hasnt needed to be filled. Uh oh. Hardlight gacha to get various abilities from ppl we met in our travels Watching over the box Almado Ripley ASPER 26 Xep Nivaya 4 days in transit, closer to 5
2-3 days go from sasani system to Wirnderstreuchen System, then to Istitiver System Xep wants mutagens from nivaya Almado talks to ripley about freaky shit w nivaya Al: i dont think hes who he says he is rip
Voz sails thru various system, will get to Wirnderstreuchen System Power goes off, cube goes missing, it only lasts for half a second Happens in cultivator shift There’s smth the cultivators lack in perception that the other groups had: darkvision. This is when we get hardlight ability Level 4 Xep feels. Something? (suddenly got the understanding of AI, all of their contracts relate to it somehow) ASPER checking on miku
Kernel corruption by the program Clumsy 2, stupified 2, cant ignore it, dc 8 flat check or become off-guard, whenever gain slowed increase value 1, cant decrease it once she reaches 2

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 11
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 10
Next: Session 12 New words Also we’re getting different amts of credits
Ship The Blue Angel Recall knowledges on the box 26 - occultism Discovers that it has a soul, a big one, tho its the size of 3 normal humanoid souls ASPER - religion
These sorts of fragments were in various knowledge vaults, some in shifting caverns of the vaults, Data-Temples Almado - corporate lore This thing seems to generate profit innately. If you hold your phone closer, if u move it away it slowly dips down. If it didnt disappear before u bought something u could buy thing fraudulently Ripley - esoteric lore Hes seen one before, but very alien and no hard connection there. Undeniable feeling that he and others have seen it before, but in a different version
Slowly drift into Aetherion Corporation space Nivaya takes over? Break room w ripley N: talk for a moment? R: yeah R: wtf man N: i… there’s a lot you deserve to know that i havent been telling you. And im sorry. Ive actually been lying for a long time, u dont deserve that. If u let me explain ill tell u the truth R: i’m listening. N: i’m not the real nivaya camacho. I havent been- well ive never been. After he died years ago, i shapeshifted into him and took over his identity. I didnt tell u be i was scared ud rat me out, but as ive grown to know and love u, u wouldnt have done anything. I was a coward, too scared. But im done running. Ask me anything, ill tell you everything right here and now R: when did he die? N: years ago. R: like… N: end of sophomore year, into junior year R: why did you take his identity? N: i. Convinced myself that it was a sense of respect. He was very important to me. I told myself it was bc his life was too short, but i was jealous. He had everything, but he never learned how to eat form the silver spoon. He had no goal that werent forced onto him. I loved him. Love him. But i wanted what he had. He was all i had back then R: who are you?
N: my name is Zmenamir. Im an astrazoan. I spent most of my life on Ksate. Ima scientist. I have goals, things i want to achieve. And im selfish. Im a coward. I understand if you cant accept me, i know its a lot, but u deserve to know the truth. The real truth. R: the entire time we’ve been- whatever this is, has this been you?
N: yes. Nivaya, he… he was my boyfriend. U remember the ex? R: i do N: that was him. Or that was me? I wasnt dealing w the breakup, i was dealing w his death R: ok… N: im really sorry. I cant apologize enough for not being truthful R: do you know my name? N: of course R: whats my name? N: your full name? R: yes N: um.. Archibald beaufort ripley. Ive lied abt myself but i didnt lie abt u. Im sorry it wasnt an act. (quiet) What are you thinking? R: i dont know. N: if… if youd prefer if we didnt speak- R: no i dont think i could handle that N: anything else u want to know? R: how did he die? N: idk. I found him, it looked like an accident, but i- i buried him, i couldnt just leave him like that R: where was that? How did you know him?
N: on campus. You know the Conaldo River? He used to go there to clear his mind, we’d have dates over there. I think he slipped, i hadnt talked to him before that R: do his parents know? N: no. R: good. N: its why i cant go back, theyd kill me R: they dont deserve to know N: its why i cut them off. Idk if he couldve done it. They always fought. I shoudlve told u sooner, i never felt there was a good time R: im not leaving, ive invested too much of my life into you N: good thing? R: yes? Idk? N: im not… nivaya was a good person. He was a great person. He was kind, charismatic, beautiful. Im not those things. Im selfish, a coward, im not as beautiful as he was. I hope that you could accept that. Ive tried to be more like him, i wish iw as more like him, but im still just me R: these last few years ive had with you, with nivaya… i… wondered why he seemed so much more free and willing to do things he mightve not done before. And it- i fell in love with you idiot. And youre not even him… but you are- N: i love you too. If this means anything R: it does. It does. N: if theres anything i can do to make it easier… R: just promise to be more honest in the future? N: no lies R: no lies. N: i trust you R: i trust you too. Id trust you with my life. Ik in my heart you are… you say you are selfish and not a good person, i dont believe that ik theres smth in you that is good. And… i dont understand why u took over, but i do understand why u did it n: ill try to live up to that. Sometimes i regret it. But i… there are only but so many options. As awful as that sounds. If they found him- when they found him. If i buried him, it’d only- his parents didnt like me. I wasnt gonna leave him in the river. R: oh my god. N: if they found out theyd think that i killed him. R: i wouldve also thought that. So that was- yours were your memories i had? N: which? R: when we were in that place with the spiders. I- did you touch the webs? N: no? R: um. I got flashes of… memories that i never had. Flashes that i had of dates w nivaya that ig you had? The first was… him. In the river. N: im sorry. R: it- i dont hate you. I wanna be clear. I understand why u did it even if i dont, but i dont hate u. N: thank you R: i want you to be able tot rust me and the others on the ship. Even tho xep shot me in the knee, i… maybe im an idiot, but i trust them as well. Maybe im too trusting, maybe i need to get hit in the head so i dont put my trust everywhere, but ik that isnt you. R: we need to figure out a way- im not gonna maek you tell them abt everything, but i… we’re stuck with them for a while. And being open with them is the best way to get through this N: youre right. I trust you, and if you trust them, then i can try. My trust hasnt worked out for me in the past, so tis been difficult. You saw that lab. You saw what happens to us. R: i thought u had some fuck shit in your pockets N: no.. just me. To some im just me, and to others im a test subject. Smth to be feared, killed, or worse. So its difficult to put myself in a new position of trust. But i trust you. R: trust me when i say these ppl arent out for your worst interests. Except watch out for almado N: i didnt appreciate the way he handled the body. I couldnt say anything- R: glad i didnt say anything after the test subject thing N: i have one last thing to apologize for and 1 more act of trust for you. First, when we were in that cave, um… with the creatures taking over bodies, im sorry i didnt say anything when they called u a necrophiliac R: oh my god. Thats why???
N: yeah. I didnt mean for them to bring up your dad, i just- couldnt say anything. That mustve been a sensitive subject. R: its fine. Its fine. N: if…. Im not sure to show the rest of the crew yet, but if ud like to see my true form then i can share that w you. R: i need time. But eventually yes Gives nivaya a datachip w an album on it Leave the break room 26 tells asper that they think nivaya is an astrazoan based on what happened on the train 26: nivayaaaa. Greetings N: is smth wrong? 26: we were discussing and pondering, we came to a conclusion wrt to the battle with the credicite N: i see. I have a feeling i know wahts going on 26: are you perhaps an astrazoan? N: yeah… ripley trusts u, so i trust you N: its not an easy thing to tell people about (oftentimes shapechangers have extreme distrust of society) 26: we can see how that would happen. We understand, we have been told that contemplatives are disliked, idk why N: i would appreciate if the 2 didnt mention outside of our crew? It could put me in a bad spot if this was known A: i trust that ur not endangering us by not informing others Nivaya stays silent
Begin to Utsaka, thru aetherion space over the next couple days
There is a connector here to Zeldau System
Asper wants to know if there have been any cases of androids who got a similar affliction like miku, feels a response from past lives “ask turred” Asper goes to find turred, almado follows “You wish to actually speak to me?” As: is that a surprise? “You normally ignore me on the trip!” As: i realized u may know smth abt the affliction hatsune miku has “Ik what uve told me.” As: Please recount it to me
“I know it means the death of an android, a recycling of their life” As: I hadn’t explained that I think He hits his head, down 1 hp Transfers over 1 hp “Yeah that! I can see all of the yous, but they’re all wearing different clothes.” His eyes have odd refractions that dont befit his eyeballs thru the light, he has eyes like a bug. But it reflects like thru different lenses, but one has soulsight. Biological apparatus that is made to mimic truesight As: thats so interesting i didn’t know you could do that “They’re right here As: I can’t see them “They’re you. A continuation of you. As: its the same body but not the same person “Are we not defined by the bodies we inhabit?” A: do you see situations with others in the crew?
“No. There’s the souls that haunt Voz but other than that you’re the one with the most souls A: the souls that haunt voz? “He has only one, you have many A: I do not know what that means much but you do not see anything strange with our crew? “Ask Voz, he knows Holding something back As: I will take your word for it Turns to talk to Voz “You need something Asper? A: are you being haunted? “Naturally, I killed many As: I mean in the literal sense “Naturally, one is bound to stick A: Are you aware of this soul and who it may belong to? Elves have a soul that travels faster than the speed of light when it dies. Possible for a copilot to get stuck to him during a crash Elves are solitary cause if you die near someone you could get stuck “It’s a good friend who doesn’t want to be mentioned. It won’t affect operational efficiency A: i trust you know your skills and limits. If you want to talk i’ll be onboard “Thank you but it won’t be necessary A: i know he’s your friend but if you ever wish to be rid of him I can assist “I think the necessary parts have moved on. All i have left is reminiscent. It’s so easy to forget isn’t it asper? As: yes. I am one who has very few memories of their past “You should be able to last 1-1000 years. Theoretically, 300 years is the max time you’ve been around As: i am unsure how much this body has left “15 minimum, assuming you can endure the strain. After 10 will get hard As: it is my body and i am happy with it for now. I will hold onto it as long as I can “It’s a good body. Well made. But don’t hold onto it for too long.” At some point, voz corners nivaya “Who did you confess to so i can admit it to them?” N: ripley. Asper. 26 “Good. try to hide your dna better next time.” N: i understand. See the dock boys ready to penny and dime us, almado remembers doing this when he was abt 10 Almado wracks his gun, u gotta unload for free or else i’ll report you to aether corp Al: we wont be tipping “Understood…”
Goes quickly from the cargo area, they ask us to move the vehicle to vip section in the MUSE Plaza Almado begs asper to not let him die 26: consider this. A tribulation from the heavens. Should you endure this, you’ll grow stronger, then your path was destined to end here R: have u ever- is this legal? What they do to you? Have u looked at your contract? Al: its against it to look at it. Its all perfectly legal. They had devils look over it. Approach, various ppl approach 3 guards, more armed than almado. They allow almado to pass through Turn to asper “youre out of compliance training” asper didnt complete training Xep tries to forgery, they have to do it as well “Please do it as well.” Xep and asper have to do it for 20 hours :( Others allowed to wait outside, there are glass areas with fish Eventually someone sits alongside “Are you the people who have been travelling alongside cv01?” Yes! 26: greetings. We are the 26 laws of power
“Sasaki Wataru.” “I just want to know if miku has been doing well, i consider most of them my children.” R: why? “I helped create them” R: deadass??? “Deadass, yes.” 26: they have been doing quite well until recently Ripley infodumps excitement, can i get an autograph He gives an autograph, tho looks at the tome while asper and xep are being lectured abt sexual harassment across the galaxies Other room
Miku in frozen coffin w Ayla They quickly grab her out, then seal up ayla “Will you like a complementary disposal of the other body?” Al: no there’s still so much we could learn from it. You could have them put back on the ship that i arrived in, thatd be appreciated. “Any of the loading bay boys harass you?” Al: no more than expected “We’ll have them whipped immediately.” Al: good. But wait till after they load the ship “Understood. Tho the whipping might make them do it faster.” “We’ll get the torture expert on this.”
