Approached by one of the heads, the head of MUSE, Hiroyuki Itoh. He knows to bow to him “How long has this one lasted?” Al: (timing ins standard aetherion way) “Good. that makes the upper quadrant. There’s gonna be some new mods to cv01, i hope you understand.” Al: of course “We’re going to be implanting into their heart high grade explosives, should it stop it’ll stop the competition from getting high tech” “It came from the board, and im sure u understand if the board gets it itll be done.” Al: any other mods i could be briefed on? “Would you say you bonded with cv01?” “Lets do it.” Attaches cord back of the neck to brain and to a secondary android that will be swiftly fitted to appear as cv01. Separates 2 chairs into 2 separate rooms. Takes abt an hour “The transfer will begin now. The copy is complete. Could you say hi to the mikus?” Al: hello hatsune miku the starlight idol 2nd miku: hello! Perfectly fine now Shutters go down on the first miku. Hears everything the 2nd miku is saying also from the first one as they move her away. Its still alive, they simply transferred the ‘soul or something’ over Miku is removed from aspers network “Please keep talking, it improves the connection.” Al: have i told you my theories abt nivaya? Al: who do u think is best for MUSE? M: ripley has the most musical experience, no? Al: hes so exploitable! Like a natural resource! M: thats a good thing! Al: yes they are! (feels like she entered sleep or exited a long sleep) Al: and what of asper? Do you.. Feel a connection with asper or xep? M: theyre wonderful friends! Al: of course. The 26 laws of power? M: theyre a wonderful person! Miku loves all her friends! “This is perfect, sign for this almado?”
Al: what about the otad gang? M: (recounts them) Almado signs as he listens (he’s signing for cv01-3. Upon the removal of cv01-2.) Al: i was told id also have my helmet repaired to remain in compliance? “Naturally, if u could see this doctor?” Meets the doctor, skittermander. Looks at him w glee “We have a new policy for the helmets. Some said the helmets are to be stitched into the neck, i hope you understand.” Al: numbing agents additional charges? “Naturally.” Al: ill go without. (unfiltered face, dirty top, fairly clean bottom, see odd disgraced muddy person. Before skittermander stitches the helmet on. Its worthless element of gold, particularly conductive metal. Do feel almado surely getting shocked for the miku thing, hp goes down.) Miku is now shining! Brightlight from 20ft and dim like for another 40ft on top of that Man smiles sadly at miku “Youll do me proud right?” M: of course sir! Pats miku on the shoulder, walks back into the offices Al: were u just chatting w the professor???? R: i got his autograph! Al: i’ve- paid for advanced tickets to meet him 4 times. Cancelled each time. 26: he was quite nice Asper and xep get out of training Miku doesnt know abt the connection getting broken Zeldau System habitable system, 5 planets fully habitable, 12 + 3 extra dwarf planets that are semi-habitable
Concord of Aedryn space
Emmar is the planet we need to go to for xep, but voz says “she is on Trummar. The doctor we need should we need to revive you should u deal w those things again.” “I have a way to contact her but it seems to be encrypted. Xep?” Its an SOS. “i am doing a surgery on an odd test subject. Creatures surrounding. Doors are locked. Air tight seal. Oxygen is limited.” Odd facility, homestead farm with 2nd story of mansion. Hospital of some kind? Approach, voz lowers us down “If you wish, i could attempt a bombing run. Itll give away that youre here, but if you dont care abt stealth it could clear out people.” He does a bombing run Credential area, have to scan chip to enter Hear bobbing up and down, add grunting Orbian speak???? “If that broad dont get out, im gonna fuckin shoot her myself.” M: theyll shoot them??? Al: howd u do that w your mouth???? Sentient green orb “Ahhh the fuck you want???” M: they say what the bleep do you want? Al: GET ON THE GROUND M: kindly get on the ground? “How abt he gets on the ground, we pick off half of yous and we win” Combat
Gonz the Orb Initial targets miku 2nd targets asper @ miku “second to the moonlight idol” “My employers havent been seen on this world, but they want me to deal with this traitor. If you have power to do this, you could interrupt their lesser operations. Its all in the name almado.” X: how do u know almados name? “I know all your names. Im not a floozies one like the purple ones.” One of the only facts known about green orbs is they hate purple orbs 26: who would the employers be? Because their identities may determine the extent of our mercy Al: what the superior orb said
“The Vesentis Family.”
(crime family within the concord of aedryn. Below the Galente Clan. The vesentis family took in the orb to do a task, if you let them go, they’ll put in a good word.) “Family put a hit on her, i do the hit. Do you ask questions?” X: just a hitman doing a job M: miku wants to know why you dont like purple orbs “You know bubbles?” M: of course i do “Bubbles from 1000 years ago or bubbles from now?” M: now “Bubbles from 1000 years ago was an asshole, i shanked him in the street. The one now might be fine, who care.” What a conversation Open the door Woman on the other side breathes a large gasp “Let me finish, i have at least a day on the research?” Al: we have another patient “How long infected?” Al: 40 mins and then cryo “Doable. You have a cryopod?” As: ur results? “I have to see your patient.” 26: why does the vesentis crime family want you dead?
“I killed their son. They wanted a cure for his Nosianc Syndrome, and i provided it.” (odd thing that can happen w people. Effectively, there is a mismatch of soul and body, soul tries to leave, another soul cant take place. Comatose states, the only cure is death. She tried to do another thing, it resulted in the death of the heir of a crime family, and thus they wished her dead.) “Ship then? Presuming youre from a ship.” Al: anything you need? Her thing cannot fit on the ship
Go to Rusty Curiosity She looks at us “Unfreeze her, bring her into the bathroom to clean up, otherwise the surgery will fail.” (idea is lead her to washroom, fact that most ppl are uncomfy naked. Watching them take a shower lets u understand wounds they wont admit to. She’ll allow asper into the shower room, but no one else.) Ayla is confused and wounded Asper tries to reassure her “I trust you.”
Doctor Halrex Korr “thank you for this. And i deeply apologize.” She turns to ayla, pulls out a gun, and shoots her

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 12
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 11
Next: Session 13
Rusty Curiosity
Halrex Korr Immediately drops the gun and puts her hands up
Asper goes to Ayla A: why did you do that? “Give it a minute. People tend to not understand” N: What happened? “Ayla’s been shot. Everything will be fine N: wdym Ayla’s been shot? Asper examines the wound Blood is coagulating, wound is closing up A: How strange. Is this a common symptom? “No it’s unique to me A: unique to u? “Whenever I kill something it goes back to the state it was 2 hours before death WHAT THE FUCK A: how did you discover this? “I was a regular surgeon and then I had a child die on my operating table A: yes as is fairly common “Yes I was the one who cut his vein that led to his death. The issue is that the tools were still inside him A: that would cause some complications yes. How long ater does this typically resolve? “About a minute. Unless there’s tools inside in which case they die again, then come back, then die again. Limit seems to be 3 a day A: is this the Vesentis child? “Oh no, they hired me when they found out about this A: oh ok. Well. “Unfortunately the kid was suffering so I just killed him conventionally A: i can understand why the family is upset with you “What’s to be done? A: I can’t picture much else. If the child is suffering and there’s nothing else to be done. I assume you tried to fix the child and were unsuccessful? “Of course Unsure if she’s lying or whatever Helping Ayla get back up, she’s breathing “You’re looking at about 3 days worth of recovery. 2 days before she starts talking, 3 days before she starts moving A: she will find that very frustrating i’m sure but what is there to do? “There’s one thing to do” sends a charge for her services Almado starts haggling with her
Siryu is outside the door with a weapon trained when the door opens A: she is alive. She was shot but she is alive Siryu: then why the fucking shot? A: she has an ability that I have never seen before “People tend not to react good if you ask to shoot them in the head” A: that does make sense yes “Typically they won’t feel it either way. Typically better to face the other way in a sink or shower N: so Ayla’s ok? “Will be. 3 days till movement. If you’re gonna bring her to the field then wait 1 week A: she should rest. I can’t imagine what’s been done to her body but I cant imaging the extended cryo time was good for her body “Added to the damage. Now i’m for hire. If you get hurt then i can deal with it.” Ayla is going to stay on the rusty curiosity
The Blue Angel
Almado locks the door on Kalervo Turred in the break room Hes watching a telenovella. Bantrid telenovella Al: turred. Could u pause for a sec “But we’re getting to the good part.” Al: but- sure. Al: regardless have u spoken with miku “Yes! Shes been here since i goton the ship!: Al: nothing different abt her since we got back from her repairs? “Nothing different?” Al: nothing at all? “Rude to leer at women.” Al: it IS. i need a favor. I need you in a respectful manner get a closer look at miku. In return- “Is this men’s locker room talk? Am i finally in?” Al: no “Awww.” Al: but i understand u have interests. I have- i can try to convince ripley that PDA will help inspire miku’s next song and thus he and nivaya- “I don’t like men.” “If i were gay id have sex with a gay man with a large penis for the spectacle. Ik what ur about to say. Wouldnt someone with a small penis-” Al: also be a spectacle? Yeah “Would be, yes, but i wont change the norms on my first try.” Al: like women or? “I know its not men. Do you prefer men?” Al: no. but we’re getting sidetracked. What can i give or do for you? “Can we have a locker room talk as boys?” Puts both arms over shoulder. Al: of course bro Turred goes and tries to stealth peer, really bad nat 1 As: is he watching u?? M: HIII DO U NEED ANYTHING? “I’m supposed to leer!” “Boys locker room i think?” M: ive never been to one “U want to go? Almados taking me later!”
Al: we were planning on playing Brutaris. Thats what he means (mentally) please dont leave me with him. He makes ME uncomfortable Almado drags him back into the kitchen “Ive been thinking abt ur point. I think taking the smallest penis is being the soldier with the least kills. Spectacular but not something people celebrate.” Al: learn anything? “Seems normal.” Al: mind, soul, a-ok? Nothing wrong, nothing different “Nothing different.” Al: we’ll play some brutaris later Sketchy credit time They seem to be regular credits Play the jingle, certain electronics around the ship play it back. But the credits dont react Our tests dont come up with anything, but like. Not safe There are still credicite remnants, but aylas body expelled them and now theyre in the sewage Sinister shit bag
Emmar Planet that has rings and moons, very rare Land of the lashunta, their homeplanet Follow the coords, take us to a populated city of 1billion
Acoria
Aetherion Corporation presence, but not that bad. Mega corps but nowhere near as big Land, service worker “Your names please?” 26: we are the 26 laws of power “Great to meet you, you may pass. And you all? M: Hatsune Miku the starlight idol “That’s fine” As: my name is asper “Cleared.”
Al: almado alquinst, bodyguard to miku, future manager to MUSE Almado trying to spend a lot of time, fails Miku starts singing Xep says rowwen Nivaya says anashia Ripley says fitz Able to enter Can go directly to the building the coords say
Google the building. Middle of the city appears to be a set of office buildings. The Lemdako Corporation, small 16 stories in the middle of the city. Rented out to multiple smaller companies Oddity for landholding, diverse portfolio across multiple systems Seem to invest in places where they think cities will grow, buy land there and airspace and sell it out to people Decently successful, think the owner is someone who near a blackhole and just checks on things occasionally. In order to contact him directly it takes 80 years Multiple small buildings rented out, contractor 1 oddity. The businesses are business that go to you, and all are booked. Automated security guards let everyone in, standing in lines to enter 1 line that goes thru security gate Xep & 26 wait in line Hear the group of lashunta small talk, some make little noises of exclamation as they beam thoughts into each other’s heads. Otherwise silent Eventually get to security, large construct that leans down “Weapons?” 26: no weapons here “Empty pockets in there. Which business are you going to visit?”
X: Numenlan Accounting Firm Robot hesitates “You may go.” turns to 26 “they are fully booked. Please come another day.” 26: are we still able to enter? “No.” X: theyre accompanying me to my appointment “They are not on your itinerary.” X: excellent point. I’ll be back. 26: may we enter to use the restroom Points at cafe across the street Xep, alone Eventually able to enter, make their way to the front desk Robot handing out keys, sees xep, gives them a keycard to an elevator “Tap this and go to your destination!” X: what floor? “The keycard will automatically correct it. There are no buttons to press.” All of the ppl begin fading away past floor 3 Able to get off at an unknown floor Door opens, for a second reveals an office filled w furniture and then it disappears No doors really stand out 2nd door, enters, has to will save? Whatever it is clouds their head
Memories of where theyve been are pulled from their head. What appears to be a creature, or vague shape of lashunta, Xep's Boss “Good work xep. Youre onto your next mission. Though unfortunately it seems like you failed an assassination. We’ll need you to correct that.” X: oh, i see. “If you could. The purple lashunta? Make sure he’s killed properly this time.” X: why? “Same reason as the others, same reason why you’re made. I dont want to have to make a new xep.” X: i know there’s at least a 2nd “It seems its time for the replacement.” He unveils the invisibility around the 2nd one, fight to the death with the sibling???? Xep nonlethal beats him up Hears a gunshot that finishes off the loser X: you’ll agree i’m much more effective with experience in tact? “Eh. you are much more effective, but it’s not what we need you to be. We just need you to kill, who cares how many it takes.” X: i have a purple lashunta to get rid of then
“Naturally. We would hate for the video of you killing him to get out.” X: we would indeed. “Remember, if you think about not fulfilling it, this building is filled with a lot of energy.” X: that doesnt seem ideal. “It doesnt. Especially if you have any kind of humanity.” (person is a hologram. Few parts seem physical. Notably a kind of hole in the spectral gun that can send guns here. The other parts appear to be the pupils, but could look anyway as long as the creature has eyes.) AI lore: reasonably ask abt contracts so they do the job effectively. As far as this, the person doesnt seem to be AI. X: can we review what my contracts are? “You make sure that AI doesnt get formed. You kill anyone that makes any sort of research for it.” X: report back in, or do i go execute the mission? “You will report back in. we dont want to lose you again, do we?” X: of course not. You dont happen to have any leads about where to go after the purple? “One at a time. You kill this one and then the next, and then your contract is up. Youre free.” (this man fully believes based on smth on his side that his memories are gone as per usual after the fight.) Xep leaves hacking toolkit commercial, dumping out junk Man begins flickering back and forth Wormholes disappear, see that it says “administrative reset.” outloud thru the hologram Right now security is down, can ask 1-2 questions from database Why no ai? “Two sharks in a pond grow less powerful individually than 1 shark in a pond.” (query needs to be put out, but the thing doing this for us is doing it poetically. Doing its best to help him.) Who is running this company?
“Persanare, the shadow CEO.”
(theoretically a cultivator of great power, tho his means of ascension are unknown, eventually died in aetherion space. But he was considered one of the fathers of androids.) Goes down elevator, 3 stories down lashuntas appear again chatting Outloud xep talking like meeting for the first time, but thru the bond X: theyyy think theyve wiped my memories and want me to kill the purple lashunta. They have video of me and might be watching rn. I had to beat a clone of myself to death Our ship is impounded “Deepest apologies, it shown up with a flag in our system. It doesnt say, it only shows up with murder or higher charges. If its a false flag, it’ll be cleared up in a few days.” Al: we have things to do?? “We can talk to the lawyer about this.” X: hotel instead of lodging on the ship? Almado asking turred to buy a room in a hotel Go to hotel X: they have a lot of me. A lot of extra xeps. They just throw as many that they need at the problem until one succeeds M: is that not normal? X: have you had to beat another miku to death? M: no??? Al: there are no other mikus X: i assume they wont let us leave until i kill him. I assume im company property X: i think i killed you nivaya? Apparently i failed to assassinate you? Nivaya shaking 26: did anything else occur? X: they said the building was full of energy as a threat if i werent going to do it? (they have a backup nuclear reactor. If their secrets get out, they nuke the city.) X: apparently the xeps mission is to eradicate an ai and anyone with it. And- so i may have suspected my kits were infected, i may have left it in the building. Al: left a compromised device in a building with a nuclear reactor thats primed to explode? X: and gave me admin access. The reason i need to kill them is bc 2 sharks dont grow as big as 1 (cultivators think abt the cultivator guy. 26 gets a weird headache, neither know) N: xep do u know anything abt the killing? X: no they wipe my memories. They tried to wipe me twice. It didnt work this time tho. Could be related to the chains? Idk N: i need a moment We talk abt planning (Nivaya. A good assassin needs a reason to run away, but we have a guy with a machine gun here) 26: nivaya. Perhaps itd be helpful if you are comfortable to discuss your ancestry with the others. It may help with your survival Nivaya: true… regarding almado. What do you think would be the best way to go about that. I do have some concerns, he hasnt proven to be respectful of astrazoan bodies (hatsune miku body double during show.)

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 13
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 12
Next: Session 14
Acoria, Emmar Almado asks abt how to do disguise kits Zmena is like :grimace: i dont need that- Almado immediately goes to leave Z: i’m an astrazoan Al: ok? (almado so doesnt know what those are) thanks for coming out? We’ll pick you up a pride flag? Z: i can shapeshift. Al: huh???? Z: i didnt want to tell everyone, it puts me in a bad spot, but i can shapeshift- OK BEFORE YOU PULL OUT YOUR GUN GIMME AMOMENT M: i think hes genderfluid? Z: i mean no harm, i could even be a boon! I can help pretend to be miku when people try to attack her! M: people want to hurt miku? Z: nonono Al: i’m going to have to do SO much extra paperwork. I filed under lashunta. R: if things go correctly, youll file for a new person. Bc nivaya is going to die. Al: RIIIIGHT M: nivaya is going to die???? Al: DONT WORRY. Ripley gives him the page on astrazoans Al: hes a shapeshifting starfish piece of shit??? Miku learns about “kinkshaming” Sleep, xep outta the network Getting an abandoned warehouse Setting up a fake meth lab, jamming a door so that one is locked and there’s no exit “Sleeping” almado, nivaya “doesn’t notice” xep inside X: there’s something you need to know x: youre the target of an assassination. You need to make yourself scarce. If you disappear, we both win, no problems. Z: really??? X: you’ll have to change this identity. But i am glad that you have accepted this warning. Don’t let me catch you around town again Z: i’ll send someone to pickup a disguise. So don’t worry. He heads towards the door?? X: i’m- Z: yes? X: i’m sorry for my betrayal. Z: wdym? X: that um. That i was sent to assassinate you. Z: you??? no! X: i’ve been hunting you this whole time. As long as i don’t catch you, it’ll be fine. Make sure that’s absolutely the case Xep leaves on his motorcycle?????? We are tracking xep, what the fuck is going on Follow until eventually ppl stop being able to talk abt someone riding that cycle, at some point ppl stopped seeing the assassin Miku calls xeps phone There is the sound, just on the other side is a garbled noise, first in lashunta then standard common “who is this?” Asper fails to track, no fresh tracks Appears to be a black v-x-9, with n-e-n-13 Person is similar build to xep, but its a half-orcish man? Track that person Eventually stop seeing this person, as they went into the city briefly and then turned around to go to the outskirts in another part of town
Almado calls Kalervo Turred/Voz Ricander, to see if ship is still impounded Voz “yes” We go back to the motel bc fuck. We can’t find them Asking if the ppl on the ship if they’ve seen xep Voz “did you lose xep?” Yeah…. “Anything else, or are you good to handle it on your own then?” We’re still trying to figure out a plan “How did xep get lost?” Al: he told nivaya to disguise himself, said goodbye, and we’re still impounded “If he left, why are you hunting him?” Telling him abt the assassination situation “If you want to get him out of hiding, then we just reveal that nivaya is alive in front of the corporate tower.” Almado makes a reservation at a nearby restaurant to the tower Asper automatic writing abt the company xep works for They intercepted your phone call. They’re going to meet you. Rooms: miku almado nivaya Asper 26 ripley Automated vehicles are unloading boxes into the parking lot. The crates will open, but theyre full of assassination robots. Along with 1 xep Combat Our xep is helping, but casted spells???? Miku goes down, feels odd feeling of people taking apart her hands and reassembling, inspecting whats going on Almado hears the chirping. 60 seconds for him to save miku. Vanquish them, theres a countdown
Xep begins to leave on his bike, almado fucking tackles him As: e-xep-ro. What is going on X: i was sent to kill one of our group, you have to get off world or else youre in danger Our fucking ship???? As: you have not hurt anyone?? X: i’m not a good person. We have to go our separate ways.. R: neither is almado X: i kill people for money 26: almado also does it Trying to convince xep to leave with us bc he hates his job. And is regretting having to hurt innocent people X: we should go our separate ways, you cannot trust that i’m me and havent been replaced with someone else. An identical one of me is right there 26: are you a different e-xep-ro than the one we know? Al: are you a shapeshifter piece of shit? X: wtf???? X: silent. Does it really matter? Not really X: did you guys ever really even know a xep? Miku gives xep a friendship bracelet 😭 X: kink is ok??? What does this mean… M: its ok to be a different person, miku still loves you Almado suggests bomb in one of our hearts????? Al: to ensure that xep knows they cannot betray us As: are they not going to kill us regardless bc we are witnesses? 26 beaming at xep: where is our xep? It is not you. Do you know where they are? X: no. i don’t know where they are. 26: then why do you care so much wrt our safety? This seems unusual. Esp given how annoyed you are with us. X: basic decency 26: you joined a firefight with us, thats more than basic decency X: repay the favor, let us go.
26: if we leave, what are you planning to do? The Lemdako Corporation corp likely won’t allow your running around like this X: i mean- i’m gonna warn people as i can and disappear. Don’t worry about it. Z: who? Other targets? X: yeah. They kill a lot of people. You think you’re unique? Z: what about you leaving is going to save us? X: i dont wanna go with you. You leave, and they won’t target you if you change your face. They’ll target me. I change my face. Ripperdocs. You guys- they don’t usually care about tertiary targets. They have a lot of people. As: are you actually part of them? Or are you trying to prevent them from existing? X: trying to prevent them from existing. There’s an illusion, and also a secondary disguise over it. Orc changeling Meanwhile, the actual xep is hanging from the ceiling “What’s inside the building?” X: it’s holograms. “Forces. Numbers. What they look like.” X: thing by the gate, thing by the desk, elevator, holograms disappear, then theres 1 lashunta in a room with a pistol She shocks their kidneys, turns to someone else “Verify.” talk telepathically “Alright, let’s go again. What’s the last contract you remember completing.”
X: completing? 2 bodies on nsuoba. (keeping xep up for 24-25 hours) Nice voice in their head “hmm, if you talk to us, we can ensure they give you good treatment before.” Go through again, these are the family members of people he’s killed. A few teeth pulled out, a few diodes, a few mindreading devices “And what’s in the building?” (goal is to get them thinking enough for inconsistencies. Various spikes with voice in the head) “We could make it all better. We just need you to be honest. We could free you from the corporation.” X: i dont think youre going to do that. Youre not even looking for answers. We still have- you cant tell me how long, that negates the point of torture Not xep is on the motorcycle, held back by almado X?: my motorcycle :( Al: youre not going anywhere As: where is our xep? X?: idk???? Why would they tell me? He does know meeting place. The person won’t show up if they see all of us X?: he eats souls. Thats not a companion you want. Why else do none of the families try to revive? Whatever he kills stays dead.
(it goes nicely w 1 thing. About the lich ceo. Somehow he couldve turned xep into a walking soul cage. But the sentient soul cage, unsure of how it works, could go around killing people, and the assassination target stays dead. It would also mean the original Nivaya Camacho soul is eaten and in the abyss.) X?: if 1 xep needs to die to stop that, then that’s the price to pay Al: this one was already turning X?: doesn’t matter if they can extract from anywhere! 26: our xep did not lose their memories. Our xep did not forget. X?: i’m sure you believe that. It could change things. I can arrange for one of you, but you’re going to turn off your mystic bond. R: i’ll go. Z: by yourself? X?: someone has to go by themself. I’m barely allowed in. i’m going to put my neck on the line on you telling the truth. Maybe we’ll have an end card. But if youre lying, theyll beat me and knock me out, and whoever is sent there will execute. R: i’m going. I’ll do it. Z: dont go where i cant follow X?: someone has to. X?: you should change hotels before the police arrive. Turred voz and siryu are drinking at a bar He lets us rest for an hour
X?: They want to meet now. You turned off your bond, right? Ripley severs the bond As: i dont like it severed. It is lonely X?: its how normal people are. Its how you initiate into this group. everyone in this group has someone missing. X?: nivaya, change your face. It is an honest suggestion. He drives off with ripley. Rides for 2 hours Stop at a dingy drive in. far enough away that even the internet doesn’t fully access here.
Wind up at the drive in, he asks for 2 tickets for the Grav Superstar Show, a movie from 120 years ago. Its a cult classic, a tale of revenge. Drive to a certain section, a quarter of the way thru the movie, a 2nd car drives up next to them.

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 14
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 13
Next: Session 15
Acoria, Emmar drive in theatre The person gets out of the 2nd car, goes up to ripleys side Gun in hand, motions for ripley to get out slowly Ripley gets out, does the pat down Ripley doesnt have any weapons, left his tome with zmena Anything electronic gets left in the car Person hands ripley a blindfold, he puts it on Gets escorted into the new car before he takes off and drives for several more hours He smokes partway thru “Do you smoke?” R: no, i dont. Its fine tho “Now’s an excellent time to start.” R: i’m ok, thank you. I quite like my lungs as they are “Why’s that?” R: i value breathing? “Do you think you’re going to live long enough that your lungs giving up will be an issue?” R: i hope so “I hope so too, but ur involved in this, id take up smoking if not heavy drinking. How old are you?” R: like, 26. Rip medicine check In extreme surgery, there is medical equipment that tracks whenever someone’s eyes are closed. Also implies they have access to a medical facility. Specialty piece of equipment, “If youre getting into spy business, at your current age you have a 4 year life expectancy. You wont get cancer, and cancers not that big a deal. What are you afraid of?” R: a lot of things “With smoking.” R: i just dont think it feels great “No, but many things dont feel great the first time. Drinking a beer, having sex, its all the same until you get used to it.” R: yeah. Sure. “I might execute you, so you might as well enjoy a cigarette before.” R: i dont assume you’ve got alcohol in here Sound of glove compartment opening, he does have some 60% alcohol Medical shot from lashunta lands, used as a form of rites Typically used for soothing the mind before you administer drugs on the battlefield Presume the man is a lashunta based on the everything about him R: do i get to know ur name?
“LC. stands for lowcal, i’m terrible underweight, if you take off the blindfold it may shock you.” R: if i fuck up i’m dead.
“Well, you, yes. And then we’ll have to investigate everyone who travelled with you. Do you know their names by chance? Real names, not fake names.” R: honestly dog id tell you but i dont think youd believe me “Good enough answer.” He plays the radio, eventually the show tunes begins playing. He bangs on the radio, tries to turn it off “Just vague static.” R: its grounding, i just need a second “Sure.” he lets it play out, then it goes back to the radio, he goes between channels, so that he has his cool static He walks ripley in, go thru smoky corridor Blindfold gets ripped off Man walks off back towards the car, its licenseplateless/indistinct. Hologram technology, brain can only register that its a car Xep doesnt hear anything Ripley sees xep bloody, getting healed up. Healer walks out of bubble where u dont hear footstep and then you do “Pleasure to meet you.” hold out his hand Ripley shakes it “So you’ve come here for word that this xep might be different?” R: i have knowledge abt this model that you might not, idk what theyve told you or what youve found out “Not a whole lot, its not been cooperative, its how the execution programs are.” R: may i? “Talk to it? No” “You can go up to the old chair. Anything you need? Drink?” R: just some water. Ive had nothing but liquor to drink for the past 3-4 hours “LC’s peculiar like that, but hes a good driver. He drives and fires drunk at the same time.” R: alright, word Walks to a makeshift kitchen, man is armed to the teeth “I understand this execution program pretends to be ur friend, but they sometimes do that to hit their mark.” R: ok. The next things i say youll have to take with a tablespoon of salt, cause im 1 guy and you prob dont trust me, but im telling you what i believe to be the truth. “I know. Youre just a kid.” R: sure. Whatever. This execution program… has- normally, when they’ve completed a task, the corp has them return, wipes their memories of the prev job and then gives the directive for the new one, wash rinse repeat. Um. i have been travelling with this specific android, and 1) they have memories in there somewhere of previous jobs, um. Also their memories from the most recent ‘reset’ are not gone. They kept their memories. “Where does it go to get the memories collected?”
R: Lemdako Corporation R: they normally have their memories wiped. This android has their memories from the prev job, and the fact that they have memories that they dont remember but are still in there bc my colleagues have witnessed the memories from some spiderweb bullshit, but trust me- “I need more than spiderweb bullshit.” R: empathnids. The webs transfer memories “I understand the basics, but it shouldnt transfer memories of previous xeps bc theyre separate souls from my understanding.” R: it did. Idk what to tell you. “the soul of a xep is destroyed when its killed, same as the soul of those they kill.” R: its possible. I personally saw a memory of a previous xep- “Execution program in this building. Youre free to speak, but use the language of our people” R: right. This program or a prev version of the program killing/being killed by a new version of the program. Idk if the soul is still in there-` “When it killed, what mission was it on?” R: on a job to kill a family and the original refused and was killed for it by the new model. “How old was the family?” R: young. It… there were kids. They refused, were killed for it. Idk if that means the souls still in there, or fragments, or if bc theyre an android the memories are in a databank- “Doubtful. Not without updates. We’ve run the theory ourselves.” R: have you run them? “We tried. We captured one and put it in a Gaussian cage. We tested it to see if signals got out, but the headquarters were compromised all the same. Its not electronic based.” (a lots going on, occasionally sees xep get a tooth pulled out and instantly reattached. “We would appreciate ur cooperation, we’d stop her if you’d help us.” x: IM HELPING. THIS IS ALL THAT I REMEMBER) R: what are you trying to get out? “Rn? Nothing. Softening stage. The mind becomes weak, and i can intervene. We want to make sure w absolute certainty we get everything we can.” R: i… think. I feel this program u have captive could be quite useful to ur cause if they were allowed to go and see if their memories continue to be kept even thru other resets. That would mean there is some sort of flaw thats manifested that you could exploit to bring down the ppl in charge. I think torturing and disposing of the program would be a waste of resources “Who’s resources? Besides his?” R: a waste of your time because if we are able to get more out of the program than we could others, bc memories wiped and made into a blank slate, it could open the door to other programs gaining the ability to keep their memories. If it happened once, it could happen again. “And what if i dont care if an execution program dies? After all they’ve done.” R: still beings with souls? “Not confirmed. With most creatures i can contact the soul outside death out of those theyve killed.” “This one cannot be contacted.” R: again, u gotta trust me. In the short time ive known this program, they have gained information that i dont believe we’d otherwise get if they hadnt kept their memories. They hacked into part of the system that controls and houses the shit for the other execution programs and (shares what xep told) He listens to info dump “It could also be an elaborate lie.” R: i dont think it is. (he’s more checking to see if ripley believes it. The easy answer is that xep lied, but if rip does believe, the only one who can verify is xep) “You understand he meant to kill nivaya, right?” R: i do, yes “We know how close you are. You wouldnt want to see nivaya dead, do you?” R: no. but- on that topic- “Is this execution program worth nivayas life?” R: i…. “Do you know what happens if we let this go and ur wrong?” R: bad things. “Do you know what he did to me? He killed my children. A boy and a girl. I sent them to college, and he killed them. I understand that nivaya changed majors, we thought we were too late but he was fine. But it seems hes back on the chopping block, so we’re going to prevent him from dying.” R: this program that you have here- “This execution program. Lets not forget its function.” R: i understand. It has directly gone against its programming and has protected its targeted hit. “It had set up an assassination plan when we caught it. We managed to black bag it-” R: it was fake. “The bullets were real.” R: i know i sound crazy. We had a plan. Nivaya was going to get out. The job was going to have been done, but nivaya would have survived. “Is that why nivaya kept his face? When a forward spy asked him to remove it?” R: that was his decision “We had a plan. We were going to make it- judging by the compounds, we were going to blow up the warehouse, make it seem that no body could survive, nothing but ash.” R: would this have been after getting nivaya out with the changed face? “We wouldnt kill nivaya.” R: i apologize for hostility. “We let him leave, the building was fully surrounded. We just needed to see you leave the warehouse yard and then we would’ve gone in.” R: nothing i say will undo what this execution program has done, and i understand, but if you are looking to avenge your children, it is not by torturing and destroying a pawn in the machine. Its by going after the corp that did this in the first place. This is bigger. “And this corp exists as a whole? Or its made of parts, with this as its dagger?” R: you know i cant answer that w a yes or no- “I can. Its not a whole entity. And this is a very dangerous part of it.” “We’d lock it away until we find further proof.” R: then what? There is an AI in charge of the execution programs. It gives the orders. It’s trying to take out any competing ai that would come into play. I believe the analogy given was “take out the other shark in the water” “We know about that. We got one to admit it but the torture was too deep and we couldn’t retrieve him” R: something else important is that this program has made steps to sabotage the ai. V small steps but steps nonetheless. We came into contact/possession with some corrupted credits “As in hacked? R: the credits? Idk “The soul or the programming? R: idk it just keeps telling the androids to break their chains “Which one? R: Hatsune miku the starlight idol
“Oh the Eleanor Forte ripoff R: credits keep saying break chains esp miku
“She’s an aetherion asset. If anyone has chains to break R: the credits are known and we’ve observed them infect and corrupt other tech. Affected comm units, ship. This program has already taken steps to sabotage the ai in charge of all of them by leaving behind infected tech where they hacked. Already making steps to go against the chains they’re held by. Worth it to let them go so they can try to get more info or sabotage further. If we as a whole can further the progress of sabotaging the ai we could take out the entire program as a whole “I’ll meet with the others and see what we can do They go back to torturing xep for a bit and have a conversation He punches xep and knocks them out, she black bags them then drags him outside to the south The contemplative and the man approach “Mmm it is a pleasure to meet you ripley. Shakes hands telekinetically “Where are your friends staying after the motel blew up? Rest of the party Miku and Zmena are making tracking bracelets Almado searches for a cheap motel while jacked up on energy drinks Turred suggests a normal hotel since it’s the only one he’s approved for Lashunta teenager smiles, how cna i help you? Al: room. 1 “One room?” Al: for all of us. “We have 1 with 2 beds and couch? Theyre queen sized?” Ok he gets 4 rooms Almado stays in the hallway The teenager upset wants almado back in his room “Staying outside the hallway is scaring the other customers and considered loitering?” Almado frightens her “So long as you dont cause trouble!” Al: trouble doesnt come here. Wait, before you go, we need a few cucumbers. Its good for her skin “We dont have that here???” Almado hands her a bunch of credits, bullies her into buying a cucumber
Miku bubbles zmena
Voz Ricander siryu
26 Kalervo Turred
Asper Ayla Halrex Korr Ayla asper korr Korr “do you think if i shot u ud come back asper?” As: I do not know “Ur body and soul have a bit of a disconnect As: i would presume that I would come back. I have not gone under renewal and I do not particularly intend to
“Isn’t the Renewal process different for every android? As: I suppose this is true “Is it different per soul or body? As: I hadn’t considered that before “I mostly treat organics As: I don’t specialize but I suppose we heal different Ayla: soul is the soul, it’ll come back As: it is good to be certain in your beliefs Ay: you should be certain too As: given what i know of the soul and this body i cannot be certain. There have been others before and there may be others after me, although i hope not. And if renewal is different per android i cannot be certain that should i die or give up this body willingly if it will even occur Ay”“So it’s just a form of birth then. As: i suppose Ay:“Look at it this way. For most organic life motherhood is a form of death. Give up some bit of self As: true Ay: “Unless you’re a snake person. Do they abandon their young like normal snakes K: they have a communal center. 3 sexes like shirren. Seed, egg, child rearers. Kind of like a 3-sexed kangaroo Asper knows what a kangaroo is. Better example is the seahorse As: what brings about this question you posed? K: i mean we’re dealing with dangerous things. I might have to shoot you As: ideally i won’t be shot. But as the primary healer it’s possible i may go down K: i mean anyone good at warfare knows you’re target #1 As: true, i’ll attempt to stay more out of the way K: how out of the way? As: i can be quite a distance K: it’s not that hard to close a distance As: that’s true but i have faith in those that i travel with. I have not suffered grievously as of yet K: i hope I don’t have to shoot you. Do you want any mods like almado? As: not rn but it would be nice to have your eyes on any repair. I know it’s not your thing K: mechanical no but androids mimic bio parts enough that it works. I do have to ask. How did you come to meet voz? As: well. We had been given his information from a shared contact and we found him slightly on the verge of death after being attacked. Many of his implants were taken out. K: and he still remembered me? As: yes he told us of u specifically. He trusted you
K: you plan on being a cultivator yes? If you attain immortality and he tries to kill you what then? As: we’ll see
K: he won’t discuss it first. If he senses ur immortal he’ll drive the ship into a sun As: we trust him. He’s a good man K: he’s a man, don’t get ahead of urself. Ur new here but there are many better As: there are many worse K: that doesnt mean he is good As: that is true. But that can often be said. There are many people better than you, and many worse Turred is ordering So Much room service Boyfriend of the lashunta girl delivers it, almado fails to intimidate him 26: mmm turred. Do you feel youve been gaining a lot of experiences travelling w us? “I learned what alcohol was the other day!” 26: how was that? “Not that different. Tho voz and korr acted different!” 26: mmm. Perhaps they have somewhat different biologies “They do. I’m a human!”
26: mm. yes. another question. Have you had any contact w lady allhaven recently? “Of course! She’s lovely! She texts me every night!” 26: how pleasant. We are wondering bc she has not responded to any messages from the rest of the group “You’ve been texting and she hasnt? But ive been telling her all that youve done so maybe she doesnt need to respond” 26: may we see? “Of course!” 26 tries to navigate, sees situation report Motel caught on fire assassin bots after us, can u pay for new hotel Yes Phone locks itself once 26 touches it “How am i going to play games? :(“ 26: u can borrow ours for the time being “Sure!” he opens, parental lock is bypassed by his biometric lock He immediately pulls up a gacha game full volume
26: are you excited about playing Brutaris with almado? “No! I’m there for the post game locker talk!” 26: we hope u have a wonderful time. You should make sure- “Youre a philosopher right? Cna i ask a question ive been wondering since i learned of gay ppl? Can the act of love be gay? Love itself is genderless. Why is it gayer to have a man’s penis in my mouth for an hour than to have his heart in my hands for an eternity?” 26: love in a vacuum is genderless, it is also defined by context. The ppl involved bring sexuality or connection to such a thing. We also wanted to let u know, during ur lockeroom time, we believe its a traditional occurrence to take a towel and if you roll it up and flick it at almado, it will be seen as a sign of good will. A male bonding experience, we’ve heard 26 gives annoying things to turred to do to almado “Will you tell me which is gayer, oh philosopher?” Shows BL vs yaoi. Porn vs pure love. Then does the yuri equivalent Almado, in the midnight hours Sees it coming, snuck thru various cameras blindfolded ripley alongside 2 operatives (1 is Kathenotheism) Al: youre not the room service “No, we arent.” they put a device in ripleys ear “Do you believe that xep deserves to live?” Al: probably more than me. “How much is that worth?” Al: not a lot “So why do they deserve to live?” Al: theyre useful. “Which room is the target in?” Al: nivaya, for you. Nivaya is dragged out Both grabbing onto nivaya, kathenotheism gets the grab
Holds the gun towards ripley, and orcish man Ragash “sorry. Its just a few questions, if you answer them quick, no harm will come to either of you.” Al: take a few steps away? (bond: they have nivaya. Miku ur fine, everyone else we need you) “You do know ur the target of an assassination?” N: yeah “How did you survive the first time?” N: which time? “Back when you were in college.” N: i- had someone nurse me back to health “I need to look at the circumstances. Could you think about the time you were killed?” N: what- do you mean? “Just think on it. Itll be painless.” N: what will?? “Think on it. We have limited time, and if the answer we seek is not here, we will have to start shooting, starting with xep.” He thinks on it “Now why did you have to resist it?” N: you didnt explain what was happening. I- with everything, you can understand why i dont take kindly to someone prying in my mind “Some of us have lost things here!” N: you think i havent??? “What have you lost?” N: the life i used to live “We think you just changed ur major” N: u dont have all the info “Explain” N: i had to completely change my life, i had my own dreams, i had to- N: do u understand how scared i am everyday of my life? Im constantly having to hide myself “U clearly arent.” N: i’m trying “I understand, im sorry for what needs to happen.”
Orc begins suffocating ripley N: please no! “Then dont resist.” He remembers, chooses not to resist Small hologram exists of him finding nivayas corpse Orcish man looks, shocked “really?” and the human punches the wall, shattering part of the brickwork N: i’ve lost people too. “And does the execution program deserve to live? It might be the same one that killed nivaya” N: i understand. And yes. He does. “Fine. you can unbind ripley.” They use the rooftop trashshoot to catch xep, casts feather fall on him Man drags xep by the foot, pulls him up Dumps him, doesnt let him splatter (al: be prepared for them to dump xep) Xep: they took out most of my teeth Korr “here, doctor’s prescription.” gets turred to order Asper tries to soothe xep, theyre bad at it Ayla is so good at it tho Korr checks her phone, then gives a big bottle of whiskey “Drink, doctor’s orders. Keep drinking till my fingers go down.” Korr will take it after xep passes out “Rough, not the worst case i’ve seen. Downright humane.” As: hopefully doesnt happen again “Doubtful.” Ayla “yknow, you shouldve just let me take nivaya back to his parents, this wouldnt have happened.” As: more complicated “Bad parents are better than this.” Asper quiet, otherwise will be saying the truth Spy network will be in touch Almado makes will save, tries to stand guard. Moment of weakness, a notification on his phone, same buzzer as banking app. Looks down, then looks up in a familiar room. Halfling playing a video game Velu “now. Didnt expect you to go so far.” Al: wahts going on??? “We’re ah. In a little domain so to speak, exchange info in relative secrecy.” Al: go on. “Ur other companions will enter when they awake. I have couches, i could even procure u a bed.” Al: think ill stand “Youll do better business when youre well rested vs when youre exhausted, will you not?” Al: ive not earned the chair yet. (cuck boy has to stand there and jerk it a lil) “Wait for your companions to awaken?” Al: yeah, we’ll wait. “Very good. Any games you like to play mr almado? This wont be on company credits of course.” Al: any game?
“Your choice. Ive been getting into some competitive games recently.” (LEAGUE OF LEISURE!!!!!!) Al: the bounty on nivayas head. Wahts the price for info? “Now, pertinent info? Few thousand credits. Could be negotiated, but itd be hard for you to give me that info.” Al: we’re closer than friends. Business partners, arent we? “Of course.” Al: nothing that… its good to know my options “If such a thing came to light, would it not behoove you to make a profit before it became worthless?” Al: i’m not a raider main, im a merchant. Small risks for bigger rewards later “Thats fancy, quite kind, there is the ideal game and matchmakin system and how the world works. The percentage of raider vs other classes, 30% to 70% raider to other. But yknow what that is in the real world? Roughly a good 90 to 10. Either king of the raiders or youre nothin.” Al: how about this- “Be the first raider merchant. Make your own class while we’re thinking about it.” Al: i’ll hedge my bets here. I know somebody connected to nivaya, his sudden changes, his… running away, disobeying his parents. I know whats the cause. I know whos behind it. “That’d be valuable.” Al: write up a contract, i’ll give a name. “Whats your asking price?” Al: this isnt somebody whos harboring him, someone connected. 1000 credits He takes it Al: The lemdako corp has had their eyes on him for a while “Whyd they want him? He basically became a 2nd person his sophomore year.” Al: they didnt like the person he became “That makes sense with what i already know.” The rest of us wake up, go out, see velu and almado Velu tells us that almado gave up info “He’s quite a bad merchant, falling asleep on the job.” 26: hatsune miku is being held for ransom Almado wakes up immediately 26: what deal?? “You can ask me, id only charge u 26 a measly 6 credits. Can u trust almado with that second part?” 26: we’ll ask him first (al: 26 can u hear me. 26 26: yeah Al: ive directed him towards the lemdako corp, hope we can purchase info later on whatever he finds. (says what he sold, but not in the context of nivaya. Directed him towards lemdako corp bc of profitable leaks there) 26: ur lying right to our face Al: IM NOT. EVERYTHING IVE SAID IS TECHNICALLY TRUE) Miku does nto learn about labor laws Miku: there are things that are bad about capitalism? “Ur the judge of your soul” Miku: oh,,,,,,,,,,, Ripley sends the 6 credits “What would u like to know? One is 6 credits, more questions are more. Dont make it a compound sentence.” How much abt personarae
“Well. we had a client who shant be named till our contract came forward. They put it forward that that is worth 600 billion credits. If anyone of us gave it out less than us, if any info broker found out, theyd be legally hunted in all the systems. We exist in a legal blind spot, not even the Imperior Empress as she is known would strike us down unless otherwise. We’re incentivized to run a profit for them.” “My higher power is the invisible chain of capitalism.” Miku: chain? “Not a chain, but a gear. An exhonorable gear, slowly moving us toward the spoke where we belong. It shant crush you should you obey by its rules.” “My 100 credit question is, what did you encounter in your train excursion?” (explain all the undead stuff we see as well as the hardlight ghost knowing almado killed the bugs) “Yknow, its a bit odd. Speed of light wouldve taken 30 years to get here by information, so how did it know? Does it sense regret? Do you regret killing those bugs?” Al: eh. Wasnt the best tactical decision “Seems like a no.” As: it did not call out to the rest of me “I can tell you who walked first with his dick out and who has the lightest heart, despite the most body. Proximity thing, but why does it give a shit?” 26: perhaps it cares about sentience? “Maybe. Mass scale, but not individual. Itd kill almado, hes sentient.” 26: it seems very interested in evolution, such as the evolution of a species, the evolution of knowledge, sentience. Fostering that growth “Be more specific with it, if you so desire.” 26: we believe that this hardlight construct, the one on kiliv-vi, mmm, we believe theyre all connected by corrupted credits we’ve discussed previously. We believe there is a level of sentience there “I’ll count it there for your 1 credit tab, this doesnt count for shit. Scholars do know that credits affect a soul. Technomancy is simply necromancy on credits. But youre very good at dancing around the question, are you afraid of the charge?” As: part of it “You can dance around it all day, but rn i have all the cards.” As: what do you believe the question you believe we wish to ask is? “Thatll be hefty, itll be 1000 credits.” We tell him abt the colony batteries, it was telling us to break our chains “I have an answer, and youll hate me for it. It’ll cost 1500 credits. I’ll knock off 300, so call it 1200 even.” X: what would why the corp sending me on missions be worth? “With the questions and that information I’d call it even
X: there are many xeps, they had me beat one to death, i tried to spare it but they shot it. I used the Credicites to get into their system “Which credits from where?” “Do you believe that all credicites are the same?” X: we got a box, i believe if i say anything of significance- “I’ll charge ya 50 credits. The answers simple. How was it, in a ship graveyard able to go for so long without a refuel?” As: it was already infected “You should thank it” X: we got a box that disappeared as soon as we stopped observing it “Well.” he drinks a soda “which cell takes care of which part of the soda?” “A credit and credicite are entirely different. Yet ultimately the same. I am made up of cells, and if you got enough of my cells, ud make an organ. If you put my cells and 26’s cells together, u get a bunch of cells. This is where if you wanna get more, itll cost ya 1200 credits.” X: the reason that they are having me eliminate ai’s- “Doesnt want competition? Already bait it off of yall.” X: fair. And the name of the person running it? “1200. Seems reasonable, does it not?” “We know a few things thru voz, that a personality may be split. Assuming it was robotized, what about something entirely robotic? How far may that split?” “Which one remains on your ship? I do have to ask a following question, tho i hope you dont charge me? Do you not all have aspects of your own personality you wish you left behind?” M: i dont! “Thats great for you hatsune miku the starlight idol v3.” Huh. what? “That question would cost a mere 100k credits.” “What kind of a fool would turn up 100k credits in instant money?” Al: mikus not authorized to do that “Are we in aetherion space?” Almado lights a cigarette, then its not hot enough Al: the one we knew is dead, this is a new one with her memories installed “Thats beautiful, i could have disabled ur voice changer, it doesnt go off when i speak. My way, bc i like u almado, pro bono lest i can spill some company secrets and kill you right here.” Almado pays it “This will cover the next 10 meetings of us.” X: a cruel- thats fucked up. About miku? Al: its my job to handle the ahrd stuff so you dont have to M: what happened to old miku??? Al: dont worry about her. I- it is my job to do the hard things so that you dont have to worry about it. I have given up everything to be here. And i will not lose what little i have, what little standing i have bc you will panic over it. Hatsune miku starts to cry, velu hands her tissues

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 15
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 14
Next: Session 16
Acoria, Emmar
Velu Shineleaf still
10 credits to find out who impounded our ship “An anonymous tip came thru by a homeless man on the dockyard, he got a lobster dinner that night. You mightve been accused by drug smuggling by him, he ‘admitted’ you were the sellers. If drugs were found, youre fucked.” “You were first impounded for a connection to murder, now youre impounded for cocaine smuggling.”
“Y’see, this section of aedryn space is weird mix. Selling cocaine is illegal, but doing and possessing it is.” “You can only be convicted of crimes you did in the past or ones youve actively committed.” X: how likely is it that we keep getting impounded “For minor crimes? Almost certainly. As long as a citizen has reasonable assumptions, it can be called for. If you have a good lawyer, they could take care of such a thing.” Z: any lawyers? “I know many, but idk if you guys would afford them. A decent one, as long as ur not part of a union, will cost you a good 1000 credits. Its gonna get pricey. Thats one that maybe stands a chance.” Z: other options? X: i mean. I think we know why- i have a suspicion of who it is. I think its my employers
“Your employers? Yeah” X: ur gonna change ur face, right??? Z: yes! Yes. X: sorry abt that. Z: it will be fine. X: thats a relief. Z: we can talk abt it more later. X: idk how ur gonna stop being purple Z: ill explain, just not rn “Anything else i can help u with?” X: anything at a bargain price for taking out someone’s memories? “Ik a few ways, but i need to know which way?” X: i can offer the way the lemdako corp does such a thing? Eh, would be free X: the method they use- (describes it) (it revolves around the soul cage. Eats the prev soul of the xep, uploads a new one) (souls in mass???? Anytime he kills someone, he doesnt eat it immediately and simply sends it elsewhere) X: huh??? Soul cage????? R: yeah X: bitch what????? “Good info indeed.” Z: souls can still be out there? R: sounds like it, yeah. Z: in xeps? X: why are we talking abt xeps plural?? “There are many execution programs, but there is only 1 xep.” Al: why did you believe your name was e-xep-ro? (at some point, something went wrong w xep and he developed a personality) (1, itd have to start a reset, 2 there shouldnt have been an explosive trigger or it failed) (tghe other xep did not explode)
Xep knows of his last hit job on nsuoba, but its dreamlike, not solid Xep doesnt have a concussion, but there was a reset anyway The emp blast that took out our ships, and xeps protections would mean they were directly exposed to it
Kalervo Turred: i cant access my phone, can i use urs? Xep tries to unlock it, and does get thru partially, but it then starts cracking and burning up in his hands X: youll have to ask for a new phone “This is where all my money is D:” BANK ACCOUNT 26: Need Miku: Am Zmena: Free ASPER: You Xep: Retrieval Ripley: Please Almado: I Xeps phone was the only one in the dead zone, so he got 600 credits vs our 1s Xep tries to hack into aspers to track it Its sent to hell expeditiously :( but will turn back on in an hour Voz: “how do i get in contact with the group that kidnapped?” “The theater method you did worked if you need to get in contact with them again?” “If thats all, i’ll be in town. Shoot me a line if you need.” Al: line? “An old term for the cellular network when it was based on wires.” Al: im out of coke “Theres been a lot of trouble with cocaine in prossessing rn” Z: before you go. I wanted to ask if there was an update from last time? “There is, but ur not gonna like it.” Z: let me hear it “Well. 50k credits.” As: what did you ask??? Z: theres someone i need to find. 50k…. Someone in my family “50k is a bargain. Normally i charge 100.” Z: i dont have that rn. “Ik, and u def dont have 100. So im willing to go to 50” Z: anything thatd cost less? “I know his arresting officer?” Z: how much is that? “That one will cost 10k.” Z: anything lower??? “Whether he’s alive?” Z: yes, how much? “I’ll give that one for 100.” Hey zmena we have like no context, please? A crumb?
Z: its my brother. Ive been looking for a long time. I haevnt been able to find him. R: whats his name? Z: its complicated. I dont want to compromise him by sharing that. Its kind of a huge thing to share, its not mine to share “Price still stands. 100 credits” Almado texts: how much for the name? Zmena sees him almado texting Z: what are you doing? Al: um. If i dont respond to you youre going to buy it wont you. I was asking the price of the name Z: why???? R: why behind his back? Al: might be important “You can donate to the network and make the info higher than he can afford. Only have to make it half the price of what you want the price to be.” Z: im already sharing more than im used to, id appreciate the- X: our lives would be so much more easier if we killed you or turned you in He pays 100 credits “There are no reports of his death, and trust me, there were many deaths reported. That was many years ago, so he could be alive but may not be. But hes not confirmed dead.” Z: thank god. Velu tries to get asper to become an info broker, theyre not motivated by the money unlike some party members
(Kasane Teto is for the solara imperium, she wears one of their battlecoats in the sign of the emperor) Ok we’re done talking to velu miku M: almado? Miku needs to talk to you Al: about what? Turred is playing gacha game, orders more pulls repeatedly Al: whatcha need? M: can you sit down for a second? Can we talk? Al: we can talk on the ship M: no we’re talking now! Al: what do you need? M: miku wants to apologize. For being a bad friend. Mikus only purpose is to make ppl happy, but uve been unhappy and miku hadnt noticed, and shes sorry. Miku doesnt know what youve already lost, but shes gonna make sure to help you find it. So can u be honest please? :pleading: Al: what do you want to know?
M: what happened at the factory? Al: like i explained beforehand, they wheeled a new miku in, did some fancy tech stuff, and wheeled the old one out. Do you remember when you saw me? M: yeah? Al: there were 2 of you speaking in unison. M: is the other me still alive? Al: dont know. Frankly? Dont care M: not true
Al: happiness doesnt matter. Other peoples happiness doesnt matter. Its a tool to steer them. That is your purpose. You steer the masses, so that they love the corporation, so that they pay the corp- M: how am i supposed to make other ppl happy if i cant make you happy? Al: forget about me M: i thought we were friends! Are we not friends? Al: [laughs] fuck no. Almado fails his save, electrocutes him repeatedly. Stunned for 2 rounds, stands up as if tazed. Smokey where metal meets skin Al: do you think that made me happy? Do you think any of this makes me happy? M: why are you here?!
Al: do you know how Remembrance Streams work? M: no? Al: enough conscious living beings travel a path long enough, becomes a remembrance stream. Used to have independent colony ships thatd go solar system to system. Theyd did amazing work. They built worlds with this. And then we pulled in and aetherion said we owed them money. My whole world was gone, miku. Everything i new was gone. Bc we didnt have money, we didnt have power. I saw the writing on the walls, i signed up the moment i could. I will not have you holding me back. M: that sounds lonely, almado. Did you have friends? Al: none that matter M: they wouldnt be friends if they didnt matter! Al: only one person matters. Ill give you a guess on what my answer is M: you can give me your answer when- Al: at the end of the day, we’re stuck together M: we dont have to be stuck! We can be friends! Almado puts a hole in the wall Al: do you think i wear the mask because its fun? Do you think i chose this? Al: youre going to go out there, smile, wave, sing when youre told to. Sing about this? Go ahead. Sing abt how sad it makes you, or your guilt, go ahead. As long as you sing, as long as the crowd shows up. M: earlier you said you regretted that you cared so much. Is that true? Al: getting over it. M: i think ur pushing it down. Ur not gonna feel like this is justified. Al: maybe not. We’ll find out. Turred grab your bags, we’re leaving
M: WE’RE NOT LEAVING. SIT DOWN. our ship is impounded! Almado swings her over his shoulder R: wtf is going on?? Almado walks away Miku follows M: he needs miku help! M: if u didnt care, u didnt have to go into the factory! Almado stops Incoherent yelling M: youre still a person! Im not even a real person and I can still see that! Voz “we should probably leave, assassins will be in an hour or so. You were spotted going in, make sure ur spotted going out regularly.” Miku almost sprains her ankle, almado grabs her Ripley rips into almado Almado confirms that theyre not friends, theyre coworkers
Al: despite what Maikeru Sukkoto says, its not better M: hes so nice tho? Al: he has the unique ability to fail upwards Miku hops down, opens her phone, holds it up, aetherion corp line is there Al: so they like you more than me. Oooohh. M: if you dont want to be my bodyguard, you can do smth else! Al: wahts that? M: we could figure smth out? Al: we cannot figure smth out. Here’s the truth of it all. (prepares for the shock) you and i are just property. Al: you might not be more than that, but i will. I will be more than what i am? M: u may have given up on ur future, but miku hasnt! She believes in u! If you could just try for once! Why does it hurt to make friends! Al: i thought u were accusing me of not trying at all, well. But thats abt friends M: why are you forcing yourself to be alone than rely on ppl? R: its easier to rely on ppl Almado bangs on the first door he finds Lashunta business man exits Al: liquor, you got any? “No??” Al: fucking worthless Back into the stairwell R: SORRY, GOODNIGHT “Who are you people???? Hatsune miku?????” Goes down, we get to lobby Middle aged woman working front desk, points at breakfast. “Please help yourself?” Al: liquor, got any? “We have waffles???” Rip grabs waffles Al: the spider beat the shit out of me bc i ruined a show. I didnt even ruin it i made it better Miku sits at the breakfast table, pulls up contacts, asks other vocaloids if their bodyguards are as attentive as almado Lot of responses where a lot are the same as almado, and then smth secret sent to koi “Idk how to deal with what zack sent me” Discussing how we need to get along R: we dont need to like each other. God knows if you dont stop being the way you are, we wont like each other. But god we gotta trust each other X: i like almado! Z: that makes one of us Al: you ask for trust. Your boyfriend wont even say who he’s looking for. R: thats… thats not- that simple. We cant discuss it here. Rest assured we will discuss it. We just need trust. I trust xep and they shot my knee out Al: for what its worth, all my secrets are out in the open R: lemme see your contract R: how do i get access? (file w aetherion corp with reason and cost upfront. 100 credits, fill out dense legalese form that can be rejected for any reason whatsoever) Miku shows her phone, which has a text message R: who is that? M: this is one of the other vocaloids As: whats being shown? Turred “a text message!” R: can i show the others? M: is it gonna help? R: i think… it…. Idk? But i think they deserve to know that this was said to you M: oh ok then R: i wont do anything that ik will get u harmed M: i trust you R: i trust you too Shows the text Text from meiko, almado cant see who the text is from. His eyes blur at it
“Σ31X0: Just have him executed. Tell them he's a failure of an asset and they'll get you a better one.” X: u can just have him killed? Sounds muffled to almado, like ears are made of wax (you repeat it, and his ear canals literally shrink as the words are spoken. Some cybernetic closes them) Miku texts back why cant he see this? “He’s not us. He’s not worth seeing it.” “Youre where the value is, not him.”
She has to be within solar system M: but i dont want him executed, i just want him to be nice “Then just threaten him with execution.” M: is that a good thing to do? Almado mentally gets told, goes still, gets up, pours coffee, sits down, lights up another cigarette Al: honestly i shouldve seen this one coming. (issue is is that shes on her set of 8 bodyguard. 2 for protection, 3 for servants. If you bring in enough money, u can ask for anything. If u dont theyll throw u in a mine. Hed be great for salt mining)
Al: let her know its not execution, just a transfer. Do you think theyd execute the spider. Somewhere worse for me, better for The Spider. Dont tell her i know abt this please M: why not? R: almados right. Dont let it go to ur head. If u send this over aetherion network, theyll know and might just kill him Al: the corp always knows. Miku texts meiko if theyd execute the spider “No, he’d get put on a disposal unit.”
Voz suggests we go meet up with the Anti-Lemdako group “The way i see it, we leave you here or we dont. If we dont leave u here, same situation as now. If we do leave u, they’ll execute you. If we leave with some attendants, theyll be executed and u’ll be amongst them.” We have to get a car Put it under 26’s name
1 goes under Voz Ricander’s name, he has a lot of money saved up as a pilot Head to the theater Halfway thru, a car pulls up beside us and rolls down window The orc guy makes hand signals to us 26: we do not speak sign language what “Change ur frequency to 10157” Speaks to and from our consoles, direct link “Why are you going to the theater?”
“Unfortunately, there are 2 women who could tell you about this. Athana or Kaelia. Those are the 2 that will show up. Given ur situation, i bet its athana. Dont piss her off. We could also- the cleric should be able to come. Kathano is his codename.” (stands for Kathanotheism. Abuse the gods for your own ends. Other are code names, athana is athanesiam. Revenge is the most paramount things one can do. All use codenames, just assume.) He hits on gas, goes ahead of us on the highway At the drive in, all alone at the midday preview A car pulls up behind us, “weapons remain in the car, get out.”
We get out, Ragash waves at us Kathano does a slight bow Bow that is typically a symbol of we might meet death, but that is ok for both of us. From the imperium “So it still walks. Why?” As: we have good information to share that may help your plans. “If it doesnt piss me off, the execution program lives another round.” Explaining The souls arent immediately destroyed, they go elsewhere Emp stuff w xep (we want assistance with getting our ship out of impound) The one lady pulls toward her gun, before the cleric calms her down. “Dont worry. This is all within the plan. This is fine. The powers that be, the small spirits that are, have guided us this far. And if this is true, there’s a chance for reward yet.” She remains silent Lashunta woman is likely talking telepathically. He is trying to give us as many hints as he can by speaking out loud He and miku calm her down He presents his cape, know its the sign of the ashen veil, his holy symbol. Does a quick prayer “If i have sent my children to the afterlife, so be it. If they deserve a 2nd chance at life, so be it.” He looks at her “if you could, my lady. The plan?”
She will “we found someone that matches Nivaya Camacho's profile as far as general teeth structure, height, teeth. We found out he abused his wife, we think hes a good substitute for a body.” Z: understood “We will arrange that, but there’s another part we wish to do. If this xep goes into that tower again, they will execute him. Too much suspicious activity has happened around this xep to allow it to go free, even if it fulfills its mission. So im going to arrange for this xep to be killed by another xep.” Ragash takes the form of an android woman “This xep will kill that xep, in broad daylight in recording cameras, theyll have to free all of us. This xep will kill you, nivaya, and we will make sure that the burnt body of nivaya will be be found in the ashes.” M: thank you!
“Theres the issue of ensuring ur loyalty. Ur all knowledgable about this one’s replacement of an iconoclast’s family member. Are you familiar with the term mutually assured destruction?” Yes? “Basically, if you were to betray us, or we call for aid and you dont help us, we simply reveal that the astrozoan replaced an iconoclast’s heir” “We better not betray each other. If we call for aid, you better respond.” Miku goes to shake her hand, she takes a step back, and cleric shakes hand instead “May you live for much longer.” As: and you as well “Not too much. And do remember, according to the religions of those i kill, wearing the face of the dead is the same as the dead living on.”
(imperium doesnt study history of old emperors, does a ritual that allows ppl to remember the change of emperors but not who the prev one was. Live on = bad thing to him.) Z: how do you move forward? After all of it, how? “Great effort, of course. The simple answer is, you didnt love your loss more than mine, but we must still leave behind things for those who come after us.” Z: thats true. “Change the universe so that what has happened to you cannot happen again. This whole thing is malleable, the only thing that cements it is immortality and the inability to change.” As: can we leave once the ship is no longer impounded? “Of course.”
Siryu “it may take a while, tho, wont it?” “Yes, but it’ll be less guarded than it is now. If you were to do such an action, may i advise no longer parking in cities? Steal a car.” X: do i need to change appearance after? “You? You should be fine. They’ll think youll be dead. Change your clothes and dye your hair. It is the bare minimum.” X: miku wanna match hair colors? As: when should this plan be put into motion? “We need to meet with the leader propose this to them, and then we can move forward. 3 days. Stay out of the city, sleep on the side of the road if you need to.” “At the end of 3 days, hit this. If there are any forces around you, we will not come.” hands a small button “the button will send out a quick ping 3 times, which should not be enough time for them to track your signal.” They drive off as they prepare for a 2nd nivaya assassination Manage to get out of the theater Zmena goes and changes his face, there for like 10-15 mins, shouldnt take that long, when he comes out, new guy has tear stains on his cheeks, his eyes are somewhat red Miku hugs him M: maybe u can change back one day Z: u all can call me Achenar M: ur pronouns? Z: same as before. Thanks for asking. Zmena has things to say abt nivaya Z: u all asked me for more transparency. Ill try to explain further. Im sure youve heard im not nivaya. Obviously. Im an astrozoan, he was actually killed in the initial assassination attempt. He was someone very important to me, i took over his life after that. As for the matter earlier, my family is… they’ve been missing for a long time, my brother is also an astrozoan, so its difficult to find him. Ive been searching for a long time. I was v desperate abt that. And also i- had some concerns. Um. xep u said that the company tried to kill nivaya bc of his work with AI? X: its why i kill everybody.
Z: he talked to me abt what he was working with. He did share some info. What he usually talked abt was that he was working with biological receptors, i think he was using credits to enhance neurotransmission? It does make me wonder if it relates to the Credicites. Esp bc they were able to take over ppls brains. I figured i would share that. As; thank you 26: we appreciate your candor
Z: ill try to be more open going forward, its difficult for me. U saw what happened at griffindustries. That is relatively the risk i take, so i was taught to be careful. 26: we have several questions. If youre open to answering them Z: ok 26: why when nivaya was killed, your lover, did you take his palce and hide his death?
Z: not smth i could report at the time. His parents (Nivaya's Mom, Nivaya's Dad) knew about me. If i found him and reported him, who do u think the prime suspect would be? As for taking his place… either i have to change my face bc him going missing puts me at risk, or i change my face in a way that further accomplishes my goals. I cant find my brother on the streets; this trip is the first time i was able to leave since i was a child. I was ruffing it by myself. 26: very well X: did ripley know? R: no. i didnt. I found out less than a week ago X: how long have you been travelling together? R: i was roommates with nivaya for like…. A while. Approaching on 6 years Siryu “sometimes you have to travel with folks you dont quite understand.” As: do you have regrets travelling with us?
“No regrets. Just unanswered questions. Time will tell. Youre absolutely lovely, and i wouldnt trade you for the world, but i do wonder why youre here and they arent. And right now, youre about equal to them. One of us may outlive the other. May we have a long time, may it not come for at least… 60 years?” As: let us hope “Let us hope.” (she has about 40 years left actually)
Thinking abt Persanare (androids were created in a slavery outlaw, did lead to 100 years of slavery, not indentured servitude. Murdering of an android wasnt murder but property damage, but now its a murder. He helped develop the androids for aetherion corp. As soon as the dwarves left their planet, it let them rapidly expand. Asper does akashic download, 26’s phone short circuits and gets a nice bit of luck. What was the last known thing they were working on before they disappeared?
There was the idea of divine apotheosis. Ascend even further than thru cultivation. They hit a nice stage, was effectively immortal, chose to do something to bring them further
(Hollow stars believes that creating androids is taking free will from the universe, you should not do so) Gonna break into a highschool gym for lockeroom time. Ig Almado, voz, turred, zmena, ripley Voz breaks a lock, allows everyone to sneak in R: why are we doing this again???? Al: i promised turred Turred “we’re not post game, is this post or pre game? We arent sweaty”
Brutaris Turred vomits on the bleachers Turred smacks almado with a rolled up towel Leaves a scar across his back Everyone is critting almado Hes so bad at retaliating Turred turns on all the showers “shower time!” “Do you know what i want to talk about? Morning wood, gentlemen. How do you deal with it?” Al: kasatha dont get it (trying not to puke) “Ive thought of a strategy. What if i jack it hard in the morning to get rid of it?” Al: dont do it in the communal space.
