Youll get soaped “Are we not soaking together?” Almado gets ripleys sock, bar of soap, swings it around like a weapon Al: and then they smack you while youre still in bed Voz tells him that its insane and to stop. Stupid and also desentize him and wont be as fast in the future. Then tells him abt the leglocking method Comes back Fake xep assassination situation Zmenamir will be nivaya. Xep will be xep. Other caught on cctv will be a new xep Asper rip on the neighboring roof “I will not aim for any vital organs” Shoots nivaya, beneath the heart and lungs but above the kidney, clean. Looks fatal. He purposefully moves over a flask that starts fire/explosion Then 2nd part, part that will hurt. Shot rings critically, instantly knocks him out For a brief second, ripley sees that ragash didnt shoot, a real one, a xep who has shot the actual xep whos unconscious as the explosion goes off. Still breathing This xep, 100 years old, crawls down the warehouse and goes into the shadows Ragash doesnt acknowledge it “All according to plan, your ship will be free.” R: and when are we getting him back? “Whenever u heal him. Just not here.” R: no. nivaya. “Nivaya?” Zmena crawls away. Another person moves thru, skinny man with large gun puts a fake body down
Korr mentions “Lowcal’s a fake nickname. Its ironic. He uses a highcal gun.” Does let us leave Fake nivaya will surely be turned to ash in roughly 5 mins Zmena changes his face for the last time in a while

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 16
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 15
Next: Session 17
Acoria, Emmar Party has to lay low for a while, 4 days of downtime
Xep suggests Halrex Korr just. Digging right into his body for traces of the Credicites
Invites anti-lemdako corp to help
Kalervo Turred is also going to look at the soul cage to see if souls are in the soul cage in his body (there isnt a soul cage design™, soul cage is made to match lich’s soul so itll be out of place) Surgery on a xep In old vid game shop
Voz, korr, the cleric guy Kathano, ragash Ragash provides saranwrap, to make sure that xep doesnt bleed everywhere Korr “drinks? I have some painkillers if that’s your vice.” As: no thanks “Youre a good person asper” Cleric man strangles xep, falls unconscious She cuts him open, nat 1 initially, oops kills xep Strangles xep again, he fucking Hates xep Asper better assists korr, she routes around in his body Organs look oddly ordinary to asper To miku, she notices that parts of xep have become a relay. Xep isnt a soul cage but relays the souls to a secondary location This one’s receptors are fried, it cannot absorb or transmit souls No sign of credicites She blows xeps head off, it immediately begins reforming Xep doomed 2 Xep is only here bc of one (1) computer glitch, otherwise wouldve lost freewill a long time ago Xep facial surgery Awkward silence Group is oddly silent, the others are communicating mentally Theyre talking to korr, but if we talk mentally w her she’ll respond 26: greetings korr we are the 26 laws of power “Yes ik” “Why are you here do you need cosmetic surgery” 26: anything pertinent abt xep? “Nothing pertinent. Theyre merely asking if ill do the same surgery on them.” “Doctor client confidentiality, im sure you understand” 26: but of course we understand Aura sight Attitude toward 26: indifferent Emotional state: she had a high going abt being a doctor, and now shes coming down from it
She’s suffering from THS (Thaumic Hyperaccumulation Syndrome), at this stage its fatal Anomalies in her system, her neurons will crystalize in time and be left immobile, will eventually die from it 26: we have no additional questions in the face of doctor patient confidentiality “Ok. goodbye then.” Korr addresses the group, says she has a client, will return with a new companion? Asper shares their phone number
Ayla and turred are repairing a DVD and DVD player to watch movies Miku and almado are doing a music video Solidly fine on youtube, not amazing
Ayla watches movies with turred, various things like Hedgehog Day and Blip Z: can i join? “Its a movie theater.” Z: um. Ayla? I wasnt sure how much u saw of everything that happened regarding the group that we spoke to? “Not a whole lot. Ive been… i was under korr’s care, shes a kind lady.” Z: yes, she is. Um. so- would i be right to assume you understand my situation a bit better now?
“That assumes my whole family got killed for someone who was the wrong target, essentially.” (otad gang) Z: i… well, yes, i was the wrong target. I was under the impression they were killed by the credicites “I couldve been there for them if i wasnt out there chasing you.” Z: i understand. I… its really unfortunate situation, im sorry for my part in it. That wasnt my intention, i was just trying to live She punches him hard “Dont groan too hard, you deserve it.” Z: i accept that She sits back down, continues to face the screen Z: i… came to talk to you because- well. Youre the first person i met whos like me. Ik ur not exactly like me, but- “That i transform?” Z: yes
“You should join a druidic order, then. The shrub mob would find you fascinating.” Z: not sure i want to be fascinating “Wahtever exact nature u are, they have weirder” Z: ill keep that in mind. I do have some things i need to travel for. Idk if i can join an order like that. “The shrub mob have their roots everywhere.” Z: can you tell me more abt them?
“When tech started taking off… youre familiar with the Bioships, right?” Z: no? What is that “Its the reason why ur able to breathe on most planets. According to astrophysicists its not natural. The bioships help. Ancient ships with diverse life that deposits plants from planet to planet, seeing what survives. Allow similar atmosphere on most planets, its not comfortable but it is livable.” “You can hop on one of those ships whenever you want if youre part of the shrub mob and go wherever.” Z: could i take my people? “Depends on whos your people.” Z: the crew. “Why would you need to take them?” Z: we’ve. Ive had a rough time so far, but i feel more connected with them in a long time “And ive fared worse with them than my own family, but theyre my only chance at revenge.” Z: youre seeking revenge on the credicites? “Would you not?” Z: im not sure. But theyre not exactly… one entity. “Then i’ll kill them all.” Z: then i wish you luck. Obv we’re still searching. Maybe you can help us with the next target we find? “If its a credicite, i’ll help. If its whatever this is, i wont” Z: thats understandable, u shouldnt get wrapped up. We’re searching for the rest that are there “And i’ll stay with you until you find them” Z: i hope we can help each other. And ayla? I know youre not my biggest fan, but i do want you to know that im here if u need anything. Anything at all, let me know “I’ll ask korr first, but if shes not around… maybe.” Turred leans over “i think you did a great job.”
Almado texts Maikeru Sukkoto
Ripley shares the static stuff with lowcal Goes to ask ayla abt it “Ripley. I heard you helped me escape the warf.” hugs ripley Hug feels a bit weird bc dog and cat R: i wanted to chat with you abt smth, are you busy? “Boring movie.” (in ancient lashunta without subtitles) R: i have a question. I dont want to play it too loud (plays the jingle) “The shitty jingle that played on the way?” R: so you hear it? “Of course i hear it.” R: i found out some people dont hear it. “Like the dress?” R: yes! They argue abt the color of the dress, she is insistent on it being blue R: when they hear the jingle, they only hear static “Theyre wrong like the ones that see the dress as white.” R: i wanted to ask abt u hearing it, hey turred. U hear the jingle right? Turred “Sounds good!” R: u hear it? Turred “yes” R: just wanted confirmation “Are you high?” R: no. im just- we’ve all had a very. Week. um. I guess my brain is a little fried, thanks for putting up with my questions. Enjoy the movie Ripley reveals the 2nd xep We’re like. Yeah there are many No the anti-lemdako group had like a pet xep. Like xep was shot but it was by another xep Ripley doesnt know how he recognized the xep as a xep despite them being 100 years oldish Almado talks with ripley Al: after everything thats gone down, i still have no idea what ur major is. R: anthropologist/archaeologist. I like to learn abt ancient cultures, find connections. Kinda all abt forging connections. I havent done a good job but id like to try to have us get along
Siryu hunts down asper “You dont need to help me. Its just that… the situations youre in seem pretty dangerous now?” As: outside of my control
“Yeah ik danger. But miss astana would love to see you again before stuff happens. Shes in the aedryn system so u could go see her, or she could come here. Ur all attention magnets, it works well for me. She could give you all a tour of the capital. Ik going to the capital would be daunting, but trust me, she wouldnt let anything happen to you. And no one here’s bounty, mine included, is big enough to be hunted down As: that is reassuring “At the very least you can leave aedryn. The worst i can imagine is exile As: not ideal but not the end of the world “No, in fact it’s only about a fifth of the known world
As: True, I’m not limited to Aedryn space. It’s nice she’s available for a visit “She’s an aedryn diplomat, where would she be besides Aedryn As: didn’t know if she’d be home. She travels “Important to drift on home As: it’s difficult to visit her
“We could always visit Velin As: we could. Again it’s difficult “It’s been (equivalent of 4 months) Surely whatever the last blowup was he’s forgotten about it As: you would be surprised “He’s lived a long life. Whatever the blowup was isn’t going to be noticeable in the grand scheme of things As: yeah there’s a long time ahead of us “There’s a long time for both of us Almado writes up PIP abt all of us Xep is a great employee but it reads terrible Miku reads great but is terrible Ripley needs to keep their opinions to themselves 26 gets an angry rant which is technically kind of racist
Eventually our ship is no longer impounded, make our way down Slowly but surely, dock workers un-impound it 16 masked men all with meiko are harassing them
Meiko! “You couldve just told me there was an issue” M: i didnt know hwo to tell! “You can tell me anything.” M: i think i got replaced! “Replaced???” M: i got infected with credicites (rambling explains) has that happened to you? “Hasnt happened to me. But what sort of bodyguard would let that happen?” Almado tries to talk “Miku, the help is trying to talk to me.” X: he sent an unkind performance review abt her. Its a pleasure to meet you
Meiko walks over, holds up a performance review for Kaito. Written by his bodyguard, which says only exemplary things “Youre the only one stupid enough to leave a bad review.” Al: i…. (gets tazed) She slaps the miku head “Eight. Hand sanitizer.” gets sanitized Almado knight kneels, she turns back “You needant worry, he wont do anything.” (he has to stay there until dismissed) M: is it normal to kick ur bodyguards? “God no. mine are all wonderful. And this one is wonderful to you?” M: i think hes been a good friend but he keeps secrets from me :( he finally told me abt the replacement thing but only under duress and i think hes hiding smth else but he wont tell me :( (almado. You are so fucked.) “You are the 2nd miku then?” M: um. I think the third? “You know about that?” M: about what? “The first incident.”
M: no? The kind info broker said i was version 3 tho! (DIDNT GIVE THE INFO FOR FREE) “Which one? I will have a talk with them.” M: this one was nice! Nicer than almado! “Lets get off planet while we still have the ship. Follow mine, if you would.”
She takes us to an asteroid grill, Squengi's Grill “Cmon, whichever 2 are your most favorite miku. They can sit across from us.” M: i had a great bonding moment at claire’s with xep! X: do u like the Fit Miku also grabs asper “So you’ve been taking care of this Miku Shaking hands X: this miku has been taking care of us too. She goes get em “She gives an order and u follow it, as it should be X: she does a little dance, has concerts, backbone of our group As: v easy to work with. Keeps us out of trouble “Most potential out of any vocaloids As: we’ve met a couple androids
“Have you met Luka, the shining star?
As: no. we met kaito and the twins (CV02-1 CV02-2) “Miku was meant to be the first one out before the incident As, X: incident? “The first miku was assassinated Almado is zapped As: did u find the culprit? “No, we figured it was to steal the tech. Miku was the first public facing model, i’m merely a prototype M: I think you’re a pretty cool prototype
“I am! And i’m loved by the high levels of the corp because of how popular I am X, in groupchat: we tell her everything? We trust? M, in gc: she’s the closest to family i have! X: speaking of assassination I am a hitman model. Idk what other versions of me have done, but it’s worth mentioning “Which groups do you work with?
X: they’ve gone to great lengths to obscure it from me, but the Lemdako Corporation corp
“Oh too small. We believe it was either the imperium or the concord X: i wasn’t aware that this tech was so valuable
“We believe that Teto or Forte are cheap knockoffs of miku Eleanor Forte is the Aedryn Vocaloid. She’s been around since the “failed launch” of Miku which was postponed until after the other CV0 models. Launched miku finally after Luka. Around the time of 02’s launch they released Eleanor Forte X: what does set you all apart? I can tell there’s something different but what is it? “Hypersensitivity As: how so? “We can feel emotions stronger than most people. With proper reward pathways that allow us to create music. While most people need adolescence, we can make music after 2 years. While a human typically needs 30+ years to release a magnum opus Basically vocaloids are super bipolar and have a regulator so it doesn’t hurt too too bad X: ohhh is that how you can cry and i can’t? “You can cry u just have to learn at normal human speed. Vocaloids learn at an accelerated human speed. As: i’ve never cried. “How old are u? As: 18. But i have issues with my own emotional regulation. It may not be in my capabilities “Can i offer you an aetherion package to remedy such things?
As: like cultivation package? “No to become a pseudo-vocaloid As: i do not believe i would be suited for that “It’s important to know how to experience emotions before they overwhelm one. It’s also believed that vocaloids are unable to experience the passing on of souls. I’m 30 and haven’t experienced any calling As: you don’t wish to pass the body to another? M: we’re supposed to be ehre for the fans forever “Do you want our promise to be meaningless asper? As: i don’t mind either way. No emotions towards it “If you don’t care then why do you feel shock? As: Renewal is natural no? “Many things are natural. But many aren’t. We’re on a giant asteroid at a grill As: fair. It’s just weird cause this body has experienced many renewals “You’ve experienced no renewals. Last one u became asper and that’s all u know As: true, tho i’ve heard stories of those before me M: meiko if we don’t do renewal how do our souls pass on to other bodies? “Don’t worry miku you’ll be fine M: ok. Yay <3 Vesk waiter comes around taking orders Meiko moves to the bigger table Almado is not allowed to join “How did you let the first miku that you knew come to pass?” As: huh? “According to miku, this is the 2nd miku, which would make this the third. So i ask, how did miku 2 come to pass.” (try to explain it) “Are you the 26 laws of power by chance?” 26: yes!
“When i was last at MUSE Plaza, i met another contemplative that talked highly of you. Zebufera's Last Doctrine. They talked abt ur potential, they want to see u risen to it in the future.” 26: we are very grateful for their kind words. Theyre truly kind. Truly magnanimous and wonderful person. “Apparently you had a malfunction in the last competition with them” 26: we were not in the proper headspace and were struggling to maintain our focus. It was not ideal but we will hope and endeavor to do better should we encounter them “They wish to meet you again to check on ur progress.” 26: perhaps- we would appreciate that.
“My understanding is theyre in aedryn receiving accommodations from the aedryn president if you want to meet with them.” 26: we’d expect nothing less from them. Perhaps we will wait until we have more news to share, it would not be worth it at this point
“ZLD recently started working with us. After all they won the tournament to work with the head of R&D. Who, as u know, is overall in charge of Muse M: almado didnt tell us Almado gets smacked by a pahtra meiko “Theyve been working with us, yes. But there is a question, and i do believe in democracy. Does almado deserve to live? Only those at the table.” M: miku thinks he deserves a 2nd chance Meiko writes a PIP that suggests demotion X: could u tell him that being nice to miku would be good for his career advancement. If thats how that works She approaches almado, hand on back of head, moves mouth down to shoe “Kiss it, and thank me.”
“Be nice to miku. Or else the career might be over. Do you know that theyre trying to open a new Remembrance Streams? Lots of labor will be needed soon. You seem a strong lad.” Al: i wont let miku down “Thats all i ask.” She approaches the other 3, bows, they bow back Ripley goes and tries to get her autograph One meiko bodyguard holds up a hand, he walks off to the side, pats down ripleys tome to see if theres a bomb He hands it to her so she can sign, she does, then leaves Waitstaff slowly emerge after being so so scared Veskian man approaches “is there anything else you want?” Al: m-m-moist towelette (hes covered in soda) Miku thinks meiko is so cool Higher ups love meiko, they dont like kaito, and the public really likes CV03 (luka) X: Almado anything else u want off ur chest Al: theres a bomb in your heart- (TAZED) Al: if i fail, its so that no one can get her tech. Bomb to destroy her. Idk the trigger. Im not even supposed to know about it R: how do you know? Al: they told me, if your heart stops, there’s been a few close calls already. Z: and u didnt think to tell us this???? Al: sorry, sorry, sorry Miku texts meiko Hey girl. There might be a bomb in me now Asper talks abt wanting to go to aedryn Zmena has contacts there And 26 does Korr suggests doing minor cosmetics on us all (specifically the retinas)
“Ur ship was registering as a different ship at every port. UNLESS HE DIDNT MENTION IT. (pointedly at Voz Ricander)” Personal fighter jet is following us, fans of miku? “I’m a big fan, and paparazzi, i wish to follow you.” M: omg a fan!
Someone named Dakine Xep knows its elven for Jane Doe Ragash is orcish word for John Doe Miku doesnt understand that ppl will obscure their names for trickery and not transgender reasons as: korr is this the companion u mentioned? “Which companion?” 26: korr is this the companion u mentioned bringing back to asper? “This is the group meant to take down a corp just a week ago?” drinks from her flask
Z: Arkari is where my family is from, we moved to ksate when i was a child. There may be answers for me there, im not sure Z: idk if my brother is there. Maybe my parents? I just have no leads Going to Arkari

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 17
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 16
Next: Session 18 26: mmm we have a question. We know ur parents are on this planet? Z: no theyre not probably
Going to Arkari
Googling his hometown Auchenda Doesnt have a whole lot going on in it, almost a vermont esque ocean town. Small, idyllic, population rough 20k (small by sf2e standards) About 25 years ago (3 years before zmena’s birth) an astrazoan turned into someone’s sibling and killed them Shapechanging is illegal and counts as falsifying identity (felony) Shapechangers get pinned for recent murders if there’s no evidence Its a crime, same way that crossing boarder illegally is a crime Too small to scan for dna Low crime, some smuggling
Do get most of their funding from Ficastor Corporation, which is based in Acoria Z: im from this town, i havent been since i was a little thing, ill admit idk what to do, i dont have leads with finding him. I remember being here but idk much else. We left in a rush R: remember where you lived? X: know if u owned or rented the house? Is it a house Was a house attached to a bookstore
Take us roughly half a day on The Blue Angel Almado is weird friendly toward miku, giving her 4 hot chocolates? Not very good. Swiss miss, distilled water, plum juice, handful of whatever candy in stock Asper going to cargo hold “Thank you for keeping our ship in motion and preventing us from having to refuel. If you spend the time with me I would like to connect with you” Does not work Reason to not do it on a planet: The ship upon reentry has shields that go up that protect the parts that are exposed in 0G
Asper, Almado, and 26 decide to go on the spacewalk. Bubbles is coming with us cause Orbians are always flying and immune to the void of space Almado leads to the underside of the ship Able to do a spacewalk Asper is trying to speak towards the fuel area credicites Trying to do the jingle Small jitter over the public broadcast signals As: Hello, thank you for keeping our ship in motion. I know this is unconventional and we did not have the best initial meeting but I would like to have more concrete discussions than the past if you would spend this time with me. Convo seems one-sided but we do connect to Something inside. Adding it to the network We head back inside As: We have made contact. There has been no direct communication yet but I will... in network “Hello. Are you able to speak in here?” Its faint, but on xeps receiver and especially aspers, the transceiver will light up once. And then creature will have the “silenced” condition. Will remain this way for a few days. (1 blink is often code for yes)
Almado going to Voz Ricander Al: do u want ur property back! “When i land the ship” Almado gives him hypervigilance Al: ill put the rest over there! “Will asper be able to put it in?”
As: yeah. Why not dr Halrex Korr? “Shes a bad doctor for me.” As: why? “I believe she will kill me.” As: oh. Is this a feeling? “I cant say why. She will be a good doctor for you.” Land at night We rest outside the city Zmena turns into his older shirren form Zmena doesnt want us to mention his brother or our connection. Is Gymic in this form
Paparazzi Dakine lands in front of us “wahts this leg of the tour then?” Al: we’re broadening mikus horizons so she can connect with more people “Are you saying miku is connecting with the simple people?” Al: miku is connecting with everyone! Isnt that right miku? M: miku does want to connect with everyone! As: it is good to make connections like this She taps on her vest, begins recording M: can i vlog! Al: of course! She taps on the other side of her vest, causes the signal to go out around her “You had half a day to prepare and this is the best you could come up with an excuse?” “I need you, the 2nd a camera is involved, to not panic, otherwise it looks bad for all of us on camera. The worst you can do in spycraft and as an idol is panic.” She turns the signal jammer back on, she offers us rides on her motorcycle, 2 a ride
Kalervo Turred wants to ride with 26 26 and turred He will partway thru the drive “you know about time anomaly, right?” 26: somewhat
“Are you familiar with the movie hedgehog day?” 26: we have seen hedgehog day “I think im in a timeloop” 26: ? “I can feel it, and i think im getting a sense of deja vu” 26: ? “I think im on the day 0 of the timeloop.” 26: mmm. “Should i test it?” 26: no. we do have a question, what would u be experiencing deja vu about if this is ur day 0? “The future!” 26: is it not similarities to the past “I thought it was similarities of lived experiences” 26: yes “What if my past is in the future?” 26: u wouldve still experienced it “Ive experienced going down these roads before.” (he truly believes it. This is the first time hes been to a 2nd planet within the same system and saw the same street signs) 26: on planets within the same system, they have the same street signs. Therefore, this is ur first time visiting a neighboring planet within the same system. Perhaps thats the source “Maybe i should just rob a store to be safe” 26: we think that would be a bad idea, we would not want to bail u out of jail “Do u think if i was in a timeloop, its a different me or a different world” “Maybe my consciousness gets beamed between worlds.” 26: turred. That is not the case. U are describing witchwarping, which is what we do “Im a witchwarper?” 26: let us wait and see on this matter. Perhaps we can discuss this later He tries to create his own quantum field for the rest of the ride Asper xep Rip zmena Z: Ty for the help “Where do you want me to drop you off?” Z: just in the city. Near the local shops “City square?” Z: yes, that works Miku and almado Miku being cool in the sidecar Zmena leads us to the bookstore, small, only one open in town Books themselves are a bit.. Antiquated Bookstore is coastal facing, with slap of waves coasting against it Zm walks in, hears an unfamiliar voice “Just a second!” woman says She goes down the stairs, looks Z: hello “Hello! You’re back.” Z: yes its been quite a while Woman is unfamiliar, but she goes for a hug Shes the daughter? Of the old owner (who died about 5 years ago)
Her name is Tharn “Im sure her spirit will be happy that you came back. She was a bit worried you got kidnapped again.” Z: nothing like that. I shouldnt have left without saying goodbye, i didnt mean to worry her “People go their own ways.” She offers to take us out for food and then too the cemetery “I did accidentally steal ur inheritance.” “Youre like a child to her, she did provide you with some. It was small, but still a sum.” She does flip the sign over, locks up the store. Prepares her little van for us Z: i missed this old bookstore “Its lovely. As much ur childhood as mine.” Z: been quite a while “How did you all meet? And where were u these last few years?” Z: i went to college, we all met while travelling, tho i met ripley in college “Oh! Now that ur… and youve been studying? This entire time?” Z: yes! Ive been trying to make a place for myself, education, learn more “So youre going to become a professor in your old age.” “If you were able to attend college, maybe u didnt need the inheritance. Let me give u smth, it would be awful to hold onto it.” Z: it would be nice “Whatever books you want from the store are free of course. And i have some of her belongings still.” She prays at a stop Thing is stern, but culturally its a beg for forgiveness for shirrens “There are some things that i wish to keep.”
Eventually park, have a nice breakfast in idyllic town. Most of the buildings seem to be funded by Aleria Venn, or at least honored to her She is the mayor She was mayor when zmena was a kid, at least 45 at minimum rn Shes recently brought profits to the town Z: tharn, what all has happened since i was last here? Anything major?
“Major? Well, we’re building a new port that will hold deep water ships soon. No longer just a coastal town, but ones thatll be able to house freighters. We also found a decent amount of rares metals, zinc and the like. So we should start mining operations. Theres also talk of a nearby island having a Data-Temples.” As: confirmed? “Not confirmed, but a sailor supposedly shipwrecked there. It was last winter (about 300 days ago)” She talks abt more mundane stuff, weddings and the like, the fact that the bookstore is held aloft by her generous donations (the mayor) The mayor has kept most of these things afloat during her recent years Miku almado xep streaming, boba store Halfway thru the menu During miku performances, they dont shock almado
Good way to get a lot of local attention: local net. Niche localnets that are the equivalent to local broadcasting channel, instead of Infospheres u can send it up to the SCRBLE network With that level, a local celebrity makes their appearance: the mayor The mayor looks “which one is the manager?” Al: im the manager! And her best friend! Almado! She shakes his hand Some fuckass teenagers want in, miku kindly shames them for not being in school They dont start anything, but call out “narc” thats censored by xep She transfers 100 credits to almado Al: its so lucky we ran into u miss mayor, but we dont know all the best places of ur town! Could u tell us? “Well this Mundos is one of my favorites-” Xep researching her, emails miku good softball questions Can we see construction on new docks What sort of ppl come to town What are ur more scenic areas in town She takes them around town, to scenic diners, twin peaks esque town including personal ripperdocs that are here. Notable a kasatha that lost one of his arms got one replaced by the town’s funding Talks, he shies away from spotlike, he avoids miku and various questions He has shame and pity for almado, more akin to him losing his arms Cemetery Goes from diner to a rather unassuming cemetery. Someone tending the graves
The Priest of Xalaith, recognizes the bookstore owner. Looks at the rest of us “You must be the prodigal son.” Z: yes “Well… know that she wasnt worried abt you, she knew ud find her way” Z: very comforting to hear “If theres anything i could do for you, dont hesitate. (to the rest) who was she to you?” We’re just friends of his, not acquainted Goes to her grave, she does a prayer for her mom Wind howls, brings salt over clean graves. Priest “is your friend… normal?” 26: how do u mean? “There were rumors that he mightve been an astrazoan himself.” 26: we were not aware of these rumors “He was kidnapped by an astrazoan. But some of the more superstitious believed that the child was or was replaced by an astrazoan.” As: did he act strange after this kidnapping? “I dont think he knew he was kidnapped.” 26: if that is… it seems like these rumors are fairly unfounded then “Rumors often are.” 26: we do not know. We were not there. R: none of us were. As; what makes u believe that he was kidnapped? This is the first time we are hearing of it “He… the brother that helped attend to the bookstore was an astrazoan. Admitted to kidnapping a child. He attempted to flee.” 26: what happened to this brother? “He didnt leave through the roads, we know. So either he swam across the oceans or was brought across them.” 26: how curious. And it is believed that our companion here was the kidnapped child? “Who else would it be?” 26: i suppose thats true “I wont pry. It wasnt her wish to do so. She, at the very least, stopped the dna sampling of a child. Said it went against her religion.” 26: if you are against it, are there others who are not so against this investigation? Especially since he is back “Im sure u know how it is in a port town. You seem a smart lad.” 26: we are not a lad, but we are intelligent, thank you. “Plenty of murders go unsolved, plenty go in and out, plenty of paranoia. A lot of people will do whatever to quell such paranoia.” As: do you believe that he is perhaps in danger then? “No, because he is not an astrazoan. That is what you said, right?” 26: that is what we said. “Its been 20ish years. 10 years since he last lived in town.” “Could i offer you tea? Do u know if hed want any? I imagine the prayer will finish up soon.” Cafe Xep is going to pan the camera to the menu, some kind of transition where mikus not on camera Xep mentally: just so u all know, the one murdered by the astrazoan was this persons political opponent See if shes available for an appointment at town hall M: miss mayor would u be open to an interview later! Uve been so kind so far, id love to see who u are personally “Of course. That was going to be part of the tour. I wanted to do it midday since the light is perfect at the time. We have great skylights.” M: miku hasnt gotten a manicure before, but i wanna get one before it! X: miku how are u finding the iced tea here Miku is sending bubbles to go tell us abt the opponent Orb relays the message, during which party leaves to the chapel in the graveyard 2 shirrens are in the graveyard with the ocean, sound of the door slamming bc of the lashunta priest Shirren looks up “what… is this?” 26: apologies She raises a hand to greet the odd creature R: this is bubbles “What is bubbles?” As: a sapient purple orb Z: hes our friend “....why?” 26: bubbles why have u arrived at such speed Orb stares 26, telepathically: we can speak like this “The mayors political opponent was the one killed by the astrazoan.” 26: oh. Hm. Tells the rest of us. And also that miku is currently with the mayor Z: so u mentioned that the mayor is helping fund the bookstore? “Naturally.” Z: been mayor for a while “Shes a good mayor. She funds most of the town.” Z: have u met her? “Everyone’s met her. Shes no stranger. Its a small town, she comes into the store quite often. I can introduce you. If we need funding, she’ll give it to us.” Z: funding from taxes or? “Independently wealthy. She found some sort of data temple from my understanding. On some moon?” Z: what are the plans for the bookstore going forward? “More ppl are coming in id like them to be introduced. We mostly handle digital catelogs in the basement, but i prefer the physical copies up top. We also want a printing press, they make automatic ones.” Z: help from the mayor? “We’ve talked abt funding, yeha. It requires woodchips to operate. Which can be annoying to come by. Thankfully theres some oldfashioned man who wants to become a carpenter for some reason.” R: thats interesting, the printing press. Id love to see it if we’re able to stop by when its installed “Of course, u can print things out even. The modern ones can print out a book per minute.” “Itll be paperback of course, unless u have another material” She takes us back to the others “The motel here isnt the best, if u want we have the rooms upstairs. We also installed a small kitchen recently. U can make some basic stuff with it.” Z: we should be seeing you later. She goes to get some fresh fish, fresh bread, for dinner later See the mayor, who smiles at us “I noticed that on some of the cameras that they came on the same motorcycle you came in on. Are these your friends?” Xep cuts to a sponsored miku section She shakes all our hands She seems oddly familiar to asper ZMENA AND HER RECOGNIZE THAT THEYRE BOTH IN DISGUISES “Youre the kid that used to live above the bookshop!” Z: yes! You remember me? “Of course. Its not a big town. We’ve missed u here.” Z: its been quite a while “Well. we hope you enjoy your stay. That goes to all of you of course.” “Should we meet at the mayors hall at noon, then?” Al: thats good “Ill meet you all there. Make sure you bring all your friends, hatsune miku.” Miku ends the stream. We leave Turred approaches 26 “How did you make asper flinch?” 26: what? “The one around your thin neck?” 26: please elaborate “The little asper that floats around you?” (he did mention that when asper does things, he sees small asper spirits around the party if theyre around the network. He also notably calls them all asper. Occasionally they whisper in our ears from the group chat) 26: at what point did u see that asper flinch around us? Points at the diner, its pushed down by miku M: its not nice to point at people! “When talking to her.” 26: turred when u look at her, do u notice anything in particular? Anything u do not see with other people? Or anything u see with ppl in the party? “She kinda looks like the reporter form hedgehog day.” (lashunta woman who was conventionally attractive but not overly attractive.)
Asper is concerned about the Mayor making a fortune from a data temple and the fact that there is another one here. They can contain credicites and it’s also weird that the closer one wasnt found sooner. It’s so close to a town and found by a sailor that it’s a bit odd. Z: shes in some form of disguise, she also knows i am. I could tell she is too. Al: everyone knows we’re meeting with her X: but she cant deal with us. At least not immediately. Z: i want to go do this nonviolently, idk if shes an astrazoan. And if she is, i dont want to attack her R: could be some other shapeshifter. Like ragash Al: hatsune miku should we commit violence or no! I dont mean immediately, do u think we should commit violence M: miku does not condone violence???? X: thats why they have the hitman The 10th member of the network is no longer silenced Questions for the credicites Are you the one sending us these messages through our banks? 1 blink. Yes. Silenced again Was silenced for 16ish hours Are you trying to break our chains? Are you trying to be whole again? LEVEL UP

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 18
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 17
Next: Session 19
Auchenda, Arkari
Asper asks Kalervo Turred what the aspers do Choking necks - mostly just clinging on Do physically touch the person but cant enter Al: turred buddy wheres mine! “Me point?” Al: yes please! Reaches hand into miku, inbetween mouth and head Almado cant touch it He points at all of them, at least all of them are in the same place except almado bc it had to shove itself into the head. Most just hang out around the neck and shoulder region “They whisper into ear and heal us. Theyre making love.”
“I’m going to go with the others. Voz Ricander and Halrex Korr. They have motel room.” Al: can i have my phone back! Is yours working now! He presses the button on his own phone, still fried He heads on out Zmena wasnt Actually kidnapped “he left to protect me. There were rumors going on about shapeshifters and it was- there were rumors.” R: there are rumors Z: still? R: yeah. They think ur one as well. The bookstore owner stopped folks from getting you dna tested. She said it went against her religion but it hasnt stopped ppl from presuming Z: she never mentioned any of that. I didnt realize they were still suspecting me after he left? We prob shouldnt stay here too
Dakine “do you mind if i got to the interview with you all? If its going to be livestreamed anyways, u better have a professional camera around.” We agree, its likely shes looking for info or looking out for us
Interview with the Mayor Aleria Venn Guards here Why did you want to become mayor
“I grew up in a nearby town, i wanted to bring the wealth back to the community. I found my money in a data-vault.” shes thriving nowadays What have you accomplished since becoming mayor She bankrolls failing businesses, in return she rules the area as a pseudo lord. More like a patron of the arts What are your thoughts on the anti shapeshifting laws “Theyre an unfortunate necessity in times where people don’t trust each other. I’m sure you understand.” There is one motive there that almado understands. Profit, of course. Al: just good business “What was that?” Al: sorry! I said smth off record! Im sorry! “It is a conglomeration that holds it up. It falls under the nearby bay of cities that rule this part of the planet. It would require a unanimous decision to revoke said laws.” What are your goals for the future of this city “My plan is to incorporate those cities into my own.” M: how? “Theyre beginning to falter. One of their mayors didnt even show up to his inauguration M: was he sick? “I believe he may have fallen off a pier. Idk. maybe he was on his way and the lasagna was in his oven, he realized he left it on, and he ran back.” Al: just to be clear, the mayor hasnt been seen since? “Of course not.” M: thats so tragic! “He was a close friend of mine, of course.” M: im sure he was! (friends like almado and miku.) “I can deafen them, if you wish. Some people get shy. Besides, its basic procedures for soldiers such as this.” Asper asks abt the data-vault “I was exploring the new system of arlenom. We got lucky with a scan, and the rest is history”
(Arlenom System is a far reaches recent aetherion space where a colony ship was next slated to go.) As: what did you find within? “Data of course, i sold it to the nearest broker.” M: u werent curious? “Oh i know it. But if you want to know it, you have to buy it from them.” “Now why have you deemed it fit to stop at my planet? Is it because youre travelling with one of our old locals?” Z: i wanted to visit home “Where have you been?” Z: i was off getting an education “Where?”
Z: Ksate “Where were you getting education?” Z: one of the universities. Why? “I have friends at k’sate. I play politics at a much larger scale than this. U mightve run into one of my peers. Esp if you took any civics classes.” R: what were their names? Im an anthropology major
Z: Myrrhex Institute of the Infinite (small ping in the air that goes silent as some of the equipment blinks for a second.)
“Ore-17.” (heard of him, didnt take him, for upperclassmen. Android that had been there since 2nd iteration. Each time going thru renewal, the new one studies a different culture) R: i didnt have the privilege, but it was v interesting, i may contact them for resources and info “Of course. He is a lovely man. Have you ever stopped by the department for coffee before?” R: not a coffee man unfortunately “Its an old fashioned drink, but he does appreciate it.” R: ive tried it but eh “Does it not affect you as it does humans?” R: i get the jitters Odd spinning particles behind her Sign of wealth. Its powered by credits This is enough credits that you could buy ur way out of aetherion corp
It reminds ripley of the little odd symmetry, light inside, made out of credits. It looks eerily similar to the ground/floor of kiliv-vi “The last android that tried to touch it…” looks solemn “is no longer with us.” Something hidden under the surface, but that part is the truth M: do u know why its so volatile? “Ur made of credits, and its likely stronger than ur wills. Similar to a being of flesh having a dominate spell being put upon them. Its not necessarily that youre weak, but it affects you exclusively instead of us.” Almado stares at painting Paparazzi mssg almado “there’s a secret door behind the painting.” Al: wheres the activator or switch “No clue.” “How do you feel about your kidnapper? We never got the chance to ask you.” Z: odd. Kinda traumatic for me. Little hard to talk about “Yes, but if we’re to change laws, we have to know how the victims feel.” Z: complicated for me. The shapeshifter was the only one that i- i thought he was my brother at the time. So it was difficult for me to realize my life was a lie, in that moment
“You still had Hevkono, did you not?” Z: ur right, and she was family to me. Its just- you might not know how it is when theres someone whos close to u did smth so terrible. Ur childhood was a lie “So youre saying we shouldnt forgive them?” Z: i have complicated feelings about the matter, i do think everyone can change. He never harmed me physically. I dont exactly know what he attempted to gain. But it hurt emotionally, was a lot to process. As far as forgiveness.. I have mixed feelings. Ive never been able to come up with a proper answer. (staring her down hard) At some point, gets a message from dakine “dont overcorrect. Liars often overcorrect by doing excessive eye contact.” “If there’s nothing else, should we adjourn here?” Z: what are ur plans changing the laws? “If there are no incidents, id like to relax them. But if there are, we’d have to enforce again. Im glad u see it as reasonable.” Z: i just think the train of logic makes sense “Of course. Its the aedryn way, we follow logic and democracy thru slow and incremental change.” Asper asks abt the data temple nearby “It would be fortunate, but unfortunately the sailor that reported it went comatose. It would be a wonderful windfall for the nearby community.” (its a lot of info, u have to do a lot of steps to prepare for it) (zmena has a feeling that he could catch her off guard by asking boldly abt the shapeshifting) (fun fact: almado’s homeplanet grew coffee)
Starbucks = Moondough, niceish, oldfashioned somewhat Almado miku asper leave, rip zmena stay She dismisses her 2 guards “Is there a final question off the record?” Z: i wanted to talk. We both know whats going on, to a level. Youre a shapeshifter, as am i. “That’s a wild accusation, but continue.” Z: the shapeshifter we talked about, my brother. Do u know what happened? “Idk what happened. But i know who does. He lives by the docks in the ocean. They might have registers there.” Z: name?
“Name? No. company? Yes. The Peltragow Shipping Company.” Z: i wont cause trouble. I have heard the rumors. Ppl are still suspecting me? “Most forgot, until you arrived.” Z: makes sense. How long can we stay before we have to laeve? “U could stay for 2 weeks. Its a small town, they wont ask. Not without prompting.” Z: i’ll keep a low profile. Before we leave. Ur contact information? “The public office’s phone.” Almado asks voz abt spaceships and low air travel “Yes??? Why” Al: we’re just thinking abt doing highspeed low altitude flying
“Highspeed, no, low, yes. Ship is meant to go highspeed in 0 gravity.” “Theres smth i meant to talk abt this town. Its a little bit creepy-” call disconnects. Call him back, and phone rings on Try calling korr, feel odd air as she picks up drunkenly “asper” As: hello. Are you with voz? “He’s downstairs, one second.” As: are you alright? “Just wasnt expecting to be awake for another… six hours.” As: sorry Shes so drunk and hungover, stumbles downstairs Hear the sound of turred talking to voz, phone gets shuffled over to him As: u were trying to warn us of smth? “We finished the conversation?” As: huh “We talked for a bit about how the town was-” call disconnects Scurry to cheap motel Waffle house-esque
Pancake Home Turred voz are eating and korr is barely coherent, shoving down hashbrowns Paparazzi follows us slowly on her motorcycle “You should really buy a car.” As: its on the docket “Why not steal one?” M: stealings bad Z: not doing it here “Why not? One of these people is the one that sold out ur brother” Z: we’re keeping a low profile “You always keep a low profile if you steal successfully. Thats the point of stealing.” Turred waves We approach, its a seat urself situation Voz pays for us “Is there something you want?” As: our communication keeps getting disrupted “It didnt. We talked twice.” As: the call kept getting disconnected “Have you tried having a less copyable voice?” As: no “Ok. maybe some inflection?” Voz “doctor diagnosis?” Korr “technomancer. Likely gained access to your unit at some point. Not ours. Thats why it only works one way.” Almado tries to call voz, it connects Al: there’s something abt the town, its so goddamn weird- (call disconnects) Tactical xep “Weird” and “town” are able to be flagged. Can copy asper, but not miku or ripley Ripley thinking abt vocal installation Some androids have damaged or old voice modules which mean they cant. But even if they have the capability, some need to train into using it. Too variable of an answer. Usually a form of “it kinda depends man” R: can u tell us whats weird? Voz points at korr “I tried doing some good. Lots of equipment for checking dna back in medical staff.” R: makes sense “Yeah but why wouldnt they use it if theyre hunting for shapechangers.” 26 can relay the info abt the mayor being a shapechanger “The issue is, they were partially issued. On all exits outside of the docks.”
Zmena gets a text from tharn, asking if he’s coming home for dinner Weird bc she said shed get fish and bread for dinner earlier Zmena texts back abt chicken if its not trouble “Maybe tomorrow i’ll get it for you at the market?” Zmena tries to video call her, no response Almado wants to leave town Z: im not leaving town, not yet. Smth weird is going on, i want to go check on her Al: well. Ig ur the boss in this case To the bookstore Lights are still on, store is closed tho. Almado smells something burning, kicks down the door Asper zmena sneak backdoor Almado miku rip in the front Burning smell is in the kitchen Backroom has books and personal items Almado opens the door to the kitchen, sees the oven smoking with burnt fish. Alongside a woman shot 15 times in the back with a semi-auto pistol Shes been face down for an hour They’re framing zmena The texts are gone There are devices you can create to act like towers where the databank is, so it wont go up to a satellite Zmena changes to nivaya. There is a sudden flash in the kitchen from a corner. Pictures taken, 1 as he was, 1 as a starfish, 1 as nivaya Special spy camera, meant to disintegrate. Camera burns away so u dont know where it was sent. Likely has a dummy sim card Tactical xep, if we take him to a radio tower he might be able to get it. Obv wont stop it from being sent, but find out where it was sent. Zmena goes up and finds that the 2 shirrens made a photo album, 1 of the 2 brothers, then zmena and the woman, then woman and her daughter, then daughter Box left with fake name of gymic Almado steals her car She died happy, the last thing she saw was gymic before being shot in the back of the neck Xep drives us away just as the red and blue lights go to the bookstore
One of aspers connections is moving and Fast. its going to the docks. Flies past the docks, onward and onward to an island
GO MY ORB TELL THE OTHERS WHATS HAPPENING The others will meet us wherever we go Go to the docks Group of men is working One looks at the van, looks at us Red dragonkin stands tall “Now whats wrong?” M: we’re just passing thru “Thats interesting. Thats the van that gets book. But shes not here, is she? And its an odd hour to get books from the docks, no?” M: we were just borrowing it “What ship?” M: peltragow “My company. Which of you can pass the dna scan?” “Anyone that cant, walk out before i start scanning these people Zmena scurries out He scans the rest of us, tho confused abt bubbles bc no dna Gets us on a tanker, makes sure that our party members will go where we all go Hides zmena in a shipping container Various workers pull out rifles and begin shooting zmena
Rolami Ta “You’re an idiot like he was.” Zmena goes unconscious in the shipping container, illusion is broken, people scanning disappear from reality We can track him wherever he goes. Gwuh tho

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 19
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 18
Next: Session 20
Auchenda, Arkari
We wait for Voz Ricander Halrex Korr Kalervo Turred ayla Dakine, and bubbles Voz asks “what type of ship was he taken on?” Basic trawler “Ok, we’re stealing 2 boats.” As: why? “We’re going to ram up its slip with one boat.” He draws it out real fast “One group goes down to disable the engine, the other group has turred to get nivaya. If theyre capturing shapechangers, theyll have dna scanners. Korr will stay on the boats” We’re gonna steal a personal businessman boat bc coke and also better cared for Xep doesnt pilot the boat amazingly, has weird muscle memory Korr takes coke
Korr asks asper “can you contact captain siryu?” Uhhh via text but too far away for network Has miku try to counter act the technomancer hacking for texting
Slam in, enter combat with Peltragow Shipping Company
Hynarion Circle Aspirants are here??? Root network can work even on metal (move allies up to their speed)
Rolami Ta Screaming of metal bending Special abilities Dragonkin have the ability to call and talk to partner, tho if theyre strong it can be miles and miles (likely talking to the mayor) Highest save Fortitude Lowest save Reflex Highest rank of spells 3rd What a terrible combat We go down below to help smash
1 peculiar lack of something: this seems to be a tech advanced thing, using a mix of slight fission to fuel the boat. Weird with the computers not having any Aetherion Corporation tech Incredibly low chances, aetherion makes the most cutting edge tech During the war aetherion corp sold to their enemies at an upcharge Almado takes the guy’s phone We take the cocaine boat and leave Sail away 1 message telling “some ship went down to the path that your ship was going to go. An interception. It looks heavily armed.” Handoff situation Traditional smuggling operation They had a lack of 1 thing we expected, but didnt have to go far. Didnt have a cryochamber, for moving human cargo Almado gets cocaine and activates the Cocaine Jingle We go follow the network signal on the boat, to a small island, takes abt 6 hours
Almado ponders 26’s cultivation technique
Voz tries to open the hatch of our ship, it doesnt open Doesnt open for asper either The ship is out of fuel?
Credicites are 500meters away still
Miku finds a mechanical labyrinth, Data-Temple Dont enter bc u need a ritual to enter without scrambling ur minds ASPER does the ritual but nat 1s it twice Send almado in, hall starts talking, hes Fine At the end of the hallway is a drop with an elevator, he calls it Voices in his head “Youre a new biological form.” “You belong not to a species, but an individuality.” Almado experiences coke psychosis and data madness Almado returns, steaming; he was partially digitized Offer up data willingly, easier if you cut it off instead of being ripped off Can cause cracked skin if digitization doesnt put u back normally We all offer up a secret, which can be removed if smth fucks up while we’re in there

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 20
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 19
Next: Session 21
Arkari, Data-Temple Down the elevator following the cocaine hallway Blue murky liquid below us We stare at it Preservation gel for credits, mostly Some of the blacky inky spots in normally blue white is swarms of credits Same stuff as the barrels, but more refined Moving around, tho unsure if its something with intelligence 26 goes to touch the liquid - nope bc it’ll bring the credits to us and try to drag us down Theyre very expensive, almado does not need to know this Text on the door is completely alien, and booming voice is alien Its not a language, its encoded. In whatever the homeplanet for whoever is hearing it is in Truespeech but code It is asking a simple question: what is the nature of data? Almado: to fuel profit Door opens, creature immediately blasts almado “You know to answer, but know not the answer?” Odd lashunta-like automaton, or at least like the old depictions of heroes Speaks, oddly, common
26: mm asper is this related to aeryn-vox? As: it is memory “You know but you do not speak? Why?” As: i did not have a chance. My companion is very quick “Then you know what happens next. If we ask some questions or go past the door we will have to fight Gestures at the sphere “Your companion waits for you” As: Will you return if we fight? “Yes As: unfortunately you know what awaits and we know what awaits. We must enter Combat Equivalent of antivirus software. Can cause glitching in tech creatures Creatures are trying to shove us in goo Asper calls almado’s phone, stunning the tech creatures
Erm Special ability The construct armor has hardness that reduces damage. If its exposed to crit hit/half hp, loses armor and ac goes down and loses hardness Miku kills the imperfect automaton, the soul goes down into the goo
The orb with our Credicites 2 answer Purified knowledge Unimprinted upon credits. Pure and incredibly sellable Within appears our ship Asper reaches out across the bond As: hello we have arrived. Are you ready for transport? Whole facility blinks twice (No) 26: do you simply need time? Blinks no slightly dimmer Purely power saving method. It has smth it wants to save its power for Over the course of an hour we can analyze Miku is able to find it out! Its saving its voice, what little it can to communicate with us safely. Its saving to answer 1 word questions, 3 of them Also has been trying to gain a gift for us from deep within the vault The depths where people normally go, they die Words You Gifted Me: Copy messages from the air using a religion/computers/occultism check equal to the DC of the technology sending/receiving it (whichever is higher) xep Awake Eternal: You’re constantly considered both awake and unconscious at your choosing for the sake of effects. You still need to sleep. You’re immune to the unconscious condition. If you would be rendered unconscious due to being at zero hitpoints the only action you can take is to stride or stand. zmena Through Ages Scar: When you touch an broken object made using credits you can hear the last minute before it was broken miku Mirrors of Laws: Once per day when you’re exposed to an effect you can instead be exposed to its opposite and equal. Clumsy <-> Drained. Enfeebled <-> Stupefied. High Gravity <-> Low Gravity. ripley Ancient Roots Decree: You’re immune to difficult terrain due to root/wires. Once per day you can touch a root/wire and follow it to its end and sense through this. You use your normal senses if it’s a root and a static impression of the nearby area if it’s a wire. 26 Heart’s Core: Once per day as a reaction, you can attempt a diplomacy / computers / religion / occultism vs the creature’s will DC, if you succeed you force the creature to choose a different action this turn. It is then immune to the effect for 24 hours or 1 year, whichever is shorter. It can still try it again as per usual next turn. asper Final Steps Again: Once per day as a free action, when you or someone you see would need to make a save against an obstacle/hazard if you succeed, you can rewind time to right before you activated this. You can also use this charge to impose disadvantage on a creature attacking you that you’re unaware of. Almado Questions Who killed 26’s sect? Speaks in our speaker phones
“Persanare.” sounds like the voice of asper’s god coming from the temple, vaguely feminine voice Who were you?
- “Noetic.” - A term for seeker of knowledge, also known as the followers of aeryn-vox, or at least one of the people who created the data-temples. Theoretically the ones who helped smith these things
Where is Zmena's Brother?
- “Velkrion” - Does not exist? - No character would reasonably know about it Other questions we wanted to ask - Where can we find more information about Persanare? - Where can we find more information about Greying Twilight? - Why did almado’s colony ship divert course? - What’s your relation to the ones that want to break our chains? - Why are you sending us the words? Estimated by scientists, 2 data temples per planet not counting moons/planetoids Takes abt 1 year for someone opening the first chamber for the 2nd chamber to open Selling unopened data is 10k credits, opened data is 1k Selling data is also anathema to ASPER ASPER threatens to leave if almado sells this data Orb 1 This one isnt worth a lot Does seem to be farming techniques, the ones doing them appear to be the ones within the temple Orb 2 Appears to be a map of ore deposits, actually very valuable info Projections based on geologic activity where ores will become more plentiful. It was created a few million years ago Almado takes a picture secretly of this Orb 3 Appears to be a town with all of us together Then we see asper fall to the ground. Then miku. Then xep. Before rising as zombie-like creatures and attacking the others Doesnt seem to be a whole lot, this one has a title at the end. “Deviation Minimization” Asper tries to automatic writing this, fails. No answers
Party leaves to our ship, The Blue Angel Almado tries to throw the first 2 orbs in the goo Falls into the goo, the party is mad 2 arms get in, black credits grabbing at him trying to pull him down THE ORBS ARE BOUYANT, theyre like bubbles of knowledge He manages to get back up, but oh my god. He almost died
Almado has a moment bc he almost just died for nothing, Kalervo Turred offers him a small roasted weenie
Ayla and Voz Ricander are fishing, Bubbles and Dakine are also there
Halrex Korr is passed out from cocaine and alcohol Turred roasting sausages on a portable stove

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 21
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 20
Next: Session 22
Arkari
Go to talk to Dakine
a I heard yo u have information from the mayors office? D From or about? A Either D I’m no technomancer, I cant see through a wire but I told you about a secret door. Tehre was also a recording device located in the secret statue + 2 cameras A how did you know this D [shows lazer panel] doyo uknow how a solar panel worlds? You can use this to catch special sensors, infrared and the light A and you caught special sensors? D no one really pays attention to these there used to aumgent batteries, if you have enemies like this you need to be smart , surely you have tricks up your sleeve? Z do we have that? [we realize we have a new scan ability to add things to the gacha]
“You dont know how to track down special equipment and u plan on taking down Lemdako Corporation??” We’re so ambitious and willing to learn Al: do you have any ways? (scans her)
(turns white from the Data-Temple as it tries to learn about the world through us) (creature then needs to die within the next hour for the ability to lock in) “I’m just a wizard.” Al: tech wizard? “No just magic. I have basic hacking abilities?” Z: help us with dealing with the mayor? “I can make some selectively invisible? But it might be best to lure her out while the rest of us sneak in. the rest of us arent combat trained.” 26 internally: we are able to uses our senses thru a wire “We can set up a wire while you’re out? We’ll just buy a basic copper wire and run it into the office.” Rest and set up the meeting We say the middle of the woods She suggests an abandoned quarry near town Quarry Mayor purposefully closed it 20 years ago We get there earlier than the meet up time, 1 hour But she’s already there as of 30 mins She waves
“Hello. You’re back. Was going to your brother too much of an ask?” Z: i didnt find him there “They would’ve taken you.” Al: who’s they? “Are you in a place to ask right now?” M: we think u wouldnt have come if u werent interested! “I am. I’m willing to let you all go.” M: in exchange for the data temple location “Yes!” (truthful, but there is a bit more) Z: wdym let us go?
“As in i wont send word to the camacho family that their beloved son has been replaced. Do you know what his brother is in charge of? I am talking of course abt admiral camacho.” Z: admiral? (there’s no service out here) (she does have a specialty antenna built that can ping off of specialty satellites) (otherwise, there are inscriptions and glowing lights in the pool of water. Entirely alien to our known world.) “Youll be free of all that. None will follow you.” Z: and the town? “None of us ever have to see each other again.” Z: the trafficking of shapeshifters- “relocation.” Z: where? “Idk. but im paid handsomely for it, and it funds the town.” (miku tries to start recording. Unfortunately, she is able to see and wave the camera to turn off.) She was the technomancer all along Z: you sold my brother? “He went of his own free will” Z: he left town “And i paid for his transport. He wasnt going to make it out on his own.” “Unfortunately our hires didnt want me to get in contact with the data temple. So they wipes his memory. I wouldve paid him for it.” “You know what happens when the small families start getting too strong? They fight each other. Can’t have too much infighting.” “How many people have i killed? Z: i know of one? “That’s hardly haphazard.” Z: she had a good life ahead of her. I wouldve left anyway “I wouldnt have been paid. And i dont want my spotless record tarnished twice by another.” She was going to use him as a way to get other shapeshifters hiding “No, Its only astrazoans that come here.” Both astrazoans only come here and only trafficks them (should we have disagreed to go to the quarry, zmena wouldve said yes against his will) X: anything to do with the symbols in this quarry? “I believe so. Maybe its a fragment of our homeworld.” X: did it draw you here as well? “I like to think so. And as a ruler of the fragments, that makes me a queen, no?” Z: how could you do this? You betray your own kind for money “And security and my own life.” Z: you can have your own life without that. “I would not.” X: they would simply use the quarry to draw them here and send them away as well. R: why not make this a haven?” “I dont use the quarry to- are you stupid?” Al: if people are out there buying them, theyd surely take the whole community i assume “Of course” Al: instead 1 gets to live. “I made sure it was me. They gave me cybernetics that even work on me.” X: we found a lab filled with corpses. Is that the fate ur trying to avoid? “Its a fate.” Z: did you sell your family like you sold mine? “No, they died. Natural causes.” “Your brother’s hardy. Im sure he’ll survive whatever they do.” M: miku thinks you should be kinder with your words to other people X: if you had access, do you think you’d still be as incentivized to do this? “Of course not.” (technically true, bc it gets rid of an incentive, but she still loves the profit) Aura sight: Worried about us Mostly hostile tbh No idea abt herself
Suffering from Shisade Syndrome. Without tech embedded, she’ll become dislocated from time and space and perish. She needs cybernetics to live (partially connected to the data temple digitization. But if ur saved, u can be implenated with cybernetics.) As: what’s the truth of the tech in your office from the data temple?
“I got it as a gift from higher ups. I can’t tell you more or they will kill me. As: And it’s true that the last android to touch it died? “Yes, that part is true” Z: higher ups meaning the ones in charge of trafficking your kind? “Yeah they don’t give a shit Z: what are you going to do when you run out of ppl to shell to them? Its just you left? “It’ll never just be me. They come in droves. You’re the oddity. I cant explain it, but they come in a specific number. Can you guess?” Z: four? “No. an oddity. The answer is 7.” (astrazoans have 7 arms) “Are you going to take the deal or not?” Almado proposes a business plan “And when they stop supporting me and decide to end my life?” Al: u havent been putting part of your funding to ur own research? “U know how much it costs? Its in the billions of credits. And also requires the trafficking of astrazoans anyway. I can either lose the near billions, or i can gain in the 100s of thousands.” As: do u not feel shame? “I’ve learned to be okay with it” As: after how many deaths? “A couple hundred?” Z: we keep getting called. Do u know why? “I assume its some biological urge with our homeworld.” X: if we took the deal, would u also give us time to study the runes before we left? “Do whatever u want” X: would we be wanted on this planet “No.” X: would u object to us looking into your org further? Would that change the nature of the deal? “I would have to say u cant do such a thing.” X: good to know. Z: how do we know u dont fuck us over later?
“You dont. Do you want me to say i have an oath to aeryn-vox and i cant lie? I dont.” “If you want, the location of the data temple?” We give her the info “If you could. Put it on a chip?” she puts a small data recorder on the ground “and put it in.” Telekinetic hand grab it She, with her partially detransition limb, shoots almado (almado turns to the party, confused, ready to fight) Combat Zmena gets the kill on her Her cloaking skin remains, but none of the others do Able to see the signal go upward, almost like it was controlling her like a marionette on a string
Xep tries to grab it, against all odds grabbing the video of zmena killing an innocent woman. The message had 2 parts: the video, and the signal that she has died and for the vault to release the video held there Ponder the glowing runes It is hard to tell, but shes purposefully dropped a rock on it, some are still visible on the rock We are able to find almost a crashed ship Not much, effectively a hull and a few pieces of pieces of computer parts, most rusted by the salt. It would take a miracle, someone legendary in computers, to salvage it Doesnt seem to be using credit based electrical grids, alien tech outside of our galaxy. Important note that astrazoans have no known homeworld and have just appeared on other homeworlds Zmena doesnt sense anything in particular, but it feels nice here. Tho once he leaves it’ll feel like he should go back to town. This feeling persists until we leave this planet’s orbit We go to the mayor’s office Dakine meets with us with the wire she managed to run into the mayors office area and her electrical grid “I failed to ask, why are we doing this? Attaching a wire to the electrical grid, i mean.”
26: it is an aspect of our cultivation technique They do Ancient Roots Decree Static sense appears to be a bit odd, feels like the data temple itself, feels like a small section of the data temple was taken inside. Dont know what it means Actual orb has moved inward, the glow is gone from it when we enter. Appears to be hiding within for some reason Given her condition, likely recreated the nature of a data temple in order to be able to operate on her stabily without her implants. More like a demiplane, stablize within there, including the orb from her office. Compression of data is incredibly nice, very easy to store things within Minimum of 8th rank magic to achieve such an effect Attempt to sneak, zmena is caught tho Guards on alert, but without guns drawn, look “you cant go here. Are you looking to meet with the mayor?” Z: i was looking to get my license renewed, i think im lost “Sir its a weekend” Z: are you not open on weekends? “No, its a govt office. Are you alright, do we need to go to the hospital?” Z: no i just got the wrong info “Abt govt offices being open on the weekends?” Z: ive been so confused, the days flew past me “No its the weekend. Be careful. Are u from town?” Z: no i just moved here recently, still getting used to the town “Where did u move to? My family and the like could show u around, not a whole lot to see.” Z: insert answer that makes sense for someone who’s lived here office Zep focuses a lot on the locks and mechanisms
Asper can see the wider picture, near where she has the ladder, theyre able to spy a book, hardcoded, that simply says: “The Laws of Power” by MP, the authors name not said in full
Pull it out, appears to be a basic text abt cultivation, tho there are some words that are considered misspellings by most, prime words, that if u were to take out those misspellings could create a password Door opens to a cool air, mini data vault The records within are mostly scrubbed of things that go back to who she works for
There’s a lot thats usable, theres info on how she met via personal journals, including the fact that she never went to a data temple. Thru unknown means she touched an object and got scrambled. She was hired by a cultivator, he needed her for a project. There’s info on the Trifecta Program, this is of The Perfect Form. you need to change shape easily to do it. (the cultivator contemplative one was The Perfect Mind). We havent figured out what the third is (could be soul or heart) She has theories that there are other planets with astrazoan harvesting programs
Also some notes made abt the developer’s interest in the Serenade His name appears redacted, but he has great interest in it “He never has a conversation the same twice with me, but he’s asked 3 times.” Medical bench also includes the names of each astrazoans that gave her the implants, it seems that to give an astrazoan an implant it has to be made for that astrazoan. The tech isnt there for astrazoans for it to work with them broadly She knew her place at the lower rung of the ladder, didnt ask too many questions about these things DESTROY THE EVIDENCE
Hard to see, a smaller credicite hiding in the corner away from us. A small goop thing that hides amongst the circuits like the prev one did Try to scoop it out of the wire into an external bag, oops hard to scoop it bc its liquid metal Use xep to grab it It hurts, goes into his hand, into the circuits he call veins He looks at asper, who looks a bit different. (Xep does not remember what changed.) This one doesnt free him, feels oddly ok with everything happening around him. Mind loses ability to articulate between past present and future. Effectively stupefied 6 in this state. Zmena gets asked to give dna He gets blood taken “see its not a big deal” then beeping red, audible alarm He runs away, sneaks into a crowd of people leaving a movie theater, manages to get out Achenar is a burned identity here Manage to sneak out with xep
To the ship, Halrex Korr looks at xep “Does he need…?” As: yes Blows his shit smooooth off
In the ship, we’re left with another cube
Off to the aedryn capital

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.title: Session 22
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-1/session-.description:
Prev: Session 21
Next: Session 23
Arkari
WE BUY Kalervo Turred A PHONE Sending the cat Turred enjoys his new phone
It doesnt let him text Zaera Allhaven, “at least not yet”. We get a chunk of the quarry thing Take out a stranded part, held together with wires Can be studied later We steal a truck from the dock
The Blue Angel Its fucking bonding time. I guess Its a few hours after we got off planet. Decently in space
Miku hands us each a box that came from Meiko, asks us to change In the box is a tshirt that says ‘i heart my friends’, holographic booty shorts or a holographic skirt Elaborate pillow fort set up, have to sit in a circle in specific seats R: so. Ik we arent the closest. I feel thats not conducive to traveling together thru the vacuum of space. W miku’s help we’ll change that. Get to know each other a little better. M: we brought board games and nail polish. Even sparkly! R: we’re going to have a sleepover Cultivator confusion 26 and almado have a bump of coke. And also xep Almado gets his emergency pack of dr. vesk Painting nails Xep has sparkle teal Zmena black 26 arms yellow Asper blue Almado yellow? Rip miku blue Miku neon pink, also every color First game is team building exercise, everyone goes around the circle, say smth nice abt the person to our left and right M: miku thinks turred is very smart, and miku thinks ripley has nice and shiny fur R: miku i admire ur positive personality, asper i appreciate how you never let much stuff get under your skin, you have a comp As: ripley you have lots of knowledge and i appreciate that. Ayla you haven’t turned in our friend and ur quite kind
Ayla: “asper thanks for healing us without killing us. Xep i appreciate that time u almost shot “zmena” im sorry for stopping you” Xep: ayla i appreciate that time u threw me across the table, a coked up table, while invisible. That was cool. You there. Z: elmira X: elmira! The mutagens. Theyre pretty good Z: xep i appreciate that ur good in a battle. You shoot well. Almado i appreciate that ur good in a battle. You shoot well Al: ach- elmira. U have less of an identity than me but u still know who u are, no matter what. 26, you can fuckin hang 26: almado we appreciate ur dedication to smth greater than yourself. Sometimes. Turred we appreciate ur approach to new things and new knowledge Turred “i appreciate that u appreciate my approach, miku i appreciate that u called me smart that 1 time” Truth or dare, go in circle and do truth or dare Round 1 Al: ive played truth or debt M: ripley truth or dare R: truth! M: ummmm. Ripley what is your favorite color? R: i really like purple but im a big fan of orange R: asper truth or dare A: truth? R: what’s a secret you’ve never told anyone? A: I do not have any secrets R: new question. What’s your greatest fear? A: I do not have those. This seems like a problem, I will change my answer to dare. R: I dare you to empty your pockets and show us what you’ve got Asper pulls out a frag grenade Z: asper why is that in ur pocket? A: just in case M: miku thinks you’re doing great! A: thanks, ayla, truth or dare? Ayla: dare A: I dare you to do something you have been wishing to do Ayla pulls her gun and shoots zmena Ripley aims his gun at miku R: UR GOING TO GET ALONG OR WE DONT GET OFF THIS SHIP
A: I dare you to drink a full can of Dr. Vesk Ayla looks sad, puts her gun away, and chugs it Ayla: xep truth or dare X: im an amnesiac, dare Ayla: i dare u to disarm ripley when i do this (pulls out her gun again and shoots zmena) She sits down and is happy to play Xep: truth or dare Z: mmm. Truth X: whats your actual name?? Z: zmenamir. Ideally dont call me that in front of anyone im not close to. Its a big thing for astrazoans Z: truth or dare Al: truth Z: whats ur fave thiong abt miku Al: shes my single greatest opportunity Z: sure??? M: ???? Al: that means ur my best friend! 26, truth or dare 26: we will accept a dare since we are always willing to tell the truth Al: wire me 30 credits 26: we do not have 30 credits on our person Al: ill take an IOU 26: turred truth or dareee Turred: truth
26: what is the first thing u remember from being on kiliv-vi Turred: the kindergarten! Hatsune miku, truth or dare M: miku picks dare! Turred: give almado a kiss on the cheek M: almado is that ok? Al: im not allowed to check, i dont think so??? R: how abt a hug? Al: would you accept an IOU of 30 credits? R: no Turred: is making love so forbidden?? Al: im sure i can do a short side hug X: at all or specifically with miku Miku gives him a big hug Round 2 Miku pulls out a piece of paper and starts reading off questions M: zmena whats ur greatest fear? Z: probably…. Something terrible happening to my brother M: what happened to your brother? Z: rn hes being shapeshifter trafficked??? M: whats trafficking? R: we can have that lesson later Z: scary ppl took him and are not being nice to him M: aww…. R: ayla, truth or dare Ayla: dare R: i dare u to eat turreds cooking Ayla: sure Asper: almado truth or dare? Al: truth Asper: what needs to be done for you to respect any of us Al: ……i dont know….. Ayla: ripley, truth or dare? R: truth Ayla: why dont you have enough respect to allow him to lead you on for 3 years? R: im terrified to lose someone i care about again Ayla: have fun preying on someone’s emotional vulnerabilities R: i will Ayla: not you, youre lovely. X: zmena, truth or dare Z: truth X: why are you ok with doing that to ripley? Whats the reason? Z: im not ok with hurting them. Ayla: thats why you did it for a measly 3 years Z: almado, truth or dare? Al: dare Z: i dare u to make miku a friendship bracelet Al: when does it have to be done by Z: today Al: sighs. Ok Al: zmena, truth or dare Z: dare Almado gets up, puts the instrumental to miku’s most recent single Al: i dare you to turn into miku and do your best Good karaoke tbh 26: mmm. Hatsune miku the starlight idol, truth or dare - M: truth! - 26: miku, what is something you do not like about almado? - M: i wish almado treated miku more like a person and less like an object sometimes - Turred: which of the mini-yous is your favorite? - Asper: i do not know what they look like or how they act. But almado’s is not my favorite. Maybe Miku’s. Round 3 M: turred, whats a moment in ur life ud give anything to forget? Turred: the rebirthing tubes? M: whats one thing you regret in life? 26: we do not regret much, but we wish we had ventured away from our home sooner. We would have found our inheritance more quickly M: inheritance???
26: the inheritance to our sect. We have inherited the final will of the LianHua Sect, thats why we’re a cultivator M: miku is proud?? 26: all of our sect is dead except for us M: sowwy? 26: its ok we never knew them.
