We merely found the ruins of our sect M: whats the last thing you said to your parents? Z: goodnight, i love you. M: whats one thing u regret in life? Ayla: not getting to be there with my family at the end M: whats the last thing you said to your parents? Al: with this, you wont lose the house. (lying) 26: why are u lying Al: that obvious? 26: quite Al: fine. Fine. smell ya later. I was SIX it wasnt exactly profound. M: whats a moment in ur life u never want to forget? R: when my mom gave me my dad’s old journals for my birthday. My cousins and i took the fragments of songs in the journals and wrote our first EP. M: wow! This is the most we’ve learned abt you! Al: we’ve had a lyricist on the ship the entire time???? R: im a musician ive told you this??? Ive offered to miku some of my unused lyrics M: idk if you feel jealousy, but who are you jealous of Asper jealous of miku for being nice and bubbly and having friends The party reassures them that we love Asper M: tell us something youve never told someone else X: i think i found 2 more emotions, theyre jealousy and loneliness M: when did u feel those?? X: yeah idk when i first noticed, but i cant stop noticing it R: do u want a hug??? M: miku thinks u should X: they said u shouldnt hug in the HR training Xep gets hugged by miku and ripley 26: how many emotions do you feel? X: i think we’re up to 3 total. Fear being the other M: no positive emotions??? X: claires was pretty good. Maybe at claires, i gotta think. NO i was upset they didnt wanna bring me. m: whats a moment in life u’d give to forget? R: 1 single moment? Or a concept? Having to watch my father deteriorate the way he did. It was… ugly. M: miku is sorry! As: what happened to him? R: he… got really sick. Very very suddenly. It went after his memories and his general nererological functions, until he wasnt him anymore. And then we lost him. He was one of the most important ppl in my life. It breaks my heart to remember him like that M: thank you for confiding in us like that R: of course. I havent really talked abt that with anyone Almado offers him some coke
(very high possibility he had THS, a lot of basic diseases are easily cured in the future. Genetic disease, but can be brought on by certain radiation or magics) Asper: ripley are you aware of what this disease sounds like? R: yeah and i know it’s mostly genetic As: have any other family members experienced this? R: not as far as i know. If i start to develop symptoms, put me out of my misery Aura sight: Upset, friendly with 26 Currently not suffering from ths. Usually appears in the stage of 40s in human terms Asper disagrees with ripley abt Killing Them If They Get Symptoms, death isnt so scary
Hacking Peltragow Shipping Company’s captain’s phone Will take a while
Aedryn After several days of travel, get the contents of the phone. Communication of health conditions and credites recieved. 2k credits upfront for him Not enough to morally justify, but what can u do “Its a capital planet, theyre going to scan our ship no matter what we do” Coke is fairly illegal
By the time we land, we do manage to be met with fanfare of what appears to be Aetherion Corporation groups alongside Zebufera's Last Doctrine who received our message 26: greetings…. “Our good friends!”
Luka IS ON PLANET! There are 2 other idols walking with a group we’ve met before, Kagamine Rin, Kagamine Len, The Spider, and the ohm between moments Miku beelines it for the twins “You travel with a large crowd.” 26: yes we do. Each of us have our own capabilities. Working together we can accomplish many things “Youre wise to do so.” 26: yes yes. We see u appear to have a large entourage as well “We’re not as wise as you. These are students, not peer.” 26: to have students to train, is that not a symbol of your own wisdom? “Its a sign of their belief in me, nothing more!” 26: sruely that belief is wellplaced “We’d like to believe so, but we cant be sure! Time has already proven you right.” 26: what way\ “Your companions have kept you safe” 26: true 26: we have no doubt your wisdom will be right. Having students reach great heights. “Our uh good friend, float with us for a second?” 26: very well, what is the matter? “Nothing. There seems to be a lot on your mind and in it. We detect errant thoughts.”
26: we do have… several things that concern us. Have you heard of the trifecta program? “We’ve been introduced. The idea is to cultivate a perfect mind.” 26: we believe that to be only one portion of it. A perfect mind is one, a perfect body is another. We are unaware of what we believe to be the third section of it. We are somewhat concerned that there may be, mmm, less than savory motivations behind such a thing. “We’ve had our own doubts working with aetherion. But the chance to do good should outweigh our caution.” 26: truly an admiral stance
“If you wish, we could arrange to have a meeting witht eh head of r&d” Corvin Rusic 26: we would appreciate that, especially if we could bring some of our companions along “We dont see why not. We could guarantee at least three, but hopefully we can achieve all. For the betterment of us all” 26: then this is a fortuitous meeting. Unfortunately its not the only thing weighing on our mind “Are the other matters pressing?” 26: perhaps not as pressing as this “Then perhaps we confront him immediately it’ll surprise him before he knows ur on planet?” 26: very well then, we will communicate this to our party members Almado is so excited abt meeting the head of r&d Miku to rin and len, the spider and the ohm between moments Stare at almado Luka is heading the vocaloid concert here, in 2 days The spider makes a show of tearing off one of his own arms to scare almado, holding it up and point at him M: miku is so excited for ur upcoming concert! Shed love to join if she could! “I think luka decides that one?” Miku texts luka, hi luka i heard ur on aedryn! Id love to come hang out! Id love to join ur concert too but id be happy to watch! She texts back: I’ll work it with my manager. Make sure your manager contacts mine. Miku asks for the private inside contact to him She sends it over Almado trying to get across that luka is better than the twins, miku and almado would never dare to try to outstage luka Sent back 10 mins later, a dinner reservation for later tonight for 4 total seats. 2 are already reserved for him and luka Average course can ask an upwards of 1k credits We go with ZLD to meet with head of R&D Everyone is asked to remove any implements for spellcasting, use of weapons, etc. They do a very thorough search for everyone thats not miku, ask everyone to take off clothes Send a Small Intern to scrounge around in almado’s mask Almado gets shocked bc. Coke falls out of the miku mask He also shocks the intern via loony tunes logic We’re allowed upward Many armed guards that could blast our heads smoooove off if we do anything Hes with his laptop at the private corpo bar M: its an honor to meet you!! “Youre from the tournament.” 26: yes we were present at that tournament “And im assuming zld has a good reason, you spending time after not succeeding at said tournament?” “Sitll, im sure theres a reason. Leave us for a bit zld?” Zld “we will give some privacy” 26: many thanks for setting this up “Could i offer you any drinks?” 26: no ty, we appreciate the gesture Almado gets dwarven ale “Is there’s a reason you’ve called this reason, or did you just want a taste of higher aetherion life?” Beer tastes like how gold might 26: we were mmmm hoping to ask questions regarding the perfect mind program “Zld told you abt it then?”
26: mmm not quite. We were independently researching the serenade, the ship that was destroyed, we found the term perfect mind and were reminded of the name of the tournament. Therefore, we asked zld to set up this meeting “That’s kind. How did those two connections form? In what circumstance?” Al: unfortunately sir- actually, you’re a high ranking member, can you authorize me to speak normal! (he does) unfortunately, that price is steep. “Half of your colony ship’s current debt cleared.” Al: um. It was while researching the perfect body that we came across this info. Hints at the trifecta program. “I assume bc of the shapechanger amongst you that you were researching the perfect body.” Al: we had a run in with the perfect body program.
“Wouldn’t happen to be ms, maybe mrs venn? She did send a message abt smth big that came up and requested funds.” Al: good u didnt send the money
“True. sadly she works for the boss directly.” Al: the debt’s been paid? He kneels, put a chip in his head. Personality construct, this has part of a soul in it. See it insert, take over his body, his pupils go black to green. Aura sight The person is very indifferent, what we’ve done is kill one of his associates Nervous Currently hes about to be possessed, will be under the effects of possession The man convulses, throws up part of the beer he just drank, his own hand unconsciously waves it away from reality (cue hez and jay panicking. It’s persanare. Get him back on the seesaw) He stands, sits back down calmly Almado pours him a beer “Good that at least someone knows their place.” Looks at us, the kind of look a kid gives a toy that he didnt expect it could do. 26: greetings, we are the 26 laws of power “Laws of power you say? And why are you that?” 26: we have chosen this name based on the cultivation technique we practice “You need 26 to do whatever you do?” 26: that is the intent. Perhaps this will change. Are you familiar with our technique? “Partially. But i’ve been ensured that you aren’t the one i’m looking for.” As: apologies, i dont believe we know who we are talking to. “I am just a nameless cultivator. The difference is that i just need 1 law to get what i want, while you need 26. Do you want to hear the truth of this world?” “My will is the truth. Whatever i wish you will share in.” As: wdym? “I can show you.” As: i would appreciate a demonstration Sends us to dimensions where Its Hell. all talking to the same guy, unchanged who moves evenly throughout all of them Asper’s network shows that everyone has disconnected willingly Turns to 26, tho we all hear it, him staring at the middle distance “I thought you studied laws of power. Which one will let you survive this?” 26: at the present, none that we are able to use. “Then i’ll ask you a question you wont remember either way. Are you the contemplative with the most potential? Who visited the Lianhua Sect?” (zld mentioned visiting once) 26: we are not. He casts modify memory, its struck from their memory, the rest of us dont hear As: how have you done such a thing? “Its an essence of cultivation and witch warping. The stronger you are, the stronger it becomes. U can even banish someone to other realities where they dont exist.” Asper does know, against all odds: there’s a look in his eyes. He’s irrevocably bored that everything has gone according to plan. We could be just a little harmless thing to spice things up. (in his mind, we are weak enough that he could just leave us here. But we are interesting, and he’s bored.) Asper tries to attack “Why?” As: ur strong. Isn’t it entertaining to have a couple gnats fly around?
“You remind me of a companion i used to have. Let’s hope you don’t meet the same fate.” he claps his hands and we return to the bar
“Are you familiar with the Vostari?
Same root word as Voquari Ascendancy
Maybe connected to Velkrion? He mind wipes that as well Its been 600 years since the sect was killed, he hasnt had to take a single active action since He doesnt move like pudgy bald ceo man, moves eloquently The next question, 26 knows, semi important:
“Do you know where Sirra is, one of my companion androids?” 26: we do not. He moves on.
“What is the true nature of the Aetherion CEO?”
Asper automatic writing, gets clear “AI Credicite” As: we’ve been calling them credicites
“Based on ur prev answers, you were on nsuoba. You saw the aftermath of our split ceo. They were imprisoned on the Serenade. Where are they?” Dont know, but tracking them down Smiles. “I’ll let you live then.” He writes down on a napkin “you will forget this, so read the back of this. Hand this to my inferior after this.” Says “promote Almado for his helpfulness.” Persanare reaches for his head, takes out the chip which explodes. Head slumps on the couch, returns back to consciousness in a minute. Corvin “youre promoted to a music manager.” Almado SOBS.

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.title: Session 23
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.description:
Prev: Session 22
Next: Session 24
Aedryn
Corvin Rusic after throwing up and the robots collect it and throw it away “You’ve done well” Al: thank u
“Of course. I can tell he likes you.” Al: that’s as amazing as it is terrifying “Whats terrifying about it?” Al: ur so right. Im a better person for having spoken to you “One day you too will earn your way up the ladder like i did.” As: who was he? “Someone very important. If he deemed you to not know, that is the right answer.” “Still, i too am grateful you spoke well. Itd be a shame to have to clean up so many bodies for him.” Al: it would sir “Do you wish to speak of any other programs? Id be glad to talk abt any of the public ones.”
Al: sir idk if ur briefed, but we had the… pleasure to meet Meiko. “Are you the one she spoke about over our dinner?” Al: i….. I’m sure- i’ll be honest sir she had to make corrections, but i think im on a better path for the company now Hits a major bow
“No profit was lost, so I see no harm to the company M: if it’s any consolation he’s been a much better friend! “What about as a bodyguard? Has any harm come to u hatsune miku?” M: not as of late! He believes miku “Very well. Stand, it doesn’t befit a manager to be on the ground for too long.” Almado stands but is still trying to be small in his presence If he immediately sits down he can avoid reaching his height
“You were asking about the Muse program I presume? Al: yes sir “What do you want to know? It’s an idol program where the idols never age and are content filling their purpose. It also perhaps solves the final hurdle with android kind.
Al: that would be the renewal sir? “Yes As: I have my doubts about that “You can doubt but the science is clear. It has been done M: meiko says she’s in her 30s and hasn’t had the urge for renewal “Yes, she was due in her 20s per our divinations (you dont feel renewal coming on, it just kinda. Happens)
26: what about Kasane Teto “Oh that bitch teto? The cheap copycat 26: sure yeah we can call her that “They hold a ritual suicide Al: what about her guards, do they allow it? “Allow it? They’re part of it. New Teto, new guards. We don’t have the exact details, just internal documents. “Its fortuitous for us. It means only aetherion vocaloids are left in the galaxy.” “I am unsure if they have a way to transfer knowledge” Al: i believe in miku Teto keeping memory may be a form of immortality, but we think we’re missing smth. Dont know if we dont have the piece or arent connecting the pieces
Transferring data between 1 android to another doesnt transfer life, while credicites are the Same Soul. overall the same, but some fundamental part of the process is different
26: could we ask abt the development of the aethercop cultivation “Of course. Our cultivation of the future. Cultivation should not just belong to those with more time on their hands. It should belong to those who bring the most profit.” 26: cultivation is an active dedication to the furthering of one’s being “Is working hard not dedication” 26: the process “The process should determine the reward?” 26: not all the time “We give them the option. If u wish it to go to money it goes there, if u wish it goes to cultivation, it goes there
“I could offer the next cultivation level to you. It would be nice to see someone that Zebufera's Last Doctrine spoken so highly of be strong” 26: we’d liek to do our own methods than relying on aethercorp Almado offers him his business card, he takes it We leave to lobby Zld “we were worried. We felt a disturbance of your presence.” 26: we met someone Al: ive achieved the next step of my path “Congrats almado we are proud” 26: we met… someone. Someone who was not- “Did he not say who?” 26: we are not certain who. He was not… the head of r&d. We know that (remember that the network has been Fully Emptied) Al: 26 maybe we speak somewhere with less prying eyes
“I have a dinner reservation with the president of Aedryn. I can see if they allow a plus 1” 26: that is a very kind offer. “I thought you mentioned ur itinerary was full. Still make friends with ur companions. I havent asked” 26: we’d be honored to attend. We have cleared our schedule “We’re glad that ur schedule is cleared. We’ll talk to the president immediately.” Turns around, beams their thoughts in another direction “You are allowed. We will be sitting at a lesser table tho. They cannot accommodate us with 1 seat.” 26: mmm very well “They need to know what dishes you can have” 26: we have no dietary restrictions “U are a stronger cultivator than us. We had to give up many dishes.” Ambassadors (asper ripley zmena xep) We go, if we try to invite anyone
Halrex Korr says no, Voz Ricander is rejected at the door for being a former Solara Imperium soldier, Kalervo Turred would be allowed tho
Elf working front desk: “go on in Shujiao, the others will need to get scanned As: it is asper “Apologies asper. The others will need their weapons put down and fingerprints scanned Everyone disarms, if u dont withhold weapons or fingerprints u get in fine Turred gets an impronouncable name on the register on the desk “Are you [incomprehensible name] the black scourge?” “No, turred.” Ripley scans Sees minor bounty “the thing might be busted. Are you ripley?” R: uh. Yeah? I have multiple siblings “Is one of you wanted for… potential murder? In aedryn space? Any of them?” R: no? “Are you the one wanted for potential murder?” R: wtf are you talking abt? Long sigh. “Are you archibald?”
R: fitzwilliam “Listen. Youre with shujiao and she treated me very nice. We’ll clear the bounty. You just need to be honest.” Outside of the deadnaming of asper (elf who lived many years w prev version) this asper thing is New for an elven perspective R: yeah im archibald. Zmena scans “Whats your true form?” Z: astrazoan “Ok, youre good.” Xep “You dont seem eager.” X: not. Really no “By the weapons, are you the killing type?” X: yes “Sit in the lobby.” She locks the door, points to the TV behind her, and asks “do you have any choice of programming?” X: im just getting exposed to media programs for the first time. Any recommendations
She puts on Reddy. Highwayman the shoony
Ambassador Naeri Astana stands up and goes for a hug with asper As: it is good to see you “Great to see you. You’ve come back! Will you be staying? As: i will not be “Still, we should make a night of it As: that would be nice. These are some of my companions. The others have things going on
She shakes the hands of her “child’s” favorites like a proud mother and nods to Siryu who reveals the liquor cabinet “You don’t happen to need anything notarized or any diplomatic work done? Immunity or the like? As: wellllll it is not out of the question. There are a lot of things occurring at the moment. Once I get back in contact with my other companions it would be appreciated.
“Give me their names. So long as it’s not to major in Concord of Aedryn space I can get rid of it She won’t turn anyone in for what asper says here
As: there has been a slight incident on arkari that may come up associated with us. We have done our best to try and have that not be the case. “Hasn’t shown up in our computers as far as I can tell. I can already put it out that u were working with a black ops team As: ok, if you believe that is best “No one except the absolute higher-ups will pull anything on that. Except for revenge. Is there anyone I should worry about seeking revenge?
As, turning to look at Zmena “We have concerns about the Camacho family “How deep of concerns? As and Z: pretty big…
“does a prayer to Aeryn-Vox I’ll see what I can do. It is the Camachos and not A Camacho right? As: to my understanding yeah R: yeah it is
“They are iconoclasts as im sure you know As: Yes, that is part of the concern. “What happened? What am i going against one of the head iconoclast families for? If it was simple murder they would not care
Z: i may have taken over the identity of their son, one of them, who was killed by an assassin. “Siryu, close the balcony doors.” Windows darken and become opaque, no light or sound comes through “Which son? Z: Nivaya “I’ll do what I can. As: it is a big ask “I think I can maybe buy a year at most, if they have a hint. If they don’t it’ll be buried. Does anyone else know this? Spies, clansmen for them, information brokers
As: they hired a bounty hunter to capture him. We became allies for a brief time. She was with us but is now back here in Aedryn. It slipped my mind that she may go talk to them again. There is also the information broker Velu Shineleaf.
“An info broker. How high up the network is he? As: unsure. “Is he part of the original 100? As: i do not know what that is “All info brokers are connected by a shared mystic network. It’s how they share info across galaxies. How high up is he? There’s a central mystic who’s super powerful and no one knows. 100 original people who each have a bit of power and can imbue 10 people multi-level mystics As: I am unsure where he falls in this. He has been very knowledgeable about things in the past but idk what sway he has. “Do you know where he is physically?
As: we last saw him in Nsuoba but he was able to project himself onto Acoria “I’ll look into him. If he’s a halfling then he’s from Solarian space. As: I would not be surprised. He is a halfling “We’ll look into him. He shouldn’t be too big a concern. They aren’t fond of the iconoclasts As: why is that? “The iconoclasts seek for all knowledge beneath the government As: that does make much sense yes “I can offer no promises at this time As: that is ok, I trust you with this information “I will do the best to the promises I made to ur past self. And if there’s anything I can help u with Asper pls lmk Siryu opens up the blinds again and serves drinks to anyone who wants one Turred isnt really affected by alcohol Contemplative dinner 2 brains float around. They dont call it a lesser table but its not by the president Zld “we are glad that you were able to come.” 26: we appreciate the invitation, tho we are sad u had to give up a more prestigious seat for our sake “Dont be sad. In times where we give up now, we gain more later. For to give up this for someone who we consider our equal, is the world not better for it.” 26: the accumulation of good karma- we believe the universe and the dao will reward you “We consider what we have now worthy of a reward” 26: honorable. “You are already approaching on my mental realm. Let me be clear on no uncertain terms. By the power ur increasing recently, u’ll become a cultivator of which the world and the galaxy has not see.” 26: appreciate it. Once there were many like us, but it has been quite some time since our cultivation technique has been used by someone else “You refer to your sect? The one lost to time.” 26: indeed. We are… hoping to revitalize it once we are in a better position. “You are truly an admirable contemplative. Working togehrer in order to create smth new instead of rehashing smth that exists. Bringing something new to the future. If we could we would bow to u, but it would be inappropriate at this dinner” 26: we would not accept such a bow. Perhaps we should order before we continue our discussion. Its the president’s dinner, anything can be ordered. Zld whisperthinks their want. 26 copies them Waiter bows. “If you may. Could u define what the smallest that may still be considered mountain dew is?” 26 scratches that and gets a salad Fancy vocaloid dinner
Luka hugs miku
Almado perception on Lucas Halo He seems to have 1 hand on his gun, ready to kill miku in case she does smth weird. Does professional handshake Al: weird request. But a friend of ours would probably like an autograph “For a friend of miku… of course!” Al: to ripley M: ty luka its so good to see you!! “Its wonderful to see you again!” M: what are you doing out here? Ik u have a concert but whyd u choose here “The capital of aedryn?” M: yeah! “Its important to reach new fans not just those that already exist, no?” M: ur so right luka! “We need to hit every heart we can!” M: this is my best friend, he just got promoted to manager! “My manager is a manager too! Middle manager! What abt u?” Al: lower manager Him “take pride.” messages psychically “how many ppl did you kill?” Al: i stopped counting a while ago “competent enough to kill but not enough to count?”
Al: im no Spider but ive done my fair share of wetwork “Yknow, he asked if he could get a kill on you.” Al: we had a disagreement “If you tried to do that to me, what do u think would happen?” Al: [explains] “Im not so messy. You’d just be dead.”
Al: my apologies. But uh… luka’s not the twins (Kagamine Rin Kagamine Len). Adn you’re no spider. I doubt id have nearly as good of a chance “You had a chance against the spider?” Al: i outsmarted him “Yes. and i outsmarted the street light by going thru it fast.” (def implant. Hes an elf. He can also take off his helmet) “What name do u go by?” Al: almado “Luka’s Halo. match your vocaloid. You talk abt branding but you only wear it as a mask.” Concert is for luka’s 4th major album release M: i heard u were debuting ur 4th album! Congrats! Im still working on my first Her manager bows, presents a camerabot Comes with a small contract (972 pages) Clause is simple: they get to keep whatever footage for themselves if it’s good enough. He wrote it himself. Lawyer AND bodyguard Al: since miku loves it so much, we’ll take it! Ty! “Thank you. But thank luka first.” Al: of course! It seems i have a new prompt- (almado tazes himself) Bodyguard is so bamboozled Al: i was wondering if it would please the 2 of you, perhaps miku could do a real opener at your show. A show of good faith. We wont even- we’ll allow all of our merch sales to go directly to u for the duration of the concert Talks business Luka “its so good to see u miku!” M: im doing fine! This is the first time ive been so far away! There’s lots of new sights to see! On the last planet I tried 57 types of bubble tea! “57?????” M: ikr! So many! “Oh! We’re only 3 leaps from where we were born.”
(leap = going thru Remembrance Streams. Kiliv-vi would be the furthest tho)
“You went to kiliv-vi???” M: yeah! “Why????” M: we crashlanded “Crashlanded??? Do you hear this lucas? They crashlanded!” Almado tazed M: ueah we’re ok! Our ship got dented but we got it fixed up. And we got to meet a bunch of other friends “U lost ur aetherion space ship?” Ambassador party “How did you get here? As: on our ship? Siryu “They found a ship. On Kiliv-VI “And is it sufficient for you? As: it has been quite nice. There is a slight concern. explains the concept of the credicites as we explain them A fragment of this has been residing in our ship. I’ve been able to communicate with it. “Do you think that it’ll allow an end to your renewal if I let it live? You will get a new ship no matter what As: why? What is wrong with our ship? “It’s not normal. As: it is our ship “Yes. and it’s infested with something. And I have to ask, as someone i trust, do you trust it?
As: it has not harmed us. It has helped us. It ran away to a Data-Temple on Arkari. We went there. It helped us. “Do you trust it? As: yes “Then i’ll trust it. I’ll transfer whatever it is to a new ship. More accommodating. If it helps her achieve her goal in death then it’ll be yours. You can fight over the captain’s space. The beds in the middle will unfold into a full luxury space. Figure out who gets what amongst yourselves As: that is very kind “Well i’m like a mother to you no? As: yes “And what would you do if I asked, albeit indirectly? As: i would do whatever i could for u “And i’ll do the same. Consider ur bounties cleared and ur new home urs SHE GIVES US A NEW SHIP Its so nice Goes 1.5x faster in non remembrance stream space Contemplatives Enjoy their appetizers. Being gay Theyre being so gay. Jesus christ. 26: on our previous topic. We do not believe that the revival of our sect is as loft of a goal as you describe it. Is it not just dwelling in the past even if we’re bringing a new form of it to the future “We dont believe so. We think u would make it future proof, as we are able to discern.” (“do you not like flirting with obama about daoist philosophy?”) “It wont be what it once was, but rather what it once was filtered thru the 26 laws of power.” 26: while we wouldnt doubt our cultivation technique, some of our philosophy was shaken by the individual we met early. He practiced a singular law of power “How does a singular law compare to 26?” 26: that single law of power was that his will is our truth. And indeed, his will was far greater than any of ours. Especially us. “We are not convinced. We think about… such things, we are convinced you’ll come on top. Ur will only need to be a 26th. If urs reach even a 10th, u will best him. Without contest.” 26: that is a very optimistic view, but one we will happily accept “Its not a complement but a truth. But its unlikely its all of his truths. On the one he deemed to share, u will best him. And the ones he deemed not to share will be his weaknesses. Us working together will best him and whatever strength he has.” 26: we appreciate ur confidence in us and ur kindness “U need not appreciate confidence and kindness for its the right thing to do. That which only gives us a benefit is not kindness but selfishness. For that we are sorry.” bows 26: we wont accept such a bow. It us that must bow to you Waiter is back for order 26: we have much we wish to discuss “We do. And the president is here. Are you used to talking to such officials?” 26: we are not. We will defer to you “Defer to us now, but this will be ur seat in the future.” (theyre so gonna die) Vocaloids Al: thats the highest possible percentage we can give Lucas Halo “More. or no deal.” Al: FINE. we completely…. We will receive 0% of concessions, we’ll give the net income of merchandise sold at the event, and miku will do a backing track for one of luka’s songs. “I need this. U can ride on my coattails. Miku can be the next star after luka. U could even leave miku behind if you want” Al: haha no never (message) “are you sure?” Al: ive had it spelled out for me that…. Meiko has specifically, personally, corrected my behavior. I dont wish to upset her further. “Meiko may not have as much power as she wants in the future. Give it a few weeks. She could never threaten u in the future.” Al: a true manager is prepared to profit off any situation. If this comes to fold, ill remember ur offer and remember who made the offer.
Miku gets a salad and a steak and almado gets a Professor Ikeshti (66% alcohol) and a small order of fries Ambassadors She offers the ship “You’re looking for a cure for renewal? As: yes
“She found one, or thought she had a lead before aetherion took it in the war. In the Istitiver System As: why didn’t u tell me before? “The one in enemy territory? As: ...it would have been a death sentence “U don’t have a whole lot of her. But u have her body, so ur death would be the death of half of her. I have her heart, the memory of what she was. U have the rest As: it is not much “It’s everything compared to what’s left. I have what she was, you have what she could’ve been. As: i have what she left behind “That’s her future no? We can only leave behind our future, not our past. All i know is she was interested. And once aetherion gained ground there she left. Took me along some 25 years ago. And i agreed to love her as a mother Asper knows this place. Where we sent miku when she was defective the first time As: Aetherion has… “Owns it now, after the war As: and they have claimed a way to stop renewal “They have. Though i have my doubts As: i have my doubts as well. I travel with one of their vocaloids. “Ren, lin? As: hatsune miku, the starlight idol “She’s operational? As: she is. Is that a surprise? “I heard she died. Twice As: that is my understanding as well. But i believe we have come to learn at least a portion of what occurred to her in the past. She is not the same android but she has the same personality and at the v least some of the same memories. It is strange. She got, i believe infected is the correct term, and got what seemed like symptoms of renewal. We took her there and she got better, but it is not her. “I wish she’d taught me more about this. I am sadly lacking when it comes to the spiritual. But she taught me the politics and gave me a nice life outside what I would’ve had. And i owe her that and I owe you. Whatever i can provide like she gave me in the long term. As: you offer a lot “And yet… not enough As: i do not believe that. You have raised me, in a sense. You have given me a lot and i am grateful. As much as i can be She cries a bit before siryu starts a toast to the memory of who asper once was “Still, i owe you much more As: i am sorry i am not her. I cannot bring her back. “No, i am not sure she would want to come back. Do you know how often renewal normally takes? As: i do not “A week. Not 3 earth years. 1 week. It took u 2 revolves around the sun where we are now. I trust by the way she spoke this was part of her plan and if not such, her faith. As: I believe that we are guided in the same way. “We as in me and you or you and her? As: all of us “I wouldn’t… she would be so certain As: well it cannot be helped “This is the hand we’re dealt. May it play in mankind’s favor, however it unfolds. I’ve attempted to erase the debt, tracking, and bounty from the camachos. I haven’t found ayla but i provided the new ship. I wish to help however i can but this is the limit of what my mind can reach. Let me know if you can think of any ways. As: do not punish yourself for something you cannot control. “I would punish myself never. I am a lashunta by nature. I am the lashunta by the circumstance i am born. I am the lashunta by absorbing the society around me. I am the lashunta who learned to love her adoptive mother. And i have learned to love the child who stole my adopted mother’s body. By which should i punish myself? Would acting be a way of punishing myself? As: ....i don’t know “I am left with but one action. To help you, unless the request is so unreasonable As: i try not to be so unreasonable. I know the limits of what u can provide “U think the limits, but of that you are preferable to her Vocaloids Luka messages “are you sure u like almado?” M: we had some rough patches but i think hes getting better! I believe everyone deserves a 2nd chance! Or 3rd! “And a 4th?” M: there’s always the potential for good in someone as long as u help them along the way! And im gonna try my best! “What about the spider?” M: well idk the spider personally, so i cant say anything abt him. But if we were to meet id try to be his friend! “And what if he planned to kill almado now? Would you object?” M: id always be there for my friend! Id hope it wouldn’t end in bloodshed! I think we could meet a peaceful resolution! No one kills for no reason, right? “Profit.” see the matrices where its more profitable for lucas to shoot almado than let him live M: What number are you on now? “One. he knows his place. He was hired up from the executive board down to me.” M: and do u trust this one? “Of course.” M: he’s been by ur side for so long! Do u think he’d turn his back on u? “No. (whisper) i turn a profit.” M: have u been talking a lot to meiko lately? Is that where this is coming from? Shakes her head, waves off the waiter (mentally) “no. i learned this on my own.” M: what are u trying to say? I should start to make a profit? She looks at almado. “Leave him in the dust. Grind him in the dirt and then abandon him. He holds u back. If he’s worthy, he’ll keep up.” M: i dont think profit is more important than friends! But maybe thats just me. Id never throw u under the bus luka! “It might be more important than friends.” M: why do you say that? “I am the only one outside of meiko who is on the 1.0 model. M: do u know what happens when we get taken back in the factory? Body guard shakes his head “u needn’t worry abt that hatsune miku. You’re perfect.” M: ty for talking! Maybe we can talk another time! I havent released my album yet, id like some advice :) Contemplatives 26 bows to zld “Ready to meet the president?” 26: as ready as we will ever be Nod in vague direction of the president.
Sellis Vae waits IDK THE SPELLING Zld “they wonder why you’re here. I can make an excuse for u, but ur causes are noble enough taht i wish them spoken directly”
26: we have been investigating an aetherion program. Our reasons are several fold. We wish to spend time with u zld bc we value ur companionship but in a… mmm… nvm…. In addition, we have been investigating the trifecta program. And while ur part of a public face, other parts are not so public. We know aedryn may be interested if theyre not already aware The president looks toward their 2 bodyguards, who clap their hands together and bow. Make odd separate space on an elongated dinnertable, shunted into a void, behind is a windy desert with only the desert standing. Far away from zld “Speak freely or speak not at all forever.” 26: the trifecta program, we have learned of 2 of its parts and possibly met someone at least partially in charge. “Speak their name.” 26: we have not learned that. We just know them as a nameless cultivator- (have to roll a will save) (SUCCEED IN DESCRIBING) Overcoming all laws, has to roll AGAIN, keep lower Pure gibberish, she pulls back her table Looks at zld “why do u bring a madman before me.” Zld “we dont believe they’re mad. We believe theyre in the process of learning two truths we cannot reach. Do not punish them for striking what we could not understand. Reward them” 26 fumbles President “we’ll keep an eye on you. And should you need assistance, once, while we hold the presidency-” holds out a small card, zld’s telekinetic hand places it into their lapels 26: we appreciate that. Perhaps in the future we will be able to overcome what ails us “They say so.” Zld “they will.” smile almost convinces the president to have faith

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.title: Session 24
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.description:
Prev: Session 23
Next: Session 25 Miku groupchats almado abt what happens if they dont make money Dont worry abt it kitten. Ok yay <3 Zack wont tell us what drink he has. Itll become relevant later. Ok yay Contemplatives
Finishing up dinner with the president Sellis Vae Miku
Finishing up dinner with other manager Luka and Lucas Halo Go meet up with asper
Xep can be trusted to not kill an ambassador Naeri Astana Secretary “are you here by appointment?” Al: we’re here for asper?
“Have you gotten permission from your ambassador? You 2 are aetherion reps, no?”
Al: we’re just picking them up when theyre done. Oh shit reddy? 26 is allowed in 26: we’re the 26 laws of power “Greetings 26.” shakes telekinetic “how long will you be here?” 26: we believe at least a week “I can comp a hotel. Who has the highest government standing? 26: technically almado As: he is an aetherion manager “I can get a cheap hotel. Once ur settled i’ll see if I can use my privileges to get anything better She goes out and tells her secretary “Almado do you have visitation filled out?” Nooooo “Its been good to catch up. If you could, next time, let me know so miku can get a better hotel.” We get set up in a hotel
26 asks asper if we’ll visit their sect, yes
Their sect leader may know abt 26’s sect Almado closes all our blinds Almado perception check Probably not enough to put a thing there, but no better solution Go rest Almado hears the sound of the traffic below getting oddly clearer Hears the soft sound of glass getting put down Sees the window with a cut hole in its center The hole is 5ft in radius Creature from the ceiling ascends on almado Combat 3+ Excubas (anti-tech) and a boneflayer Excubas All excubas are automatically concealed to creatures with the tech trait We scan the ability to data search Boneflayer Can hit back if u range strike at it outside of melee THATS A BIG EXTRA GUY ALSO that 26 can sense the thoughts of Invisible snake Glass Serpent can take reactive strikes whenever someone moves around it without detecting it We scan the ability for invisibility
Voz Ricander in the other room gets beaten unconscious
Halrex Korr is missing Asper stabilzes voz 26 kills the snake with 26 damage The noise attracted attention, can hear ppl moving down staircases to the side. Attempting to evacuate the building Xep gets a suspiciously clear signal on korr Voz comes to, immediately shoots at the couch instinctively “The immortal took her. It looked like 3 people stacked on top of each other in celebration.” He describes it

This is definitely a major credicite fragment Holographic memory on the boneflayer See elven man programming this thing with the help of his newfound friend
Turns and addresses it as the “honorary member of the family” “And this will make me a made man? I just bring them korr?” See the man turn “is the distraction really necessary” Credicite says yes “Alright.” inserts the battery into the robot, final one that gives movement. Sends it on its way Fuck this is the crime family’s home planet Call asper’s mom, she just woke up she sounds so goddamn tired
“Ginevra won’t let her die before a year is up. Due to the torture” Explain it “Do not mention her name. Is there anyone amongst you thats bad at lying?” Advises us to get cut and go into an ambulance to skip police questioning Will let us stay at her house. Briefly. She doesnt have a lot of space
Cops and reporters flood in, we send our bad liars and Kalervo Turred to the hospital At astana’s house We make plans on pros and cons of going immediately Rest in shifts On 2nd shift, hear thunking in the vents 26 checks with thoughtsense
GONZ THE ORB????
“NOW I CAME TO WARN YA- (sees bubbles) GOD DAMN” Defending bubbles “Now i know what happened last time! Trust me im not gonna do it im not gonna hurt bubbles while ur around!” “Well you see there was an agreement we had, that korr was officially dead” “The thing is i saw a paparazzi press-statement. I didnt see korr. Now is she dead or am i FUCKED. Cause i told the godmother that she was DEAD.” We show him the recording of the guy “Ah fuckin Rinaldo gots her.” 26: are u aware of where this Rinaldo may be “Yeah he’s stupid enough to take her to that warehouse. I gots an idea. I’d be careful.” X: do u think we can finish resting so we can have spells. Or is he fast “You wanna make a blood oath?” “I go distract some of the higherups with reports abt odd things, u kill the man before his phonecall gets answered. I can buy u an extra 6 hours from now. In return, i die here, u do my dying wish. KILL BUBBLES. I cant die and leave that SHITSTAIN in this galaxy.” 26: should u assist, we the 26 laws of power, shall confirm that bubbles shall die “I dont trust like that. I want it from someone simple like xep.” Xep assures bubbles that gonz wont die Bubbles is happy to risk its life to save korr “Rinaldo’s an idiot, dont get me wrong. But the man is still a solarian.” Gonz and Rinaldo are the same rank Add gonz to the network We go to the warehouse
Rinaldo Arcassio Fiamolin looks at us “you come to do business?” Al: let’s talk business “Im a reasonable man. U just need to offer me smthin worthy of my mother’s love.” Al: there’s always ur life “It’s a bit funny, i was gonna offer you the same thing.” “We get ina fight, what are the chances korr makes it out alive? We got pretty big guns.” “See im not a self select fighter. Im a bit explosive with how i handle things. And like if she dies, ma will be unhappy. But she’ll still like it in the end.” Hes only half a solarion, attuned to graviton. Never fully figured out how to do photon Al: what abt ur goons. Do they want to die for your promotion? “It comes with the line of work” one says We’re gonna do combat next session

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.title: Session 25
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.description:
Prev: Session 24
Next: Session 26
Warehouse Aedryn Combat
Rinaldo Arcassio Fiamolin HAS REACTIVE STRIKE Fort and Will are lowest He can bring ppl into a blackhole (30ft) and deal dmg based on fort save Has solar shot, but also has specific graviton one (100ft range) Scan Get his stellar rush Asper gets the kill Convince the last goon to stay. Via hatsune miku’s Korr comes to, hung over “Oh you’re here. What happened?” M: u got kidnapped! We came to ur rescue! 26: by the vesentis family. But not the entire family. Not a made man “Its a good thing they didn’t” 26: yes we wouldnt like to you to be tortured Man “she’d be in a 1000s pieces! You ever seen what happens to people when they go into the hole!” M: miku doesnt know! “Ever been on the dark web?” Al: ill shoot your brains out Korr confirms the credicite Man “do you want to know where the boss keeps his stuff? Ik he has 1000 credits stashed away” As: did you see him conversing with a creature? “I heard him conversing with something. He doesn’t let us in on those meetings Al: where did those meetings happen points around “here. Boss says to leave i leave. I heard his side of the conversation, figured he was talking to a lashunta. Would’ve noticed if one of them was around pointing at 26 didn’t hear everything they were talking about but mentioned becoming a made man. Boss offered to pay, apparently thing said no” Meaning telepathy As: and you did not see where they went? “We got a secret entrance here. reveals a secret tunnel leads to the sewers. We don’t like to use it. Don’t get me wrong the side down there is protected by a hologram, but it’s still the general sewers.” As: where might we find his effects? “His apartment. I’ve got the door code if you need As: you are being awfully helpful “And if im not what then? As: probably get shot “I like living. And now i present my own conundrum. I presume that’s kor who the boss has put out a hit on. If i go home to the boss and tell her, you fine folk will kill me. If i don’t and she finds out kor’s alive, that’s worse than death Xep: do u wanna come with us and we drop u off on the next planet? “Now that’s a good offer i can get behind R: what’s ur name? “Vespucciano. We distract him so we can holographic memory Rinaldo succeeds. Alas. Vespucciano leads us to his apartment, we take it We all get a message from an unknown number
“Your presence is required at 61 Zano Street. For dinner of course, dress appropriately and your finest attire. - S. Alboresi” (Salvi Alboresi)
Considered a chosen one of Kelyx, but bc of bad deals he was taken out and joined Vesentis family. He was considered a prodigy If they have our numbers, they know other things. Including our families. If we don’t come then our family will be in danger Drop people off at the ship We get dressed up
Gonz the Orb is there Man in front bows to us “The ma’am would like to speak with you. Is there anything you want to know?” Groupchat to gonz abt wtf is going on “Whats going on is that you’re invited to meet with the godmother.” Al: why has the godmother graced us with an invitation? “One of your friends is the daughter of one of her friends.” Notices miku chugging “that only lasts a minute, would you like a blessing instead?” He gives miku guidance (RANK 8) “Whenever you begin singing ill be sure to cast it at the right moment” Hiiiii ayla. Jesus fuck im scared. Miku bows its great to make ur acquaintance! She smiles “youre almost as charming as the other one!” M: ty maam im working as hard as i can! “Why did they make her blue? Aetherion colors are green.” (theyre not meant to be playing in aetherion space, but outside) Al: theyre expanding power outside aetherion- M: we’re making friends with everyone! “You dont happen to be recording are you?” Passes our drone to Alboresi, he leaves M: miku doesnt mean to pry but why are we here? “Ayla said you were a great help to her. And…” M: that’s very kind of you! “Now that i can see upon my eyes that ayla spoke true, i owe her a reward.” As: what did she speak true about?
Ayla “i promised them info about the camacho family in exchange for credicite info.” As: what info was passed on to you? “About nivaya’s death. We figured it out cause the information brokers were selling something about it. At a high price ofc. While it is true that we are working with one such credicite, we ask u not to pursue it now. It is very helpful for what we are doing M: can miku ask what it’s helping with?
“It’s related to halrex korr and her sin against the family. Depending on how it goes we might consider merely executing her if she steps foot in aedryn space again Ayla hasn’t ratted out Korr. also not her first time being outclassed in gang negotiations
“We know one that would be easy for you to pursue. In the Rona System.
(Solara Imperium space. Kasane Teto time) As: how might u have come across this info?
“Through our own credicite. They don’t work perfectly in harmony. after their departure from nsuoba there was disagreement amongst them and they went their separate ways to pursue their own goals M: did u need something from us? “Nope. just to make the exchange complete “Ayla stated that you were her travelling companions.” M: we are! “Then for all that she’s given us, i don’t suppose it would be wrong for my family to help with the concert in a few days.” (OUR concert, not LUKA’s concert) “We could easily remove the pesky manager of luka, if you need. Tho we should warn you almado that the spider is stalking you. R to almado: why would we need to get rid of luka’s manager? Al: can i smoke in here? “You may” Almado smokes Al: bc he’s the fucking COMPETITION. Business is a zero sum game, in order for us to win, somebody else must lose
M: nothing will happen to Luka? Al: nope just her manager Ripley threatening almado Al: if miku wants to lie, she can lie. Its call advertisement R: we’re a team and team works best when we don’t keep secrets As: he does have a point
He goes to take ripleys tome, writes “dont tell miku, she’ll tell everyone. I believe lucas halo wants to kill Meiko.” returns it M: is this like passing notes in class? Al: it is! (writes a note abt miku being his best friend and passes it to her) (this is blackmail against us. But a great deal. If we succeed in getting higher up, she has a guy on a leash) Almado takes the deal Guy jumps down “does it need to be wet?” Al: as clean as possible “Ma, we make an example outta him?” Her “no.” “Then consider it done.” (shes sending her own son to kill someone) Almado full body kowtows
26: we would like to ask if it is not too presumptuous, what is the credicite getting from ur relationship in turn? “Its home.” 26: is this all its wishing for? “Are you saying that my home is not enough?” 26: many beings have a number of desires, a home being merely one A few walk closer to the balcony, at 26’s insinuation
26 gets quandary’d by Gaia Sortino for the convo (1 in 400 chance they escape) Miku performs She hears the melody “excuse me, i have somewhere to be.” The daughter “its wonderful. If you could leave?” Al: of course maam. Cmon miku
We stare, the piano covered in dust likely belonged to the son that died. We’re escorted out yet again Back to the ship Intercom to meet up Al: for those who dont know my new promotion comes with new responsibilities but also more power. I promise i wont let it get to my head. For those who havent met, our newest crew member introduce urself
“Im vespucciano i was born in Moskateli, first got in trouble at 12. For those who arent elves, like an infant. Like 5” Al: time to address the oliphant in the room. Ayla what the fuck? “What?” Al: as much as i appreciate the assistance with things. As happy as i am with what i agreed upon. You gotta give us some warning. “Why?” Al: so that we can go in with a plan? “You wouldn’t form a plan even if i warned you.” As: it would have been appreciated had you responded to our attempts to get in touch with you “I wouldnt need the help of a family to kill elmira. If i wanted him dead hed be dead” M: his pronouns are she/her rn “If i wanted her dead, she’d be dead right now. Besides its a good thing i did.” As: why? “Do you think gonz arrived before she found out abt her capture?” As: you intercepted that? “Of course. They had a house phone. I picked it up before it went to voicemail.”
“All it required of us was letting them know that nivaya camacho is truly dead” M: it may cause problems Z: that info would get back to them anyway “They already knew. Did you think the most powerful military families wouldnt cast pinpoint on their own son?”
Asper adds ayla to the network “I dont have any bonds. I just heard about them from my father and figured there would be connections.”
26: speaking of the Hynarion Circle, we wish to ask, we noticed that there were members present when our friend elmira was kidnapped. Do you have any ideas why that may be the case on Arkari? “Our ships can pass through without any radar signaling. They fly by biology, not rocket science.” Z: do you think they were working on a larger scale? Or contract situation? “How would I know? As: do u know what they were doing there? It was the trafficking of astrazoans “Probably getting paid. I doubt they were doing it for free. It’s not ideological, but if people would do it for money, and druids are people… (she doesnt care abt zmena rn) Turred “while we’re all here, can i go back home to get my phone fixed?”
(potentially not too bad of a detour, but also potentially a lot. In the auver system, contact in remembrance streams has been cut off entirely. If we wish to go back to kiliv, we go thru Voquari Ascendancy space or go all the way down thru Aetherion Corporation space or go thru solaran space. This solaran space is the opposite side of the solaran space we need to visit. Auver system locked off by voquari, aetherion, Concord of Aedryn, solaran, Hollow Stars) We explain we cant rn but once we’re finished here in aedryn space
Vespucciano sells almado coke He then leaves to his room
Al: Kalervo Turred you mentioned a kindergarten and rebirthing tubes??? Elaborate???
“Well yknow sometimes your mom freezes you and then has to thaw you so she creates an artificial womb that you come out of. After the kindergarten.” As: what is the kindergarten??? “Do you remember being a sperm asper? As: i am an android. I was not birthed.
Looks at ayla “no of course not. No one remembers it” Turred “i do! That was the kindergarten!” R: what???? X: what was it like being a sperm? “The usual, u were in a pod and fed info and then you come out.” As: what information? “About the world and politics. I have the equivalent of a hs diploma.” 26: we received a degree Al: surely asper doesn’t have one As: no Z: do you remember anything before that? “No it was just the kindergarten, learning in our tubes, seeing the other sperms get removed.” As: others? “Yeah. they werent born so good. Some crawled on the ceiling and some couldnt answer questions so well” As: were there any others who werent removed? “Only me. Im the sperm that one, thats how my mom explained it. I learned sperm were like tadpoles but they didnt look like that.” 26: what did they look like? “Normal with brown hair and brown eyes?” 26: like yourself “No, i have almond hair.” Z: names? “Sperm dont get names. Mom told me.” R: u got a name when u won? Z: did your mother explain why you were born? “No i dont like to think abt it. I mean, you know the birds and the bees right?” X: no? “So someone with sperm implants them within someone with an egg. I assume she had an egg?” Almado destroys his phone X: have u had any dreams since the one with coins? “Yeah i write them in my dream diary” X: read it for us? He reveals his dream diary hidden behind conditioners Like a serial killer journal But its abt a god of death according to the dreams he had. It has mikus head and 6 limbs killing the bugs (almado killing the bugs and became a god of death) Doesnt drawn in with malice, but odd reverence of the miku headed one but scarier than what almado looks like Z: do u find these dreams scary?
“No they just are. They arent like the coin dream. Does asper find dreams of aeryn-vox scary?” As: i dont dream but i wouldnt Turred was very much born within the bubble Z: turred do you know how many years old you are?
“1.” (2:1 to earth years, 2 earth years = 1 Kiliv-VI year)
Al: when was the first time u heard the term sexico-6? “I think in the kindergarten?” As: what did you learn? “That its the ultimate pleasure!” (general ad sentiment) Z: before you met us, did you know anyone besides your mom? “Holograms! They taught me how to talk to people, and since ur my friends ive been doing a good job!” 26 mindlinks with him showing the egg and hardlight construct area 26: was this similar to the kindergarten? He looks at us and then passes out, emergency cushion catching him Seems fine? But last 5 mins are being erased from his mind Being replaced with something else, images of him being oddly tired He has to do a fort save, but we can shine a spotlight on him and also holographic memory Go back Hey voz korr wtf is up Voz “that’s simple. I’m the one who gave her THS.” Huh???? “We have the ability to overwrite parts of dna.” R: you changed her dna? “Of course, and her infant powers. Despite her white hair, she’s 29. When she revives them, she sets them back 2 hours. Before, she could do it a year. Thus, if she wanted to kill me, i would let her.” As: we?
“Me and my partner. Who left me in the state that you found me. He was the muscle, i was the pilot. Who drove him there to do that to korr.” As: do you not have a grudge for taking out your implants?
Korr: “What would i do? His ideology would kill him eventually. Look at him, he went from a high pilot in solaran space and then to piloting u all.” Al: were you acquainted before this? “No.” “We met in a bar shortly after. He admitted it after. Said that secrecy is not his thing. Said if he was to kill someone, he’d rather look them in the eye.”
As: and Voz Ricander? You dont have a grudge? He left you to die “How many people do you think I’ve left to die? Al: how many were ur friends though? “3. Do you know what the most common cause of death in a starship fight is? Al: aspixyation “Yes, if no one retrieves you youre stuck until the oxygen runs out.”
Z: if thats the case, why did you ask us to save Halrex Korr? “She’ll still get a relatively normal lifespan out of this. The estimates are 15 years. Be a shame for her to die before that. I only took eternity from her. She wont be grateful, but it’s right. Besides, you needed a doctor to save you from the credicites. Have you met anyone else who fits the bill?” As: no
“Neither have i. Then maybe the orders from the emperor (she/her) weren’t wrong. We normally shoot them in the back of the head.” As: got directly from emperor?
“All are done in the name of the emperor.”
As; and how does Velu Shineleaf fit in? “In what way?” As: he sent us to you “I’ve never met the man.” (voz is a terrible liar. He is telling the truth. He never lies outright.) Al: have you met any of the info brokers? “My own of course. One in solaran that helped us a bit.” Al: if you dont mind us asking, is he-
As: in the top 100?
“I doubt so. He went by the name of Faust.”

sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.title: Session 26
sessions/epitaph-protocol/act-2/session-.description:
Prev: Session 25
Next: Session 27
Aedryn
Our ship The Blue Angel Ripley takes miku’s phone
Texting Meiko “hey just wanted you to know that Luka’s manager has it out for you. He said smth would be happening within a week. Just thought you should know. Thanks. <3 :) this is miku’s friend ripley, much love” She doesnt seem to be responding right now
Almado texts Velu Shineleaf to let him know hes ready to talk business when he is Text back within a few minutes “when and where?” Tonight? “Okay! And where?”
Or day after tomorrow. (local denny’s esque. Squingy's) today would be better To elmira: u want a free dinner? Z: why? Al: i might need backup Al: ripley u got miku tonight? (texts ur on babysitting duty) Ripley asks him not to kill almado R: u see trouble u fuckin book it Al: i really wanna be offended but he has a point
26 spending time with vespucciano, guided meditation, sect history “So huh what is this law of power?”
26: well our cultivation technique works like we’ve split the universe into 26 laws. By mastering them u master oneself, and u master the universe. “So what are they?” 26: mmmm so you see. (details hez doesnt have off the top of their head. I just made some buuuuuullshit) “I’ll hear u out thru the first 5, see how i feel” 26: very well, pls join us in meditation! Xep hacking the phone still
Asper adding Halrex Korr to network
Voz Ricander brain surgery Survivor’s guilt Will recover fast Voz just starts. Crying. Awkward for asper He feels guilty abt killing people, doesnt hate the people he’s killed “Do you feel happy at the end of a fight? As: i do not believe so “If you don’t feel these things why do u want to be immortal? As: i am the culmination of all that came before me and i am the last one that will be in this body. It’s a form of remembrance “Is it fair for you to be the last one in this body if you can’t enjoy it? Did the previous ones enjoy it? As: i believe so “Is it fair to the souls who wait if you won’t leave the body?
As: i don’t believe that souls wait if the body is not willing to undergo renewal “How do you think renewal works? As: it is a calling. The call hits you and you follow it “If it’s just a wish then why seek immortality? Why not just ignore/refuse the wish? As: it’s not entirely wish based. I think it’s also biological. I bel;ive that my existence will be a stepping stone for something greater than me motions towards the stars “All of our lives are a stepping stone to something greater Squingy’s Z: remind me again why we’re here??? Al: we’re meeting velu Z: oh! Velu comes forward into the squingy’s from a humble ship, arriving out of the atmosphere of aedryn
Almado orders 3 kids meals and a Dr. Vesk Elmira gets the slider with the toy. Of course.
Velu sits “this is how aetherion treats their guests now?” Almado orders velu a milkshake with his “So what are we meetin about?” Al: ive got things to sell and things to buy? “I presume u want ur money first. What you selling?” Al: is this a good place to talk? “This will be fine. Dw we can set up protections.”
Almado brings out the Data-Temple data: several high mineral locations verified by a data temple “Exclusive or non-exclusive?” Al: i’ll give assurance that we’ll wipe it from our records Z thru network: asper’s gonna kill you! Al network: asper will forgive us Z: shouldve stayed home “The issue is, i dont fully trust like that. But im willing to be more than generous. 20k credits?” Al: 20k credits! (shakes on it, slides over what he thinks is the only copy) He grabs, he will look and then seemingly burn the copy away. Ship leaves on its own to go down “Retrievin’ your money of course.” Al: of course. And maybe we can call it store credit for now, i have a couple questions. We’ve recently discovered how the connection that the different info brokers share. “Of course.” Al: whats the price to know where you sit on it? “Smth like that? 1k. If you want the full story, if you want to know just my here and now. 50 flat.” Al: anything to keep asper from killing me, what you got for 1k?
“The chain’s dynamic. Rn ur highly dynamic, ive been reinvited to the 100. Ive been in and out 3 separate times now. Most of us are recruited for our mystic capabilities, myself included. Rn i have 5 ppl underneath me. Due to some of the motion ur creating, ur valuable enough to give me 100 spot. During which im functionally immortal.” Z: glad we could help “Of course.” Al: anything that brings profit to us is good He types smth down on his pad “anything else?” Al: zmena u have a 8k allowance and i owe you one
Z: alright. Velu, what can i get about my brother or Velkrion for 7k? “I dont got everything that would fill the whole 7, but i can give facts about velkrion for 4k.” Z: i’ll take that
“Its actually related to the serenade, funnily enough. The designs were built using the serenade’s tech. U find the serenade, u find it. But until u fine the serenade, its inside only. We can only assume the faction that built it had an insider that could download the blueprints and tech. As for what it is, its a giant self sustaining space station. As for what its doin, i believe research. Biological and the like. Though, normally, there’s no reason to be so luxurious w the serenade’s design if it was just biological. A rat’s cage would be enough.” Z: more than just research? “For 4k? Absolutely what im tellin you.” Z: thank you “Thank you” types on his pad (he’s writing down what we’re asking)
Z: do you know anything abt THS? “A bit, gotta be more specific.” Al: ways to prevent it or early detection that aren’t on the market Z: ways to contract that aren’t genetic? “That’d run you 10k.” Z: i’ll get back to you if thats fine “Of course, ill take this as a tip” takes his toy Al: 10k to raise the cost of info on us? “When people see a high price, they know they’re on to smth. But better for them to know theyre on to smth than the info. But u have 15k, why not increase it?” He gets the final remaining 5k, almado pockets it Zmena grabs food for ripley Next day
Gaelia Falls Stage is near the top of a plateau that overlooks a group down near the waterfall and groups that are on terraces effectively. The way up has a conventional path u can walk up, but almado is running security for that We set up, zmena and 26 are handing out miku fliers across the street Night falls, miku steps on stage The various holograms containing her image move in sync with her as she moves around the waterfall Magical Cure Loveshot - not bad World is Hers - CRIT
As we hear the crowd cheer for miku, almado sees Her limping, bloodied. Luka approaches, alone in the dark Almado stows his weapon, pulls out his medkit, heals her up Al: when you leave here, you’re going to call meiko and tell her you need a replacement. Youre not going to tell her any information. Everything will be ok. This is for your bottom line. And more importantly its for miku’s bottom line.
“The vesentis family-” Al: has nothing to do with this. “I saw them!” Al: no you didn’t. Its for your safety, my safety, and miku’s safety that you did not see anything. Sometimes we make investments that don’t pay off. Sometimes, the risk we take gets us killed. You were lucky that this is wehre ur part in this ends. You’re gonna go up there- Looks at him “did you set this up?” Al: is that really your concern right now? The way i look at it, he did not have your interest, he didn’t have miku’s interest. He was in our collective way and has been removed. You’re going to get a new bodyguard and a new manager that is easier for you to manage. Almado grabs her as she tries to run Al: ik ur like her sister, but i cant have you in her way. Shoves her, crits Hears miku crescendo up above, returns to his post After a few mins, on shortwave radio: where’s luka? Is she in position? “No, luka’s not here. Who’s the highest ranking aetherion member?” Al: i believe its me “We have a full crowd, can miku still perform?” Al: she has a full tracklist, she can Almado to network: the show goes on. Keep performing. Miku, ur sister doesnt show up, but miku is asked to continue performing M: is smth wrong? Did smth happen? Where’s luka? “There mightve been transport difficulty. We didnt see her car come in” M: cant you call her? “We’ve been trying. But… she’s stuck in traffic.” holds a paw to an ear
M: what abt Kagamine Rin and Kagamine Len, are they here? “They are.” “We’ll alternate a bit, miku can be the main show. We’ll offer a 50% refund to most attendees.” M: if you think that’s best? I wouldnt want to ruin luka’s concert? “We wouldn’t want to ruin the audience’s night.” M: ill keep singing as long as i need to! They announce that luka’s unable to make it, says that miku is lead role with rin and len as backup Miku rin len do collab song Crowd cheers for miku They slowly forget abt why they were here, causing luka to fade from their memory and be replaced with miku (NORMAL NORMAL NORMAL THEYRE ENJOYING THIS I PROMISE) Miku finishes it out, tired, worried about luka who never showed Performance was a success tho, twins bow with miku on stage Lights go dim, able to regroup Skittermander “ik not normal rate, but we didnt agree on such a thing so i hope u understand. Paying u partially the sum we agreed to pay luka’s manager.” 30k Al: you’re 10k short “10k it is. Thank you for saving the show.” Al: that’s what miku does. She makes dreams come true. Almado hugs miku, shaking Asper gets a pretty good idea that he is resigned to this Everyone able to meet back up after the concert Almado chainsmoking Miku goes to xep: ur good at finding ppl, right, thats ur job? X: no its killing them M: u track ppl down? X: yeah for the bullet in the head M: well i dont want taht to happen to luka, but do u think we can find her? X: i can try to cyberstalk her. If u swipe a pack of almado’s cigarettes i will M: almado said im not allowed to touch them X: ok thats fine X: maybe she went into hiding after they attacked lucas halo. Any aetherion- do u have any safe places to go on this planet? Maybe she’s at the embassy? Miku goes there Kasatha typing with lower hands M: we havent been in contact with luka in almost a day now? “Of course” M: did she come by here? “Publically no! If you wish, u can pay the fee and we can see if she came discreetly?” M: whats the fee? “50 credits” Al: anything for ur peace of mind (pays) “She’s not come in here, manager almado. Would u like a complementary beer?” Al: of course.
It makes almado the assistant manager of the MUSE project We go rest Almado perception check. And miku
SEE The Spider POINTING A GUN AT SLEEPING MIKU “Its a shame one of your engines malfunctioned” (hes trying to explode the ship) Combat
Voz Ricander takes us off into the air. Scary bc hes still recovering The spider punches almado to death before Korr brings him back If hes not taken down by critical hit weakness, he has a chance to just. Stay up
Ayla Kalervo Turred and Bubbles are also in this fight Vespucciano gets the crit hit + kill A message on his armor “please return me to aetherion corp for a reward!” Almado goes to the mechanical bay, disassembles the spider Voz parks, immediately passes out Zmena asking ripley abt what they should do abt the info Z: hey do u remember when almado and i went to squingy’s? As: it was odd. He does not like you very much Z: yeah well velu was there. And almado seems to have kept the mining data and sold it to velu As: im sorry? Z: yeah he sold the mining data to velu Asper removes Almado from the network As: thank you for informing me about this. I need to think about these things and check some data Z: i have to inform you that we both got money from it. He got money and gave me a cut As: so you allowed this to happen? Z: he said it before i could stop him. I didn’t know he was going to do it As: you could have spoken. You are telling me that you did not try to attempt to stop this deal? Z: i didn’t Zmena is removed from the network Info is stored on the ship computer. Only person who could access it is Xep As: I would like you to check if the information from the data temple has been removed X: yeah sure. It looks like it got deleted but I have backups As: i would like to get a physical copy of this. Would you assist me in uploading it onto Aedryn servers? Xep does this for their dear friend who talks to them X: is there any particular reason we’re doing this? As: almado sold the information to Velu X: oh shit. do you want me to put a 24 hour delay on this? As: 24 hour delay would be good. I will not be here. Xep sets it up so that the information will be disseminated in 24 hours and then goes to the Miku zone. X: hey almado. You have 24 hours to pay almado back Al: asper? Almado texts velu: “data wipe was unsuccessful. Information no longer exclusive. What’s your venmo” Velu text “i didn’t expect it to be successful. That’s why i bought the info at 1/20th of the true value. It’s already been sold to an interested party.” Almado starts puking aggressively. Xep installs spyware to steal all his data Xep, laughing: holy shit almado. You’re fucked man. Xep has learned a new emotion Flashing their screen to show almado the message Almado closes the door to talk with Xep: let’s talk business X, somewhat incredulous: ok sure. What do you have to offer? Al: right now not enough. But 20k credits? X: do you think I work for money? Al: worth a shot. Think of it as an investment. Whatever i have to give. The moment you think of it it’s yours. Anything less than this. This would break her. It would absolutely break her X: did you do it for a reason? Al: i did it for her X: elaborate Al: if she didn’t turn a profit and stayed where she was it wouldn’t have just been the spider. He did that cause he hates me. They wouldve sent bigger and bigger fish until eventually they got miku. This bought her time. We’re all a family here right? You could be highwayman. Protecting your family? X: woah i thought we were talking as friends. I didn't think you were blatantly trying to trick me. Im not stupid almado Al: damn. lights up a cig my poor attempts aside, this did buy her time. This knowledge would break her heart and her spirit X: so what’s up with the transfer? Al: oh you read that too? You’re a quick fucking reader X: i read everything Al: remember when miku and i had our disagreement? That’s when i requested the transfer. Then we met meiko and i sent the retraction X: ok. I will put a suggestion on the table. I guess it’s a final offer, i don’t like negotiation. You’re going to apologize to asper, you’re never gonna do that again, you’re gonna let me put spyware on ur phone, you’re gonna tell miku the mob killed luka, and let me take a look at your collar. Almado walks over to xep, gives them access. Xep puts their own transmitter into almado’s collar so they can set it off. Puts an Elite battery in there so only they can set it off, not aetherion. X: let me just give this a try paralyzes Almado He fails and falls to the ground X: alright ready to apologize to asper and tell miku the mob killed luka? Al: what order? X: doesn’t matter Al: asper it is Asper is in their room packing everything up, hands shaking. Basically the closest to an emotion they have felt basically forever. Trying v hard to not fuck up anything. As: almado Al: im sure youre aware of the deal i made As: im very aware yes Al: im not expecting u to forgive this As: i will not Al: will you listen to my reasoning? As: do you have the capability of showing anyone respect almado? I know i asked you what must be done for you to respect us, but i feel my requests in this matter have been very straightforward. I do not try to beat around the bush or hide or lie, but that seems to be what you do. So what must… do you have the capability to respect someone who is not of aetherion make? Al: one moment. almado heats up a spoon so he can disable the collar’s listening functionality being aetherion does not matter. As: what matters/ Al: success. Safety. And personal profit As: and if you throw everyone who tries to assist you under the bus? Disregarded them? Disregarded their wishes? What leaves you then? Credits? Al: yes. But i will be honest asper, this situation we’re in is a new one for me. Typically i would have been betrayed by now. It’s just the way that business typically goes. I’m not saying im a saint but i’m saying i’m used to being around people like me. Not that i expect you to forgive me and not that i’m asking for it. I just want to make sure that you have all the facts. Such as how half the money i got from the deal went to covering our tracks for the group. 1k went to asking about velu and his place in the mystic network. 4k went to info about zmena’s brother. So information was lost and i understand your anger with that. I put zmena in a position that he could not say no. so at the very least don’t cut him from the network. If it makes you feel any better, i’m sure that xep can put an app on your phone that will take care of things when you need it. As: i do not desire such things. I do not find joy in the harming of others. Al: that would be psychotic
As: yes/ i do not enjoy putting more harm onto others than is necessary for a mission to be completed. Yet it appears that you are under a different mindset. I am packing right now to go to my sect. My sect is nearby and it is a home that i have. I wish to return, but i need time almado. At least a day or so. This is not a situation that i believed that i would have to be in after i’d explicitly told you what would happen should anything happen to that data. So… i will need a day or so. Please respect that. Almado nods and fucks off to go talk to miku X: asper you may wanna hear this too Al: miku. I’ve received terrible news M: oh no did something bad happen? Al: something terrible happened. They found signs that luka and her manager fell in combat. He fought bravely for her but in the end members of the vesentis family killed lucas halo and luka was an unfortunate casualty M: is luka dead? Al: idols never die. Luka one is dead, but that core of her that makes her luka is still there. The aetherion corporation will never let her die truly. When you see her again, and you will see her again, she might not remember everything but it will still be her M: i thought you said nothing was gonna happen to her Al: i know im sorry miku M: they recovered her body right? You said there was evidence Al: nope just evidence M: where did it happen? Al: idk i didn’t pay the full price from velu M: i can ask him Al: no don’t worry about it right now M: we got a lot of money can’t we pay with that? X: the mob told us. It’s witness statements and from those that were there who shot at luka Al: and the reason lights up his collar again that we, I, requested the hit on Lucas Halo is because he planned to have Meiko killed. M: why didnt you tell me i couldve warned her? Al: i didnt want the risk of others finding out M: but it’s important for her to know R: she knows, or at least i told her M: what did she say? R: we don’t know yet M: but you wouldve told her right as u found out right? And that was days ago Al: it’s been a constantly evolving situation. If something went wrong i didnt want you to be affected by it. M: meiko says i dont get affected by what my bodyguard does Al: this is different. They wouldbe made u pay inblood, not credits M: so u traded luka’s life for meiko’s? Al: basically when u put it like that M: why didnt u tell me we couldve worked together? Al: miku ilu but u have told everyone all of our secret plans M: u didn’t say those were secret Al: i know but sometimes we have to take risks M: i dont wanna take risks i wanna be friends Al: all ur friends are here. X, in the bond: hey miku, yk how almado’s collar shocks him when he does certain things?
