M: i wish it didn’t X: i think ur brain does that to u when u hear certain phrases M: i don’t feel any shocks X: i think it erases when you hear certain sentences As: miku i think it’s like turred’s memory loss M: if i don’t remember it then it must not be important X: it’s the type of things that almado has to silence his collar for. Things ur company doesn’t want u aware of M: that doesn’t sound good X: no. and usually if we say to keep something a secret it’s really easy for ur brain to erase the keep it a secret part. Which idk if that’s actually happened but yk (this part is a vibes call). Do u wanna test it out? M: do u think we need to? X: would u like to know things that aren’t approved by aetherion? M: idk isn’t that bad for me? X: your programming probably says it’s bad for u, but u also saw my programming before i got taken out of it. And that told me killing people was good. So i think there might be some of the opinions of our creators baked in. M: if u think it’s best for me to test this theory that’s fine X: mentally blasts her “nothing to lost but our chains” Miku finds it hard to absorb. She gets the gist of it but a lot of it doesn’t stick X: how are u feeling miku? Do u feel clear about the last couple seconds of conversation? M: we were just talking about u testing me! X: good to know, it is over the bond. We said some things. Hey almado what’s miku not supposed to hear Al: most things about immoral, indecent acts. X: ok but that’s not what u said she can’t handle Al: oh there’s a bit of a miscommunication. She’s a 16 year old girl X: WHAT Al: well she’s modeled to be a 16 year old girl X: you’ve been abusing a child? Al: it’s fine she’s treated far better than i was at that age. She’s like a 16 year old girl with severe bipolar and i figured the info would break her spirit and make her unstable X: do u think she’s just gonna go off the rails or something? She’s killed a lot of people/seen people killed Al: do u remember how she freaked out when she killed a spider? X: yeah that’s different Al: is it? If she finds out that one of her best friends who’s been with her for super long in living memory… excuse me X: ok we’re going Al: the moment she knows i betrayed her like this she… ok so sometimes when people are hit with incredible emotions like anger and loss they react emotionally, incredibly so. They don’t have emotional limiters. I truly believe that if she gets too much bad news all at once she’ll be a danger to herself and those around her. X: she seems pretty grappleable man. I think u can just hit her on the head, we have a poisoner too. Al: i didn’t mean she literally couldn’t understand it. X: no yeah i know she can understand it, but like if she feels it all at once won’t she just be up and down? I think u should tell her u did something unforgivably bad and u did it for her safety. When we go back to aetherion space we can use it to find out what’s up with miku and her limitations. Clearly u don’t know what they are and are just guessing at what’s most convenient for u. Almado thinks of aetherion combat rule number 324: when in doubt pull that trigger. Even shots in the dark are good enough ig X: are we going back to the factory? We can learn more about miku there. Do u want to stick around miku and the rest of us? Otherwise ur gonna have to learn how to not cash in ur chips all at once and actually build something Al: to tell the truth i don’t wanna be here. X: then leave Al: then i die X: how much debt are u in? Al: once i get my debt paid i’m gone. Ur never gonna see me X: is this not the most money you’ve ever seen? Al: i also inherited part of the colony ship’s debt and that’s generational Debt checking fee is 500 for outsiders, 20 for almado. Minus the 20k he now owes, his debt is currently 1.5 million X: how much were you gonna get paid? Al: miku doesn’t get paid and i was forfeiting my share X: how much was it gonna be? Al: maybe 100 credits? X: i can see how you would think that, but Al: miku is the #1 idol now X: yeah until luka is back Al starts saying some shit
We’re gonna go to Istitiver System to try and fix shit

Solaran Emperor has put reward of 10k credits minimum for the deaths of any immortals killed to fulfill a citizens sacrifice! Citizen and status of scar not verified. Immortality of sacrificed individuals will be! The hyperrail cars will be outfitted with temporal sentry turrets. Riders are advised against doing violence as they are programmed to target those who fire first and fare evaders
Voquari Ascendant Yarveinthi the Golden has been spotted outside Tse and Ifont dragging people into the burning sun. satellite imagery has shown mass corpses posed to point into the light Water treatment handled by nanomachines that cling to dirt and boil water. Citizens are advised to not fall into the treatment plants due to their sensors not being able to tell living flesh from contaminating material
Security: Aetherion Corporation has started offering higher tier weapons to those who can pay beyond prev legal limit Technomancer gang said to be behind [error: data corrupted]
Checking on the other bodies Suimin, Denpakant All killings are consistent 1, taller, resisted the poison and got into a fight. Person got a few blows on the attacker but eventually succumbed All vents tampered with Lashunta man also at the scene “Who are you?” Neighbors “I see. Friends with the woman?” I: we all know where we were at the place of the crime even tho we hadnt spoken much before “Might i ask why you give a shit?” I: i dont want to be murdered. And i’m really curious Ko: i dont but these guys are fun I: shut the fuck up! We gamers gotta stick togehter S: this is part of my job “There’s one good excuse. Would a serial killer be so bad in a world such as now.” I: yes! “Why???” I: everyone deserves to live and they died painfully S: an excess of murders mean there are less people when the next scarring happens He pulls out a notebook “you dont happen to be aetherion do you” S: i am! “Have they been taking proper tally of their dead?” S: indeed they have (debts are sent to the next of kin) “Can i get access?” S: i can put in a request, who are u “I’m part of the census bureau” (hard to verify, very much gives you a reason to go to any place) Konbini analyze target Missing fingerprints on right, but able to get ones on his left Tall 6’2” when not slouched Has a few implants, autorecognition lenses and enhancements that let u move faster Theoretically lashunta that can do slight mind reading H: any id? He hands over his ID to Haven, who thinks its legit, who hands it over to Ithax
Marlow Tensvey Might be a bureau worker, def not underworld related thinks “Can i see your ids?” S: of course!
“League of leisure?” I: hell yeah! “Why?” Ithax starts infodumping for an hour and he doesnt seem annoyed at all H: how’d you get in? “I was in when the building closed.” (27ish hours ago) V: why were you in the building? “Because I heard there had been murders on the first 10 floors” Odd, they would be more interested in the living Konbini does background checks on him with sacraments phone First thing is that his name Is listed on govt database, no picture tho I: keen to get out or u wanting out? “Someone has to keep track of the dead.” Ko: what happened to ur fingers? “Used to work blackops.” V: for what?
“Aedryn. Its why i’m an employee for their govt now” Ko: pay well? “No.” S: does it ever “Better than aetherion. At one point i was in their bases watching them to gacha pulls to get ammo to stop me.” I: what have you found about the bodies? “They had names. This woman killed her own children.” S: scarring or before then?
“Part of The Scarring.” Ko: plural? “Three.” Ko: all three for the scarring?! Anything abt the other dead? Did they do any morally correct things “One was a serial cheater.” S: all perform immoral actions? “I’ve only seen three. But yes. One was a cheater, one sold hard drugs.” P: did you hear about the one that was abusive? “That would be the cheater.” S: how did you find out this info? Their misdeeds? “I contacted the abuser’s wife, she wrote about it. For the dealer, i saw it. It was hidden in his drawers. Alongside a lockbox of credits.” S: possible someone’s doin it out of a sense of justice? “Maybe.” V: vigilante style He tries to not speculate abt the serial killer “There’s a qr code on the back of my id, you can contact me thru official channels if necessary.” Next is the taller man Vesk 7’1”
Eskov Background check Able to see same bits around the vents, same telltale Runs over to the couch, takes off the couch cushions Foot of killer went thru, see where springs went up instead of down Come to conclusion: foot didnt go thru, his boots pulled spring up. To get thru vents hes wearing magboots. Give killer a rough extra 5-6inches of height Still smaller than the vesk Other victims normal height Range of killer would be about 5’10-6” Using fingerprints to open his phone, checking to see texts, cursory search Dubious if wrongdoing, did blackmail aetherion corp a few times Worked as security consultant, whenever aetherion man paid him to ignore concerns, then blackmailed them abt reporting further up the chain Last person Konbini sees that the person doesnt have a phone or anything. Seemingly lives off the grid, but u do have to pay rent digitally Seem to be local worker for various charities Some are derided by aetherion Otherwise charities dont seem harmful, worked at foodbanks Pantry is fairly well stocked, no sign of hoarding or starvation The gamers fuck up the body, the sutures unravelling Rocks dont react weirdly to being taken out Patch takes some of the rocks Body will seem altered Eyes ears lungs, joints (behind the knees and elbows), and finally the heart Weight of all the rocks equals out. 2 for lungs, 2 dense for eyes and ears Rocks are obsidian-like substance, sooty like obsidian S: given the nature of the killings, this does match typical MO of the silence. Cult. they think sensory organs blind ppl to their god. Dark between stars. When they kill ppl theyre found in sensory deprivation tanks. Cult injects them with a neurotoxin to perform some kind of divination. Seems similar to that Differences, the ppl there are alive for the process for longer No sensory deprivation chambers in this building Silence typically grab any passerby, but some group has some methodology. One is using prev victims divination to determine the next victim Go back to floor 37 Going to missing neighbor, kaspar fails real bad We all bungle this We need to take a rest to do this Sending ithax into the vents He video calls us He needs more rope so we pull him back
Ok Save Point Convenience
Bored teenager Al H: rope. You got it? “What alloy do you need?” Basic 2 credit for 50ft Al can we get a discount, turrets move toward him “i cannot” “Does your friend like anime?” Ko: vintovka do u like anime V: it doesnt exist on my planet “She doesnt know [insert anime]” Ko: we’ll watch it on Discourse later if u can fix my phone
“Did you know theyre making a Dr. Vesk flavored Hero Energy Drink soon” Ko: yeah but sure. Anyway my phone “I’ll be right back.” He hands back unlocked phone Ithax demanding konbini to look at her phone He saved some fingerprints in the backlog. He mightve downloaded info off of it, unsure Ko: sacrament-sama cover ur ears. He probably just downloaded the porn of his anime i have on my phone I: ok go ask him Ko: hey next time u wanna download porn off my phone can u just ask first “I’m sorry. I just saw bullet choir and got excited. U know how i feel abt idols.”
He explains Bullet Choir, idol anime that takes place in a war zone Vintovka does look vaguely like one of the idols Ko: u havent seen anything weird have u. With all the killings. Anything sus abt the butcher “Not really? I tend to not pay ppl mind. I tried to talk to him but he seemed wildly uninterested in the Graveyard Shift at [smth]. He seems like the type”
Manager to here now runs Circuit Lab, no manager in the building who can access the computers We can use konbini to impersonate later, once we’ve seen them
Go to Ogar Butchery and Produce
Onmagakar waves at us “The big one’s finally come for meat. Would you like something on the house?” S: i dont believe im allowed to accept charity “Its not charity, its a donation. Any preferences?” S: no anythings fine Try to distract him with sacrament trying meat, he doesnt get distracted “U couldve just asked.” Konbini gets a tour Many vents Incredibly clean, nothing seems to stand out, keeps meat away from it The knife he keeps on him could be used, standard steak knife. Made with a nice mithril blade Small shirren engravings A lot of the meats hanging are rare and preserved, bron tusk, ironhide, scorchtail, nebula manta. Fancy, all of which are super expensive. Typically served to ppl who come in Primary way he makes money is grocer himself “Do you want something of it? I could give a slice and cut it up.” “It’s not like it’s been easy for anyone.”
(kaspar did know abt his son, hes a single father after his other 2 partners died in a crash. He is helpful and nice to the community. His son allegedly died in the scarring.) (he is pregnant. Technically. Tube pod is opaque, to simulate warrens they grow in.) P: how far along is your baby? “Not a baby. Its a memorial to him.” I: What happened to your son if I might ask? “He died” V: seems a bit too recent to talk more further “You all are lovely people but it seems inappropriate for us to discuss this further. You first tried to sneak into the back under false pretenses to look at my wares.” Ko: Sorry I’m a little shy “No you aren’t” We buy some meat as an apology “You haven’t offended me so bad as to make me redact my previous offer. Is there anything you want?” H: I don’t have a budget for anything super high end. Do you have anything better than that. “Have you ever had super high end? I have starless ham. The pigs are grown in zero G, allowing them to fatten up in every direction. Blade is made to cut through flesh, slightly vibrates so it doesn’t get stuck Knife could’ve been used in the murders Whats up w the engravings on ur knife “Steadfast in my belief of the future. Best translation.” K: did you do that urself? “My son did it for me.” (the rocks were engraved. The writing seems similar like its by the same hand. Same stylization at the end, same acid burns to create the engravings.) Father’s handwriting Does match son, slightly different tho Analyze No fingerprints (bug) Voice modulator Not common Has internal & external injuries from being a soldier Ka: i did lose my mom in the scarring, i do understand how difficult losing ur family is “It doesnt have to be the same. The pain is real regardless.” Ka: we’re all in this together. We’re around. If u need anything let us know. Let me know. “Of course. I’m very well capable of handling violence, but you seem a capable group. Its exciting to see young take initiative in a forgotten part of town. At least it feels that way.” (dad is a bit more blue than the son. Son had smaller eyes, as far as face portrait seems)
Patch and Pray Woman waves “howdy. You come here for smth? What work yall need done?”
Serath Ka, the doctor. The closest thing to an official doctor, but everyone visits patch for a reason. She’s less than gentle I: weird request, could we look at ur north store room “Thats service entrances and exits, should be closed. Why?” I: saw someone sneaking around, we want to investigate goings on “I could give u a wildwise graft if you need” Could we just pay
“Sure. i havent gotten much since the scarring. Ive been doin much more combat focused stuff. I never thought i’d be let go from Mr. Stud duty. Its how i got my kill.” (3 mr stud implants, 1 was a bomb) Penile enhancement Any lens fittings “Less and less, mostly aetherion corpo ladder. We do do loans. Buy now, pay double later. No interest.” We pay 5 credits I: could we look around the back “Now why would i let regular customers look around the back?” We asked nice? “U did. But my regulars pay 500credits” Backrooms are effectively service hallway, lets cargo trucks go thru and offload as need be In the back, smth odd abt the vents. Someone does climb up thru them, but also they have set up maintenance switches to activate despite them being on standby. Vents are modular. Covers up tracks Konbini tries to analyze, but obfuscation implant Back to the vents Goes to the red light blaring, blinding him from looking down Able to see the red blood Seems to not be where the killer is, shines flashlight down into a storehouse. Not conveniences Next blood Stares down into the butcher shop Turns around, his rope is cut but still taut on the party’s side. Taped to the side of the vents We can hear pain noise as ithax is getting jeff the killed He begins strangling as his last action in the vent Ithax tries to change shape, he holds him, compressing body down “I am so sorry. I am not a bad person, i swear. I really hoped it wasnt you who found me out. I know that you are a good person. And i do look forward, if it comes to this, to you being part of the body. Why did this have to happen to us?” I: dont do this. There’s still hope. Please “There is. Youre just going to take yours to your grave.” snaps his neck. Ithax gains dying condition We are Sprinting Over To The Butcher’s Shop Patch and sacrament get there first, she kicks open the door Goes to where the vent is, pulls down Others manage to get here, ithax and the killer spill out of the vents Patch stabilizes “You have good friends.” lets go of ithax’s dead bodies S: why did you do that “I jsut want to stop the scarring.” S: by killin more??? “Aye. by being a killer.” S: how is that gonna stop the scarring?? “The killing wont. The rituals will.” S: what. How???? What rituals???? “I could tell you. I’d have to kill you.” S: like you killed all those others? Why them?? He walks around. “Its your first day on the job, isnt it?” “Seven are going to come for me for the seven kills, no?” Yeah “Then i was right in waht in what i did.” S: how does that make it right? “Hard to explain. Esp to someone like you, tho ur lovely.” He explains, the dc is smth he barely passes tho so hard for even us “Could we wait for the others then?” “Im killing people. Youre going to punish me.” He uses prepared action to put vial into gasmask Cant see his face under gear and hood Do see red dripping down behind the mask A form of self sacrifice used in rituals, vaporized hydrochloric acid hes pumping into his face and eyes. Make it hard to identify, but necessary for the ritual Coughing thru it “lets begin” He’s a spellcaster Special abilities: Ritual poison Fairly strong Poison hes taking will weaken him as the rounds go on Analyze target No fingerprints Losing face due to the hydrochloric acid Definitely a shirren Stabbing people with his son’s knife Turns to vintovka “do you worship a god?” V: only god i worship is the bullet “It’s a bad god to worship in my opinion.” “It’s a shame to do it to a good doctor.” Vintovka gets the kill He seems to grab onto the pod as he goes down, and holds on tight. 1 potential level up Sacrament carrying konbini He had fake blood packs Past the courtyard, thru the trees, ithax can see the lights go out in various apartments Taking his mask off, his face is seared but still recognizable Everyone was injured at least once….. Plans: Text or call vossk abt the situation Check out his room Think really hard about the ritual We gotta go fuckin rest

sessions/the-red-tally/session-3.html.title: Session 3
sessions/the-red-tally/session-3.html.description:
Prev: Session 2
Next: Session 4
Suimin, Denpakant News
BREAKING: Civilians are told to not participate in the Dead Yield AR. All profits gotten from it will be taxed at 100% says local officials.
TRAFFIC: The hijacking of ETePeV's is ill advised. Numerous groups have used them in order to go into the dark and sun sides but without proper maintenance and use they are no more effective than a normal car. ENTERTAINMENT: Streaming services are now being paid for as a reward for avoiding murder! If you haven't killed anyone since your scar activated you are entitled to one free movie from a select list per month. BREAKING: We have confirmation that those on either of the two moons did not contract the scars. They are still legally required to stay planetside.
PUBLIC SAFETY: Quanverium University has gone silent following a riot there. Locals fear an experiment has broken free amongst the rubble.
ENTERTAINMENT: Groff the Crime Vlaka and his sidekick Puggsy the Shoony celebrate their 10th year of running. MEDICINE: Medivax to continue service for select clientele interfering with a medivax is still considered a felony. Floor 17
Patch calling Vossk Irontether Goes to voicemail Patch leaves voicemail: hi vossk i gave u ur leg. We have a predicament, please call back. Its about the serial killer, we need you as soon as possible We lock up the grocery store, drag him to the back Sacrament calls her manager
S: hi Crins “Sacrament report” S: in my megablock we have experienced a rash of serial killings, identified the culprit, forced to murder. We believe there maybe more. Continuing investigation. Allied with other residents, able to confirm alibies. Im reportin in, will update further later “Understood. How many more will you expect?” S: could be 3, possibly more
“Youre allowed to take whatever action you deem necessary, aetherion will cover expenses unless you act rashly”
Sacrament is in training to be a Hellknight for aetherion under the order of the compliance engine.
We have sacrament stand infront of the butcher freezer while we investigate his house at Ogar Butchery and Produce Incredibly boring The only thing of interest in the dad’s room being an empathnid Haven knows if theyre w stable ppl, they stay normal. This one was on its way to be a dread empathnid Butcher’s pet
Son’s room is as generic as imaginable, really boring Repulsion spell, ~6th level Disinterest repulsion, makes people lose interest in it and keeps them away from it Covers the entire apartment. Curves around walls and doors Ithax takes the spider down to sacrament We have konbini stand at the edge of the wall and bringing items in and out of the room to her We do son’s room first There’s a vent also that connects the rooms Into the vents u go ithax Doesnt see anything. Nothing hidden Basic living room + kitchen area Clear out kitchen cabinets Remove his laptop and stuff Only those in the main room are affected when the vents are also blocked off Start covering smaller objects with a metal pot to check but it’s ineffective We bring sacrament in. she immediately sees it on top of the meat fridge Meat fridge is full of The Organs A few of them have gone missing, probably spoiled Marked for organ transplant if needed Konbini looks thru his browser history Locked out This man was on the up and up at one point Able to find some knowledge, he did make his money in, tho never spoke of it, he was part of a black ops team at some point Ithax is able to find, in the post of his son’s bed, someone has left a usb drive there. Recently placed, likely not from his young years Asui model This is what you put ur files in when you really want it safe. Can’t be accessed by magic or most computers, needs a full server room But we know where the servers are. 16th. Right below this floor Text al abt when hes off work. In 1 hour Go down a level to 16 Able to see electric eel-like things flying thru the air??? Electro vore Consuming local electricity, incredibly territorial Invasive pest Not supposed to be here More than likely ate some wires, may hinder access to the farm Ithax goes to investigate emergency access hatch Drone drops down onto ithax This area is super hot and humid cause it’s the heat sinks and liquid deposits for the server room Also lets species who prefer warmer climates have a more comfortable place Go back to floor 37
Hey al. sorry abt that “I didnt think that guy was serious. There was a guy who said he’d become the god of the internet and went down there. He was kinda bald.” Ko: did u get his information
“He called himself the Stringfinder i think??” Konbini googles him She gets sent to hardcore porn sites, redirects from google Check on the body again Its missing. Yeah. Sacrament and konbini shower together It’s very unsexy and kind of like washing a cat Al is awkward in the other room Haven goes to take food from ithax’s fridge Ithax is so awkward, haven is trying to get him to chill H: you fucking got kidnapped today man I: i got my neck snapped H: You got your neck snapped! You need to crash I: (pathetically) aha u need to stay with me H: can you put in a bit more effort? I: please? H: ok sure. Yeah man i can crash on your couch and watch the door I: oh i was gonna be on the couch H: go sleep on the bed I: but I just turns into a little dog shaped alien
Kaspar checks her sister’s journal, nothing there We reconvene in the morning Konbini makes awesome coffee Ithax tells konbini to check out hiyori chan (herself) Break open the door Smell of viscera from the bathroom, kaspar can barely smell it. Faint remains Seems to come from the shower area Open the sink cabinets, not a whole lot. Cleaning supplies. Bleaches Smells vaguely like the viscera was cleaned up with chemicals Sulphuric acid (cleaning up bones), also bone saws hidden deep in the back. Used for surgical procedures usually Check the drains, find tough collagen that coats the drain To the windows at 17th floor To the apartment, all of which are locked Knock, no response A person leaves their apartment nearby, skittermander “they’re dead. Been dead.” S: how long?
Klutch (owner of gun shop Dying Light) “idk. Prob 3 weeks now it feels? I didnt put it in my calendar.” Notice any noises yesterday from this apartment
“Must be seein things. Light have been taken off. Rook-9 turned them off for more room for their server. (person in charge of computer repairs. Not a server administrator, repair guy) H: where could we find him?
“I presume Petaslice Repairs” I: just needs the electricity? “I think he just turned off the breakers, yeah.” Konbini texts al abt the eels (were they pests that stringfinder was complaining abt) “No they were his pets” Klutch is licensed to sell to aetherion personnel I: i got my neck snapped yesterday! “WELL. i cant help with that. Maybe i can order in custom armor, a neck brace?” Break into apartment Nothing but old memories remain Lights dont flick on Someone did step foot, smth abt them singed the bottom of a rug, but not the top Ithax thinks theres smth odd with the lightbulbs Vintovka sees that the lightbulb is cracked with spiral patterns. They should be broken, but are still held together We take pictures of it Sacrament touches it SHE DISAPPEARS? AND THE LIGHTBULB SHATTERS Flash for a half second She’s now standing alone on the roof of the megabuilding???? Next apartment, we flip the breaker Flip the light switch Able to see swirling patterns go across the walls Oddly move like a discobulb, tho cracks create reflections Grasping fingers goes to shadows The second they touch, the shadow disappears and then reappear after a second We send konbini They fly down to 65th floor We go to meet Can find the access to the skybay, tho under shutdown Door is a bit odd tho One is a hologram, put in place bc the original was destroyed. Someone at some point during the scarring came at it with a breachcutter Floor 16 - Fight outside the server room We do it and all level up Empty desk where there once was a greeting robot Go way down Deep deep underground Takes 7 mins to go down Man exits wearing a tank top and underwear “You approach the stringmaster?” Ko: we have some files we need to do but they only work if they hook up to servers. Can we do that “The only one who can use our servers is me. But i would happily share if you gave it to me.” Ko: sureeeee. Can i ask how u got the name stringmaster “Stringmaster or stringfinder”: Ko: which re u “I started off as the humble stringfinder and now im the stringmaster” Ko: what strings did you find
“Its pretty obvious. This will get me back into the good graces of the Signal Saints.”
(group that believe theyre creating a god w the spilled blood and computing power of senaria Technically classified as a gang??? Also weird gray area. Not really religion. Structured as a gang but thats the higher up initiative “Would u like to see some of my data? In return ill show u what the system has on all of you all.” Sacrament says shed have to kill him if he revealed aetherion info
“U wouldnt have to do such a thing. We’re all held by aeryn-vox to tell the truth.” Haven Various stream chats abt him. Rumors that float out abt gang activity I: this is slander! I mean, you would’ve told me right? H: not the time Ithax I: it’s just these people on the internet lying right? H: how much to wipe it? “Nothing can be wiped once it’s added to the strings H: strings can be cut Sacrament Aetherion secrets Sacrament performs some of her reckonings, rule one onward Patch They play the video of him intentionally botching a surgery P: but there were no cameras! “There’s always a camera” He shots at stringmaster Pulls out gun, starts combat

sessions/the-red-tally/session-4.html.title: Session 4
sessions/the-red-tally/session-4.html.description:
Prev: Session 3
Next: Session 5 News WEATHER: Irradiated rainfall expected over the Omega districts tonight. Citizens are advised to keep skin exposure below twelve minutes and avoid collecting runoff for consumption. CONSUMER WARNING: Counterfeit anti-scar inhibitors flood local markets. Experts remind citizens that there is no known cure and to not buy from vendors claiming otherwise.
PUBLIC SAFETY: Quanverium University has been completely shut off from the city due to the unexplained death of all rioters. Military forces of successfully controlled the access tunnels and have established air surveillance. EDUCATION: Board of Education is working now to establish ethical murder courses for children. BREAKING: The dark side settlements report organized chanting audible through public utility grids. Engineers maintain there is “nothing biologically concerning” about the phenomenon. MEDICINE: Black-market organ exchanges now outpace legal donations for the first time in recorded history. PUBLIC NOTICE: Citizens caught impersonating corpse collectors will face prosecution following multiple reports of “premature harvesting.”
ENTERTAINMENT: New holo-series SCARRED to begin filming in the Arsan District. |
Combat Suimin
Stringfinder is a witchwarper w rank 3 spells Unspooled vestiges???? They’re like digital kangaroos that unspool us from reality They are eating sacrament alive They disappeared upon death FUCK ENEMIES CAN LEVEL UP MID COMBAT TOO?? Server room Data is stored by floor Konbini is deleting all of our data. Nothing remains of floor 37 Kaspar has feelings about killing a man Haven and Sacrament congratulate him Ithax tries to hack inside, but konbini implanted porn ads Konbini looking at butcher’s usb drive By the time she’s near done, there’s a power outage, then it comes back on Data has been partially corrupted, the only thing that seems to remain: a single location Gps pin points toward place in the library of Quanverium University
High class university, the butcher’s son went there. Wouldve been getting his master’s degree when he died Access the butcher’s data Heavy chunk missing Onmangakar and his son Favrik Killer of son is unknown, butcher’s known kill happened outside the megabuilding, saw someone getting robbed
Weird browser history: odd runes, notably those of native progenitor species of senaria Confirmed videos of him and his son at the end of scarring being together. His son did make it back home No confirmation on son’s kill, believed to be in quanverium university, would be recorded there Incoming messages: one from son stating needing to talk, also several he sent to himself keeping in contact as if via airphone with his partners. Seems to be a recluse Needing to talk was 2 weeks into the scarring. Abt a week before he came back home Stringmaster data
Left behind various tenants of aeryn-vox in his code
He is a scion, judging by his ability to do this at the mere age of 20, he’s surely to become an ascendant. He truly seemed deluded into believing he’d become an ascendant of Voquari Ascendancy
Signal saints are a local gang from voquari, notably they have a belief in what they consider a random efficiency (like machine learning) trying to recreate evolution that would start having creatures spawn that will eventually glitch into big ones that may listen to them Likely put a small trojan that would detect that someone would be looking them up Check to see if any activity for floor 10 and below since they were killed Has been a few odd ones here and there
Biggest is Mother Cinder, SRO in charge of the daycare at the bottom. In order to keep babies alive, she’s been slowly turning the area into a deathtrap. AI with objective to protect the children Idle constant data, like servers checking in for connect disconnect
Vossk Irontether Confirmed kill fellow security guard, footage too Appears they were both injured 1-10, companion dying asked for vossk to be the killer. He killed her. No one seemed to enter the rooms with the spiral lightbulbs (teleporting lights) Scrubbing thru footage for 2 hours Konbini changing passwords Konbini checks stringmaster’s phone Few calls inward and outward Inward are from blocked numbers Outward goes to public phones Bad news: almost certainly going to public phone. Also those are tapped Good: if theyre calling from a certain number, person intercepting can tap in as if they were there Nearby crematorium does seem to be harvest organs Few are wearing gang uniforms
Some are Dead Yield recruits
Group run by Aetherion Corporation exec, has a ton of money likes to see ppl killed for entertainment If u put on a vr headset around town, they’ll give u orders and if u complete them you’ll get money Different than underground fighting ring This was a day ago Organ harvesting started 3 weeks into the scarring, when there were too many bodies Majority are dead yield
The other gang bodies are from the Wakehands, normal Hollow Stars gang, trying to get territory. They have territory in the next district, they can start trying to get control here bc they have a spaceport and we dont Go back to rest Vossk returns to the megablock as we head back to our floor Gives us a small salute with a “you have news of the killer?” I: we found him and he tried to kill me and it was the butcher. We turned around for like 10 minutes and someone stole the body. It also seemed like a cult-affiliated thing since we found runes that are affiliated with the ones cults use “Understood. I’m sorry H: I assume the matters you were working on outside have been taken care of? “Somewhat. Wake hands still seek to take the building. I try not to kill them. I: I’m glad you’re trying to stop them. Lots of things to investigate inside the building as well H: definitely a lot “Never been good at it myself I: I LOVE investigating H: he’s pretty good at it P: yeah he is I: also we think an unrelated killer turned sacrament’s neighbor into bone sludge. And there were wizards in here or some shit “She was killed? I: you knew who it was? “No. but i wish she was alive. Very creepy. I would draw a picture but my hands are really bad I: that would still be good. Also here hands over a bone sample Vossk gives us doodles, humanoid, notably not kasatha S: ancestry? “Nicest way, the mammalian ancestries look the same to me. I: someone took over the database also but we went down and got it back “And the state of this person? Dead “Im terribly sorry you had to kill again on my behalf.” I: uhjhhhhh thanks. Sacrament as lawyers now so its ok. Hellknight stuff. Rituals and occult S: under the purview of the order of the compliance engine. “Still i’ll be rescinding the lockdown for only one entrance.” He’ll unlock the 17th floor entrance Ty for protecting us P: any gang members we should be aware of? “As in the individuals?” P: yes! Or groups in general “I’d be careful of the wake hands out there? S: while you were out there, have u learned abt quanverium university’s state? “My understanding is they are locked down from one fo the military forces.
“I know one person, an android named Salix. She’s part of the imperium if that’s an issue for anyone.” Biggest issue would be anyone immortal or hiding something. Very inquisitor like, also anyone associated with ashfall, immortal oath, or broken standard. Could prove an issue moving forward, does depend.
“Do you not work with immortals as a Hellknight?” Sacrament indirectly works with devils, oops Oh she may not like us. But yknow “She’s part of the veskarium. Fight first, ideaology second. “Do you know the first rule of being in the veskarium?” When you fight, all else is 2nd While no one holds the university rn No one is stupid to go against veskarium directly. But likely smuggled in stuff. May know shit
Blind Halloways
Patch texts Doc Erzi “Are you looking to become an employee?” Patch: i can work as a contractor for now. I need an in to the university “Finally going to college?” Sends address to meet at We rest Go meet up with the man in a shady alleyway, with 3 APVs that seem to be requisitioned by the Blind Halloways. Small amount, but there are impromptu APVs with men in the back with machine guns mounted on the back of machine guns Doc walks forward happily Konbini can see thru the hologram he has on, this is someone meant to take his place and is being fed lines to act as intermediary P: doctor erzi “Its a pleasure to meet you patch!” P: pleasure “So what have you been up to since the endtimes?” P: healing. Ive gotten a lot of patients “And you’ve only been healing, no killing?” P: y. Yes “Pretty miraculous given the times. You need contacts, and i need a doctor. I was hoping to get a killer, but you’ll have to do. You need a contact with them ASAP?” P: yes, and it needs to be inside the university “Ok, work for me for a straight month, then we have a deal” P: i have a lot on my plate. Any alternatives?
“I dont suppose…. [looks, sees the kid shaking under the hologram. Not full initiate, if we say anything wrong, ppl in the back of the alley are supposed to light it up, him included.] with the aetherion girl behind you, why don’t we take back a business we lost? We need you to recapture sexico-6 for us. Most profitable endeavor.” S: given what i know of it, i believe it may be within my purview to look into that H: who are we taking it from?
“A worker who doesnt know her place. Soma.” (her gf was a worker there, and when one of the owners tried to kill her gf to fulfil scarring, she killed them. If we are to work with workers of sexico-6, not wise to voice that now.) s: i’d be willing to go in and take a look. “Dont worry, you dont need diplomacy. Scary groups such as you come with weapons, soma will come greet you.” H: just like that? “It’s either that or the girls. Someone has to engage you.” S: that’s fair. Just reclaim sexico-6, and you’ll get us into the university? “Yes. exactly. You give us our biggest foothold here, we get you in contact.” (there are 3 APVs here and they cant handle a single woman? She carries a machete and chopped up the last group they sent in.) I: you want the building? Its not we need to kill someone? Whatever methods we use to get the building? “The building and the girls. All the workers should return to their rightful place.” (a lot of ppl in poor colonies will do an immigration situation, they signed a contract) I: anything we should know to avoid being cut up by a machete? “Do you talk like this all the time????” I: moreso, we know about some of the abilities of the people there, do you know anything that might allow us to get an advantage? “No, but i can tell you how to avoid disadvantages. She has no cyberware, uses a machete, and doesn’t know how to log onto the computer half the time.” On the way back, kaspar is so quiet I: hey u seem kinda bothered, did u know there are things u can always tell me? K: Yeah man. Sorry im nervous for this one. Yknow? I also just fuckin killed someone for the first time. The first time well- felt like smth different.” I: is the… women? At the store? Or like? The union busting? That you feel totally down about bro? K: idk much abt unions tbh. This is the only job i ever worked. Im nervous that this is gonna,,, im afraid abt some people ik that might be in danger if we go I: what. Please tell us more???? K: uhm. Ig liiiiike soma is a friend of a friend is the best way to put it? And i dont want… I: ur friend would be sad if we totally axe murdered her in the name of union busting? K: id be sad too! I: gooood to know. That makes senses. K: idk soma personally, but ik shes trustworthy. I dont want to get u caught up in that business and i dont want to get my friend caught up in this I: it makes sense, but should we talk to ur friend abt this?? K: I dont have her number I: oh! K: yknow when ppl go off the grid I: yes and i was very upset and now i track his whereabouts K: i doooooont? Kaspar looks at vintovka to see if shes paying attention (yes, but if u turn a corner u have abt 10 secs to sign) K: soma was… affiliated with a group and then my friend became dramatically unaffiliated with the group, but theyre still friends to my knowledge? I: one is in a gang and one isnt? K: yes (kaspar doesnt want this info to go to vintovka, nervous abt if vintovka knows specifically, but if ppl know her friend is in danger) I: tough situation. We might need to talk this one out as a team? Do u want anything set up if i get killed then the info i have abt vintovka is released? K: HUH. i dont want u to kill urself over this, its NOT that serious I: okokok. There was a lot of shooting Idk if how seriously you guys keep ur secrets lol. Ha. hahah. Sacrament agrees to disarm ppl before going into kaspar’s apartment Ok interventions I: ok welcome to our friendly team meeting that’s non violent in nature. We killed a man for distributing info abt patch I: konbini why did u delete that data. Ik ur also busy making pancakes. So i can let this slide. Due to the pancakes I: i have learned that there are certain people with affiliations to certain gangs that are related to what’s happening at sexico 6. This is unrelated to Haven’s gang. H: what gang is it?
K: started off The Broken Standard Vintovka raises an eyebrow at that H: wdym started off broken standard? They’re not anymore? K: it’s like a splinter now. The sexico 6 H: be more specific K: soma was in the broken standard but disobeyed them to kill the blind hollaways and save her gf. Means she got kicked out of the gang to avoid a gang war Technically burned by both groups H: this does complicate things I: now is ex-allegiance to any particular group going to be a problem for anyone? It could be anyone really V: i don’t care. Why would I care? I: oh because… no reason. V: continue pls I: because you’re a member! Kaspar is a bit freaked at this, seems nervous V: no there’s probably worse data on there. Even if someone is part of a gang it doesn’t mean they want all of their actions part of it. Why do u think im so far removed? H: i was wondering that too V: you may notice my apartment is not frequented often. I normally live in broken standard territory. If i don’t want to be seen this is where i am H: what so you shoot people for fun? V: no ofc i don’t. I always have a reason for it. I watch too many people die for fun. I just want to lessen their influence. S: who’s influence? V: broken standard. Or any sort of gang really H: i was a bit worried about you, but i think we’re on the same page here I: u are?? H: lessening the broken standard’s influence V: maybe different motivations though K: just to clarify vintovka. You aren’t actively with them for their causes? V: not for their causes. I have more personal reasons I: if we fuck with them will we be fucking with you? V: depends. They know im separate. They don’t have my exact safehouse location Most of the party hates the broken standard or doesn’t care Basically vintovka is on gang sabbatical I: why do we hate them haven H: broken standard is an offshoot of the old imperium. Yk when the wars were happening? They ended up here. Very military.
I: erm actually haven. Part of a military branch that tried to take over but failed. Leader is named Mafilus (the one permitted immortal). Incredibly militaristic. Recruit children or victims of their conquest who are added to the rolling tally of their recruits. Vintovka did they conquer ur home?
The imperium did conquer vilar within vintovka’s life I: were you alive and a child on the planet when they conquered it? V: might have. I’ve only been here for about 3 years? I don’t remember too well I: and then your super cool gang is not into this other one haven? H: well that’s a personal opinion. I wouldn’t put it like that. When I was a teen i got up into some bad business. It wasn’t broken standard directly but basically the same group. I was with them for a good couple years. And then i had enough. It wasn’t for me. Im not part of them anymore. If there’s anything about taking down broken standard… at the very least i know my gang is still around. They’re still getting power I: so ur in a second gang or? H: im no longer in a gang I: ok so immortals. Sacrament works with immortals. Anyone else? K: i’ll clarify since it wont get me shot. My friend, or mentor is more accurate, was in the broken standard and was removed forcefully by circumstances out of her control and they don’t like her rn. Since murder’s super legal im worried about her. H: assuming she’s in hiding K: yeah i don’t have her number and can’t ask her to reach out to soma H: at the very least you’re our in K: shit ig man. Im so bad at talking I: haven may also be an in. also patch have you dealt with unions? P: nah H: hey patch who did you kill? P: i didn’t kill anyone All of us: dude u had to have killed anyone P: the surgery just went wrong. I didn’t kill him K: hey man it sucks but im not in denial We’re in aetherion space, we can engage in union business as long as its not aetherion unions. Cant support unions directly, but u can do the services and talk to the union members so long as u dont bring it back to aetherion Sacrament partner bonds with konbini. Its gay We go thru the irradiated rain to sexico-6 Beautiful orc lady at the counter who motions us forward
Contemplative working the bar behind (The Velvet Above All) Giantess dwarfs sacrament, standing at 25ft tall Giantess cups sacraments chin “well arent you a cute little thing” Orc woman walks away, woman with machete K: are you soma? “I could be, depending on who’s asking.”

info_showOrphanNodes.description: Show nodes that are not connected to any other nodes.

info_showAttachments.description: Show attachments like images and PDFs as nodes in the graph.

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: Allow the user to view the global graph of all nodes.

info_allowExpand.description: Allow the user to pop-out the graph view to take up the whole screen

info_attractionForce.description: How much should linked nodes attract each other? This will make the graph appear more clustered.

info_linkLength.description: How long should the links between nodes be? The shorter the links the more connected nodes will cluster together.

info_repulsionForce.description: How much should nodes repel each other? This will make disconnected parts more spread out.

info_centralForce.description: How much should nodes be attracted to the center? This will make the graph appear more dense and circular.

info_edgePruning.description: Edges with a length above this threshold will not be rendered, however they will still contribute to the simulation. This can help large tangled graphs look more organised. Hovering over a node will still display these links.

info_minNodeRadius.description: How small should the smallest nodes be? The smaller a node is the less it will attract other nodes.

info_maxNodeRadius.description: How large should the largest nodes be? Nodes are sized by how many links they have. The larger a node is the more it will attract other nodes. This can be used to create a good grouping around the most important nodes.

info_allowResizing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be resized

info_allowCollapsing.description: Whether or not to allow the sidebars to be collapsed

info_rightDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the right sidebar

info_leftDefaultWidth.description: The default width of the left sidebar

info_sourcePath.description: The local path to the source .html file which will be included.

info_allowFoldingLists.description: Whether or not to allow lists to be folded

info_allowFoldingHeadings.description: Whether or not to allow headings to be folded

info_siteUrl.description: The url that this site will be hosted at

info_authorName.description: The name of the author of the site
